name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: Radically altering our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
The bottom line is that opponents of voting rights are on track to easily enact many of the proposed policies from Project 2025 . We're focused on the changes to voting and our elections, but there's no doubt that this plan is radically altering our country and our lives into a mix of our inequitable past and an unrecognizable autocracy. We cannot let the loss of our rights become irreversible.
Don't stand by and let Project 2025 become our full reality. Chip in $25 or more right now to make sure every American knows about the dangerous consequences of this plan and holds Congress accountable for standing by to let this happen >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082625_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Courier: Trump's executive orders seem to be ripped right from the pages of Project 2025 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082625_2&amount=25]
Remember when opponents of voting rights spent 2024 disavowing the Heritage Foundation's "Project 2025", Team? Now that they're in control, they are following that playbook line by line.
Organized by the Heritage Foundation, a right-wing, dark money, inside-the-beltway, anti-voting think tank , and advised by more than 100 conservative groups, Project 2025 put forth a 922-page list of policy recommendations, going agency by agency in the federal government.
So far the Trump administration has followed Project 2025 in five major ways:
➜ Military immigration enforcement. They've deployed U.S. troops on our domestic borders, with ongoing operations in Los Angeles and Washington, D.C., supporting ICE and their operations to round up anyone who might not be a legal immigrant -- with a lot of legal Americans wrongly arrested. Trump is threatening New York and Chicago are next.
➜ Filling the administration with the authors of Project 2025. From installing Russell Vought, the main author, as head of the Office of Management and Budget to making the head of the FCC section head of the FCC to and more, the author's list has been appointed to powerful positions en masse.
➜ Mass firings in the civil service. Elon Musk's DOGE team started with a buyout scheme for federal employees and when that failed, moved to layoffs. The Supreme Court recently cleared the path for mass firings. Project 2025 calls for replacing the open positions with partisan MAGA henchmen who are loyal to the president and not the Constitution.
➜ Persecuting transgender Americans. The Trump administration has attacked gender identity across the board.
➜ Environmental rollbacks. From pulling out of the Paris Climate Accords (again) to opening Alaska's land to drilling to valuing fossil fuels over all other forms of energy production, they're dismantling environmental regulation piece by piece.
We're just eight months in. If they've already accomplished all this, you can bet Project 2025's recommendations for voter suppression are going to be added to Trump's executive orders attacking our elections and mail-in ballots . We must use this playbook of theirs against them and fight back however we can.
Please, step up and fuel our efforts to defend our fundamental right to vote and more with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082625_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082625_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082625_2&amount=20]

name: Wes Moore
subject: What Trump is doing with the National Guard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Donald Trump’s decision to deploy the National Guard in D.C. is deeply dangerous.
| **Donald Trump’s decision to deploy the National Guard in D.C. is deeply dangerous, team.**

As someone who has served this country overseas and who is commander-in-chief of the Maryland National Guard, I take this very seriously.

Donald Trump’s policies have raised unemployment, made people lose their healthcare, and cut food benefits for children. **Now he’s using citizen-soldiers as a distraction and as a cudgel to advance his own political purposes.**

If he really wanted to address the issue of crime, he could look at what we’re doing in Maryland.

We’ve helped to lead the country in drops in violent crime, shootings, and carjackings. Our number one priority is making sure people feel safe in their communities — and our policies, from investing in law enforcement to investing in community violence prevention, reflect that priority.

Instead, Donald Trump and his administration are not treating our government resources and the people who choose to serve in our National Guard with the seriousness they deserve.

I’m embarrassed, I’m angered, and I’m heartbroken by these political games. Our servicemembers should not be used as a tool for advancing anyone’s agenda — and as Maryland’s Governor, I will not use our servicemembers for a political ploy.

[If you agree with me, I hope you can split a contribution of any amount between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project so we can continue moving forward.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93271?t=6&akid=20996%2E878179%2EH1xPdl) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Wes Moore and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93272?t=7&akid=20996%2E878179%2EH1xPdl)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93273?t=8&akid=20996%2E878179%2EH1xPdl)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93274?t=9&akid=20996%2E878179%2EH1xPdl)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93275?t=10&akid=20996%2E878179%2EH1xPdl)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93276?t=11&akid=20996%2E878179%2EH1xPdl)
Thank you, friend.

Elevate,

Wes
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93302?t=12&akid=20996%2E878179%2EH1xPdl)
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20996%2E878179%2EH1xPdl). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20996%2E878179%2EH1xPdl).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20996%2E878179%2EH1xPdl) to request fewer emails. name: Chris Ahuja
subject: Our maps should reflect people—not politicians
body:
This isn’t about politics. It’s about Democracy.

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=d48570528e&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | [Donate](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=f322ee62b2&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| | Dear Peter,**Governor Gavin Newsom just put forward a redistricting plan** that will finally give California voters what they deserve:**fair maps that reflect people, not politicians.** I fully support this plan—because our democracy only works when the system serves us, not the powerful few.**The MAGA regime doesn’t have honor.** They cheat, they gerrymander, they dismantle the very laws that were founded for the people. They want to decide who counts instead of letting us decide who leads. That is not democracy.**This new redistricting plan is about putting power back in your hands.** It is about giving communities a voice, strengthening representation, and saying once and for all: this country belongs to _We The People._**But here’s the truth: if we don’t have candidates ready to fight for these values, fair maps won’t be enough.** We need grassroots campaigns like ours to stand up, take on entrenched power, and make sure every Californian has a representative who answers to them—not to lobbyists or political machines.[**I’m building that campaign, but I can’t do it without you. Will you chip in $27, $54, or $81 today to help us fight for a democracy that reflects the people?**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=01d9b3029b&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Together, we can protect our democracy and build a government that finally answers to us.**
**In solidarity,
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=1cb004fd89&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja****Democrat for Congress, CD-32**

---
| | | | | | | | | [ View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/chrisahuja/ahuja-vra-anniversary-11041787?e=5a6ee82cdb)
Christopher Ahuja for Congress * 21255 Burbank Blvd Ste 120 * Woodland Hills, CA 91367-6669 * USA

name: Working Families Party
subject: Stand with workers this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
We can all see what’s happening in front of us. | | | Peter, We can all see what’s happening in front of us: **Billionaires are trying to take over our entire government.** They want to turn it into their own personal slush fund — firing workers, gutting our healthcare, slashing our social security, raising the cost of living, and then using fear and force to try and silence our voices when we speak out. **But just like any bad boss, billionaires can be stopped when we come together.** That’s why this Labor Day, we won’t just be kicking back with our friends and families, we’ll also be uniting in protests, rallies, and community gatherings across the country. [**Hear from WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell, get front line reports from DC and Chicago, and learn about how working people across the country plan to stand up to the billionaire agenda on a mass call this Saturday, August 30th at 1pm ET/10am clean_body: We can all see what’s happening in front of us. | | | Peter, We can all see what’s happening in front of us: Billionaires are trying to take over our entire government. They want to turn it into their own personal slush fund — firing workers, gutting our healthcare, slashing our social security, raising the cost of living, and then using fear and force to try and silence our voices when we speak out. But just like any bad boss, billionaires can be stopped when we come together. That’s why this Labor Day, we won’t just be kicking back with our friends and families, we’ll also be uniting in protests, rallies, and community gatherings across the country. This Labor Day is about more than just a barbecue. Across the country, from big cities to the smallest towns, working people will be coming together to demand a government that puts working people over billionaires. And this is also about more than one day. It’s about building a movement strong enough to stop the billionaire takeover and create a fairer, more just, and more democratic country for all of us. Stand with workers. Say no to billionaires taking over our country. , then In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. name: Chris Murphy (via Democrats.org)
subject: Dangerous. Unprecedented.
body:
---
Derek, I won’t mince words — our democracy is under threat. Donald Trump spent his first eight months in office making corrupt deals in Washington and overwhelming the American people with chaos, lies, and illegal action. He’s been slashing Medicaid, destroying the economy, and fueling wars abroad — while handing out tax cuts to his billionaire friends and profiting off the presidency for himself. He wants us to believe that we’re powerless. But that’s the biggest lie of all. Every move Trump has made in office has been wildly unpopular, and he knows it. That’s why he pushed Governor Abbott to redistrict Texas. He’s scared of losing seats in Congress in a fair election, so he’s rewriting the rulebook. It’s a blatant power grab and an anti-democratic attempt to rig the 2026 election cycle. **But history tells us that mass mobilization beats a would-be autocrat.** We have to fight back. And we will — but to mobilize, we need a strong infrastructure. We need organizers, technology, logistics, and support. It’s the DNC’s job to build that infrastructure and allocate resources to the states and candidates that need their support most. **[That’s why I’m asking you to pitch in to support the DNC today. What we’re facing right now isn’t politics as usual — it’s a dangerous and unprecedented overreach. The only way we’ll fight back is by working together to mobilize Democrats across the country, and that’s the type of work your $3 contribution will fund:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250826_4432_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4432_22930333_UavmSl&akid=4432%2E22930333%2EUavmSl)**

And it’s exactly the kind of leadership we need in Congress. But while Kristen is stepping up for her community, Washington Republicans are spending big to tear her down. Kristen represents one of the most competitive swing districts in the entire country. And with control of Congress next year coming down to just a handful of seats, the GOP is already pouring money into Michigan to try and flip the district red and tip the balance of power. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kristen McDonald Rivet and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Gretchen Whitmer and Kristen McDonald Rivet are showing up for Michigan families every single day. name: Michigan COV
subject: Thank You for Standing Strong – Return Petitions, Join Us, and Help Us Fund the Fight!
body:
Your Tireless Efforts Are Changing Michigan—Let’s Finish Strong

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1bb21485638a/breaking-news-citizens-only-voting-amendment-submitted-to-board-of-canvassers-8370992?e=ecf60db114)
---
[|
---](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=7578a6d2b9&e=ecf60db114)
| | | | | [DONATE TODAY](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=366424d236&e=ecf60db114)
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend,
First, thank you. Your relentless commitment to the **Citizens Only Voting Amendment** is truly inspiring. Every conversation you’ve had, every door you’ve knocked on, and every signature you’ve collected puts us one step closer to securing fair and lawful elections in Michigan.
Now it’s time to take the next critical step—getting those petition sheets back so we can track progress and reach our key milestones.
* **Mail them to:**
MICOV c/o VFO
620 N. Kane Road
Webberville, MI 48892

* **Have 10 or more completed petition sheets?**
Send a text to our volunteer petition manager, Meghan Reckling at **(517) 672-6823** or email **mreckling@victory-fo.com**. We’ll arrange a convenient drop-off with your County or Regional Captain—or even have our field manager collect them directly from you.

If you haven’t signed up to volunteer yet—or know someone who wants to get involved—signing up is fast and easy: [**Volunteer with us today**](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=d9e8cc95be&e=ecf60db114)

### Please Help Fuel the Fight—Donate Now

Our campaign’s success depends not only on petitions, but on the resources to collect them efficiently and educate voters across the state. Your donation—big or small—makes a real difference.
Use the **Donate** button above or visit the donate page at **michcov.com** to support the movement and keep our momentum going strong.
Together, we’re building unstoppable energy—and every petition, every volunteer, every dollar brings us closer to safeguarding the integrity of our elections.
Let’s finish strong.
Onward.
---
|
---
| | We are going to need our entire grassroots nation to get out and support this effort. Go to our website to sign up for updates, like and follow us on social media and help us spread the word. This issue will be critical to 2026 and we need you!
---

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: Maine and North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
These are two of our MUST-WIN Senate seats in 2026.
#

There are TWO U.S. Senate seats that we MUST flip in order to restore our Democratic Senate majority next year. **North Carolina and Maine.** **[If you’re ready to help us flip these seats, please consider chipping in now. Otherwise, please keep reading to learn more about both of these important races.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94195?refcode=em20250826-9332&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9332%2E614464%2EbJCnNt)** **[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94195?refcode=em20250826-9332&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9332%2E614464%2EbJCnNt)**
---

**— North Carolina —** _GOP U.S. Senator Thom Tillis announced that he will NOT seek re-election in 2026._ **After this news, Cook Political Report upgraded North Carolina’s U.S. Senate race from Leans Republican to a _TOSS UP!_** **And now, former Democratic governor of North Carolina, Roy Cooper, is officially running for the open seat!** _This Senate race will be one of the nation’s top battlegrounds next year._ **[Please consider making a donation today to help us flip North Carolina’s Senate seat blue and restore our Democratic majority:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94195?refcode=em20250826-9332&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9332%2E614464%2EbJCnNt)** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94196?refcode=em20250826-9332&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9332%2E614464%2EbJCnNt) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94196?refcode=em20250826-9332&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=9332%2E614464%2EbJCnNt) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94195?refcode=em20250826-9332&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=9332%2E614464%2EbJCnNt)
---

**— Maine —** Republican U.S. Senator Susan Collins is running for re-election in 2026. **Maine will be one of the most _expensive_ and _competitive_ races in the country!** Cook Political Report AND the Center for Politics rate Maine’s U.S. Senate race as _Lean Republican._ But right now, with faith in the GOP at an all-time low, just about anything could tip the scales and make this race a TOSS UP! **[Please consider making a donation today to help us flip Maine blue and restore our Democratic majority in the Senate:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94195?refcode=em20250826-9332&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=9332%2E614464%2EbJCnNt)** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94196?refcode=em20250826-9332&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=8&akid=9332%2E614464%2EbJCnNt) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94196?refcode=em20250826-9332&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=9&akid=9332%2E614464%2EbJCnNt) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94195?refcode=em20250826-9332&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9332%2E614464%2EbJCnNt)

Friend,
**I AM ABSOLUTELY SICK TO MY STOMACH.**
I just learned that someone burned our Great American Flag outside the White House!
The Great American Flag is the symbol of our Liberty. Our Great Troops fight for our Freedom wearing OLD GLORY!
**FLAG BURNERS ARE SPITTING IN OUR FACES** desecrating the sacred reminder of all that we’ve sacrificed to become the greatest nation on Earth!
__If you stand against disgusting flag burning__ , I’m putting together the biggest PATRIOTIC BLITZ ever seen. I want you to be a part of it!

subject: Trump’s gutting FEMA during hurricane season.

* ❌Cutting the Federal Emergency Management Agency’s (FEMA) pre-disaster mitigation program

* ❌Appointing a MAGA loyalist to lead FEMA – someone who just denied $150 million in grants meant to upgrade Florida’s flood prevention infrastructure

* ❌Planning to eliminate FEMA entirely after this hurricane season – leaving disaster-stricken communities without _any_ federal assistance.

FEMA has the power to save lives, and help communities rebuild when the worst happens. But **Trump doesn’t give a damn about helping people in need.**

That’s why he’s trying to rip this aid away for good, and he’s going to use those dollars to help fund tax cuts for corporations and his billionaire friends.

**Trump may try to kick us while we’re down, but I’m committed to standing up. For all of us.**

As long as I’m in Congress, I’ll always fight for our people who are getting left behind by this administration, and I’ll do everything I can to right their wrongs. But I can’t stay in this seat without your support.

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is how you win a swing state:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Join me in the fight.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250826_2_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250826-4050&refcode2=4050_400544_h30iD-&akid=4050%2E400544%2Eh30iD-)
North Carolina is a swing state, and we can be sure that Republicans will go all out to defeat us. But I know how to win North Carolina. _Whether it was Attorney General or Governor, I’ve done it over and over in the most competitive years._
It takes the dedication to connect with folks in every community, the commitment to fight for the rights that people hold dear, and the courage to stand up in the face of threats to the progress we’ve made.
**I served as Governor for eight years. I know that North Carolinians don’t want to go backward. And based on the enthusiasm we’re seeing for our campaign from people across our country, that sentiment is true for Americans everywhere.**
As a U.S. Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, clean air and drinking water, and more. I will work to make health care _more_ affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy.
And I’ll never stop listening to what _the people_ need from me and meeting them where they are.
I believe that this is how you win a swing state. And I know that — with you on our team — we can succeed here in North Carolina.
**[I’m asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and Deb Haaland because _right now_ is when we can build the momentum to win. Chip in $5 today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250826_2_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250826-4050&refcode2=4050_400544_h30iD-&akid=4050%2E400544%2Eh30iD-)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250826_2_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250826-4050&refcode2=4050_400544_h30iD-&akid=4050%2E400544%2Eh30iD-)**
Grateful to have you with me,
Roy Cooper
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=1&akid=4050%2E400544%2Eh30iD-)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=2&akid=4050%2E400544%2Eh30iD-)

**Last week, I was proud to be officially sworn in as the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee by none other than my dear friend, Vice President Kamala Harris.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114055910/565835948/1749430327?refcode=250826_RG_swearin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTQ3NWIyNS1lNDgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F0mQ5HGIADEVC6Qn2xcvqIM4_SmtoqzWsB_Po49kEkc=&emci=0c986c17-cb82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=c9475b25-e482-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16877361)

As the VP told the crowd at the ceremony, “When Robert Garcia walks the halls of Congress, people pay attention. If not, try to catch up.”
**I was honored to hear Vice President Harris say that and to have her backing in the fight to oversee and investigate misconduct in our government – especially with Donald Trump, the most corrupt person to ever serve as president, in office.**
[**Are you with Kamala and me in that fight? Add your name today to say you’ll stand up against Donald Trump’s corruption at all levels of our government.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114055912/565835950/1749430327?refcode=250826_RG_swearin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTQ3NWIyNS1lNDgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F0mQ5HGIADEVC6Qn2xcvqIM4_SmtoqzWsB_Po49kEkc=&emci=0c986c17-cb82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=c9475b25-e482-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16877361)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114055913/565835951/1749430327?refcode=250826_RG_swearin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTQ3NWIyNS1lNDgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F0mQ5HGIADEVC6Qn2xcvqIM4_SmtoqzWsB_Po49kEkc=&emci=0c986c17-cb82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=c9475b25-e482-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16877361)
While I’m prepared to fight Trump’s corruption every day as Ranking Member on the Oversight Committee, my work will also be about delivering for the American public.
That means building a government based in truth, driven by public service — not by special interests — and powered by strong, respected work that honors all of our union workers and hard-working people who are laboring every single day.
**That’s what Kamala Harris fought for as California’s Attorney General, U.S. Senator, and Vice President, and I’m proud to have her back as I continue that fight in Congress.**

clean_body: = Hi, it’s Democratic Congressman Robert Garcia. Last week, I was proud to be officially sworn in as the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee by none other than my dear friend, Vice President Kamala Harris. As the VP told the crowd at the ceremony, “When Robert Garcia walks the halls of Congress, people pay attention. If not, try to catch up.” I was honored to hear Vice President Harris say that and to have her backing in the fight to oversee and investigate misconduct in our government – especially with Donald Trump, the most corrupt person to ever serve as president, in office. While I’m prepared to fight Trump’s corruption every day as Ranking Member on the Oversight Committee, my work will also be about delivering for the American public. That means building a government based in truth, driven by public service — not by special interests — and powered by strong, respected work that honors all of our union workers and hard-working people who are laboring every single day. That’s what Kamala Harris fought for as California’s Attorney General, U.S. Senator, and Vice President, and I’m proud to have her back as I continue that fight in Congress. Thank you! Robert = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

And in Iowa, we BROKE the GOP supermajority in the state Senate, preventing a conspiracy-theorist weirdo from holding a seat in government and giving Democrats the power to block MAGA appointees to state agencies.
**Thank you for giving your time, money, and attention to advocating for state Democrats and fighting fascism in all corners of America.**
We’re celebrating tonight and getting back to work ahead of our next special elections in Florida on September 2nd.

Peter, blue states are DESPERATE to hang onto power.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._ZkHgc7Jtu-rb9EPoIQ) Trump Poised to Remove Noncitizens from Census 🚨**BREAKING NEWS:** President Trump is again leading the charge to protect the integrity of our democracy – **this time by ensuring that only U.S. citizens are counted in the official U.S. Census.**

This bold move strikes at the heart of the Democrats’ scheme to manipulate our system and tip the scales in their favor.

name: Thomas Massie
subject: Friend, I only reach out like this when I must
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
body:
I wish I were reaching out today with better news.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zim39leksfh6orhpsvpa0s685ln7hjc753uukjao_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9ie4ob4chh2bs)
---
Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. _I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary._ The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent _**$1 MILLION**_ on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. _I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of_** _ALL-OUT WAR_** _on me and those who support me... _ _**_[And if I don’t pick up my fundraising efforts immediately, I'll be severely outmanned and outgunned. Because of this, what was just another end-of-quarter deadline has now become the biggest, most crucial deadline I’ve ever faced.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdchk9omuuqdpb3n8enn3d1vptpiabr1qv8j8s0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9ie4ob4chh2bs)_**_ Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely.** ** _**[I wouldn’t be asking for your help right now if it weren’t absolutely vital.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqj9d8q6dphjvfjoecl4rtp06aq2njvt8403es40_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9ie4ob4chh2bs)**_ **But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest.** Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. I pledged to protect the Constitution at all costs and to keep my promises to the American people. **_They can’t stomach my presence in Washington because I'm a constant reminder of the promises they are BREAKING!_** They’re prepared to flood my race with immense sums of out-of-state cash to drag my name through the mud until they’ve BANISHED me from Washington for good. [_**So can I count on your support to help me stand strong against the full force of the neocon establishment?**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8grkkthv4hl7j60vne6rsubf7v4jv6u2h5ed3q8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9ie4ob4chh2bs) **Friend, I keep my promises. You have my word that I will NEVER back down. ** Sincerely, Thomas Massie

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Chip and Joanna Gaines go all-in on LGBTQ agenda in their newest show
body:
Many former fans of Chip and Joanna Gaines are criticizing the couple for yet another show that pushes the LGBTQ agenda even further than before.In July, Chip Gaines accused their critics of being too judgmental after they were hit with backlash for including a same-sex couple with children in their show "Back to the Frontier" to be aired on HBO Max.'How far removed and out of touch are the Gaineses to consider this appropriate family entertainment.'The reality television show stars identify as evangelical Christians and have been excoriated by the left for supporting conservative causes, but they are facing scorn on the right after clips from "Roller Jam" surfaced on social media. | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/R-7anFLGV7tgGIDRigR0UA)

[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD01MTYxNzkifQ/3JqGj9vtrtd3pHzZkgV_PQ)

# **[Chip and Joanna Gaines go all-in on LGBTQ agenda in their newest show](http://trk.libertyledger.-Q)**
---
Many former fans of Chip and Joanna Gaines are criticizing the couple for yet another show that pushes the LGBTQ agenda even further than before.In July, Chip Gaines accused their critics of being too judgmental after they were hit with backlash for including a same-sex couple with children in their show "Back to the Frontier" to be aired on HBO Max.'How far removed and out of touch are the Gaineses to consider this appropriate family entertainment.'The reality television show stars identify as evangelical Christians and have been excoriated by the left for supporting conservative causes, but they are facing scorn on the right after clips from "Roller Jam" surfaced on social media.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-Q)

---
Judicial Watch on Monday announced that a Georgia judge last week ordered Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis to provide additional information in her search for records related to her prosecution of President Donald Trump. The order was part of Judicial Watch’s 2024 lawsuit that it filed after Willis denied having any records related to [...]...Click to read more

# **[Cracker Barrel desperately rewrites 'inclusion' and DEI web page after backlash](http://trk.libertyledger.-iPU_qMpqDIRV7hg)**
---
Cracker Barrel has changed its diversity page at least three times this month as it deals with backlash from the redesign.Love for the franchise tanked when customers saw the company had changed its recognizable logo into a shadow of its former self, removing the "old-timer" known as Uncle Herschel sitting on a chair next to a barrel.'Discrimination, overt or through unconscious bias, has no place at Cracker Barrel Old Country Store.'Also gone was the barrel itself, along with the text "Old Country Store," leaving just black "Cracker Barrel" text on a yellow background.

# Wednesday, August 27, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1859, Edwin L. Drake [struck oil at 691⁄2 feet](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGSrCAQANDTYKaFrQwaEPzEbH66oQXSjL2LgwU9Q3n7rd0r7AVe8D7u691SpOfjvz3QcEjrE2uJyIx55fw6zkAZS0CfQqCNbDz3hCtIUK2cWtCrtxSvdWy8CYiAQ4Om1-oG0zwMutmNn928Tb0Cr8HpMAbpw7yhdFI51_djQ-ZHkxPoXspJQQdS4TD1GzoV_ICzGCV64pS7z0RP3jHEK70xd1s6mmh25rOI4Z-ARcBSa-18tl9YMcYu5YeAxbr04vZVBCyFGNudCqd8Ndn4s1KMVG5ajPJxWIq_KP9p4m3gOwAA__8KSHOt) in Titusville, Pennsylvania, discovering America's first commercial oil well. ## Trump Fires Fed Governor
President Trump announced Monday night that he was [firing Federal Reserve Governor](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAURL9GMyy8yMAEBC8xm5duaDFw0buLYgGjNX-_5fzCxqequ09_PaaHpUjb_N-uaGpI04ZniVgr5qnm17oHylgC-hQCObJxXxJOwEEyrhmoyVuK72lovQmIgKJF0yt5A30XQrWLkf3ge-Hv1g9e6AG1CABKPm9OSMWlaslcaVyD6jnXEjrgEoXuHT5l8ALvzcDRU025-0601QVDfKcDc-fS2kaz1LqXRvxrYGxgPM-z257usrh4A-OeIlVy5YILVWRLehVsYPzosYxrOmibWUCP2UaWsWA-kM1Xx5Yyi1Qscyn9sOw2C6B6odts_H5SjFRuqhn4vFqKn0H1Ty8eBn4DAAD__-8miJA) Lisa D. Cook, citing mortgage fraud allegations referred by the Federal Housing Finance Agency. Cook, the first black woman to serve as a Fed governor, [rejected the move](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGy4yAMQE-DOzxYhBgXFNvQZdstPcSIWLvYeIDE49vvkCv87hUaPT39ecwPR5H212-3oakhzTueJWKtmOea39sRKGMJ6FMItJCLx5pwBgGKC81hnL2jeM23zpuACCg7NMOo7qAnKcduNU8_OLlokIPySo4BhIdBhqdwASe5QEembRMaxkEIraAHoVDqYcGnCl7ixG4CPdWU-7-J9rpiiFf6YO6XtHXRrLUehclfDCwDe55n_y6uJu-uNsDAlpryxcC2Mgb2SJEqLQ2bmIEVunEjn3YXPf-G80jF8SWlfzygx-wiz1gwf5C_mn5PmYHVSoNSwyTEyMB22fjjpBip3Ed2E6_NUfzeWX_03I-B_wEAAP__t4eMxQ), saying he has no authority to dismiss her and that she will continue serving. Her attorney, Abbe Lowell, said they will file a lawsuit challenging the action. The firing of a Federal Reserve governor [by a U.S. president is unprecedented](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpCAURb9GMywEFTog2MSsN93QouWibwfFAlqn_36q-xcmv3XqnvPvPt0tBdqXv3aDKT5OO64cUArSVNJzOzwlZA8XvaeZbDjWiElw0TOumVCTsxReU1c74wEBWcO0qh-Evkmp6tX4ruu148PgtBwG_wBve207pXBTlreyJvOmcS1Uy7nuRSN4D6nbGY_eO4lb1XE4KjE1_yPtZYUPr3giNXPc6mDWUo5cyT-VGCsxXtfV-Pj9eGbakfN7U4nxiIEKzbkS40eKJWzxRGYeDskGlpCRTrDlDd5jYoGyZXOMX8ynuLGPPdhMhfaF-WSfjtkQsNhCcc91Mu64KATKg6o6vmyWwudf-VXU04ifAAAA__8m6JAH), but investor reaction to the move was muted on Tuesday, with markets closing slightly higher. The Federal Reserve [would not say Tuesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAUhZ8GOwxeRLCg2MZutt3SIFzGu4NikB0zb79xXuHvTnKS7-Q7fx7zw1Gi_fnbbWhrzPOO15mwVixzLf-2I1LBM2LIMZInl4414wwCFBeGg56Do_SZ-ybYiAgoG7SdVgOYUUrdrBYGrTrXidAb0_dejbhoCKMMQmmxKGzI3jRhQHdCGAUtCIXSdB4XFYPEkfUCA9Vc2r-Z9rpiTJ_8xtL6vDXJrrUeJ5O_GEwMpuu6Wr8v_i4ZTDeawSTMnQcGU6LTcZ_zi0cM_Mrlxb-a_PZs17qlpthwXJQSnYNmvXhujtJ3q_7ooLeF_wEAAP__VSx4Lg) whether Cook was at her office or working remotely, the day after Trump fired her in a letter posted online.
## Massive Dust Storm Sweeps Phoenix
A towering dust storm, or _haboob_ , swept into Phoenix Monday evening, plunging the city into darkness and disrupting the evening commute. [Watch a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOtCAUBeCnwW4MXHTAguJv7OZvtyQIl_FOUAyyY8an37ivsN1JTvIl53w97MNRovX53y1oasx2xWNPWCsWW8v3skUquEcMOUby5NI2Z7TAob9xfQNlg6P0sV0TTEQElA0aofo76EFK1cyGRxH9gEHcedepiBAGIZwXUmnf-wkaMpfGNSjBue6hBd6j1MLj1McgcWAdx0A1l_aVaa0zxvTJbyytz0uTzFzrtjP5j8HIYDyOo50mf3UMxmsMg_FNAfMVfPc8g1zP7XzlppiwHZQS7XfFOv5cHKVfs_7piLeBnwAAAP__DIRyVw). The [haboob](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwzAQQ7_G3hTIZyuyBw1dsqVrR-MsneIrZMuQL0nTry_SAu0HdOJAgOTj23k8IydeL6-4kJOYx5XueyIRKqOU67JFLrRHCjlG9oxpmzONoMEo3SuwY0BOj7Grg4tEQG1NrrHmCP3QtraeHSDGYKKn6LGZPOihMWHwTQBvrTVdze6Zpnuwjda9gQNoQ23feJpMDC0NVacpsORyeM-8ykwxPfKNysHnpU5uFtn2qn2p4FTB6U4o849XwekJ8ye_q4_qSbHyh8LCn3lFFa67qF1yWdSMU85TXVzY7pwS70dbdfqyIKfvRvnXTTcHXwEAAP__K9B8uQ), driven by thunderstorm outflow, brought wind gusts up to 94 mph in San Tan Valley and 70 mph at Sky Harbor International Airport, where flights were delayed. Visibility fell to near zero, prompting safety warnings from the National Weather Service as downed trees and power outages spread across the metro area. Flash flooding followed, forcing closures on parts of Interstate 17. While haboobs occur regularly during Arizona’s monsoon season, storms of this size and intensity are less common and especially disruptive. [See more photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAQBp_GdD6ZNQZTUKRx96dNiYxZH44Mi-y9H909fUSq9Om2GI1mv19f85dPOR3Pn37HiSPNB141IzOWmctrP2MqWCOuFGMKyedzI5xBgZHKShjm1af8nrtmnSIioG5wagfTgx21HpptiqFvl7EzdjEqIIagoVcj9qOxnVn6oUnTbVMWhlYpa-AByqC2bcDFxFXjKDqFa2Iqj9-UDt4w5jd9Y3kE2ps8bcxnFfqHACfAXdf18J-ABxefb0KAO1PgV0H59DljeQtw95MCXKbgswDnS_rQ4eWFnjcsAtydJMApe9_9P8j6qiwrU9nl5heiRe50VKJDLlhZnhsx3WprrNZGKaUGAa4p03peKedU-0F06rn79Leu4f8a_XuCPwEAAP__srCVbw).
## Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Engaged
Pop superstar Taylor Swift and Kansas City Chiefs star Travis Kelce [announced their engagement](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL_GZB6ZNgwQOLiEbC69EHlMG_rW2JbdMyP-fsX-wmYlleqp9P49loelQHH7aw807NMS8VMDMmNZuLyO7Klg9bgm78mRDXlPuICCXqpRwrCslsK5dM1qPCKgbtC0Q3-HcdJ6aHbjewvaaYejVp1tJ9srj-7ZOWyfE3SuIXPR1AhDq9TYww1Uj3psHT57v2qcRKdwJU7l9j9R5B19ONMby82lowlmZ85V6D8CZgFzPHOqfFUC5gssYFbjle8C5ppT4Spg5mLfVOUXBoeS7RlSkfVDnqUtKDFudsNV5pRlZVukjTG9osNr2hSz5g-FQPU-iE5th6Xw84V_JfBt4DsAAP__pqqFXQ) on Tuesday after two years of dating in a joint Instagram post with the caption, _“Your English teacher and your gym teacher are getting married.”_ The photos in the post, taken in a lush garden or forest setting, included Swift displaying a brilliant-cut diamond ring in a gold bezel. In today’s Flyover Podcast , host Ayla Brown unpacks why Vanity Fair staff are revolting over a possible Melania Trump cover. Watch the full episode now on . Yesterday, we asked about your wedding day, and you delivered! Many recalled courthouse vows and Vegas chapels, while others shared Jamaican getaways or even a hot air balloon ceremony. If you have joint pain that makes simple daily tasks difficult, be sure to check out today's sponsor, which offers products to help ease joint pain. | Trump Fires Fed Governor President Trump announced Monday night that he was Lisa D. Cook, citing mortgage fraud allegations referred by the Federal Housing Finance Agency. Cook, the first black woman to serve as a Fed governor, , saying he has no authority to dismiss her and that she will continue serving. Her attorney, Abbe Lowell, said they will file a lawsuit challenging the action. The firing of a Federal Reserve governor , but investor reaction to the move was muted on Tuesday, with markets closing slightly higher. The Federal Reserve whether Cook was at her office or working remotely, the day after Trump fired her in a letter posted online. Massive Dust Storm Sweeps Phoenix A towering dust storm, or haboob , swept into Phoenix Monday evening, plunging the city into darkness and disrupting the evening commute. . The , driven by thunderstorm outflow, brought wind gusts up to 94 mph in San Tan Valley and 70 mph at Sky Harbor International Airport, where flights were delayed. Visibility fell to near zero, prompting safety warnings from the National Weather Service as downed trees and power outages spread across the metro area. Flash flooding followed, forcing closures on parts of Interstate 17. While haboobs occur regularly during Arizona’s monsoon season, storms of this size and intensity are less common and especially disruptive. . Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Engaged Pop superstar Taylor Swift and Kansas City Chiefs star Travis Kelce on Tuesday after two years of dating in a joint Instagram post with the caption, “Your English teacher and your gym teacher are getting married.” The photos in the post, taken in a lush garden or forest setting, included Swift displaying a brilliant-cut diamond ring in a gold bezel. . Their romance began in the summer of 2023 after Kelce mentioned attending Swift’s Eras Tour on his New Heights podcast, with the pair dating privately until going public at a Chiefs game later that year. The relationship has also carried cultural weight, with Swift’s presence boosting NFL viewership and reportedly adding to the Chiefs franchise. body:
AT&T has agreed to [acquire 50 MHz of spectrum licenses](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL_GdCCzgA2Fi2vocu2VaG2vgxUTInsTkr8_cb9w3WhGeiO9n8tywZji_fqNGxl-h32501ESMVNekLmszyt5wnTWjEwPzDdcQMJQy7EGvXiM6bP0lTdW-qmtyLR6UDDB0MlqNaPS1gKOwREpOUrfUZh0UFpBpzsdqmhOmBxBt60EOTTe9sGPwWone1STFb0kH3nPDa_E9MYS0md_UW7cvlXJrMyPIrovAbOA-TiOxt2tO0cB88kWMMvxzErATG7dC2OuC-_uViNzfcRMiUqpt2e5NStvqcrGP46YUixKi15eN4zp747_J-ll4DcAAP__9PN7qw) from Colorado-based EchoStar for $23 billion in an all-cash deal. The telecommunications giant indicated the purchase will facilitate the expansion of its 5G mobile network and wireless home internet service.

## Priority Bills Advance
The Texas House approved several high-profile bills yesterday. Senate Bill 12 aims to restore a power stripped from the attorney general in 2021, when the Texas Court of Criminal Appeals ruled that the Texas Constitution [reserves the authority](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOrDAQRE8DGchuDIbAwU_I5qcbojZusLUGj0zPMNx-xV5hs1KVVHp6X4_pgSGGff2PGxn-LGna6TwiMVOekPnwr5UcYbxrRqYn5m-cQEBbib4CPTkM8ZpU6YwVbpAlGanbDgZoG1F609tlkbrvlFZ2UOCknkVjFVqrcNBoy2DuM9GDllKAaGtn1eL6xepZKOwGWyhBLnDKNXti-uCxxCu9Kddz2spoPPPzKJp_BYwFjOd51hf6lO61gPHmLmDEzGGOdEcbYqzW8A77WiFzyjtd1Uo7ZYwVvtinHPiqQEgFsu2b2vMWy2zc8wwxhqPThRLrhiH-AvDftL0N_AQAAP__CveDjw) to prosecute election crimes to local district attorneys unless they request assistance. House Bill 8 scraps the end-of-year STAAR test for [three shorter tests](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuOrDAQRL_GZEamwTwCB5NwkzsbbLLaCDW4AWvNQ3YzzPz9ivmFzUpV0tFRfd27Ozrv1ukDFzL8HLdupTN6YqbQIXOcj4ksob9qRqYdww92oEBLVUuoOovOv7oisaZXtskSMlmlS2hA5yqZTa5yHFVmS93YQleghrpGRXXTaNTjUCbOXDBVQ5VlCpRObV-Mth77alAFlk0vCkXW8RZSnonpiXH0r-1BIR22JfFmZt6jyG8CWgHteZ7pEtdrE9DSKo8ooL3sBbTvHBkxyAsw4-HljjFSlG-wnLcjkhw8YXDrJE98yXELcqVTMkWO0q0SFFQCWgzydsv-T_8-v5Ng7H46710sK1GoaUHn33b8t08fBn4DAAD__4HQjJI) administered at the beginning, middle, and end of the school year. Schools would not be allowed to administer practice tests, and the state would provide results as percentile ranks within two business days. Senate Bill 3 requires municipalities in flood-prone areas specified by the Texas Water Development Board to [install warning sirens](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAURp8GOwwgihQU01jtbHarLc11uCpZBBdwnHn7jZP_Df7u5tzk5OT7cx_v4LwLy0_Y0JTXHMeAZ_ZYCqYRSsnrsaBF8BcuUHCH9BdGwURLWU-FGi04_x5lZc3ErOYVGq7aTmjRNqxajdKgJq25VLKZtdRcY8Ma23GBvZotq5y5ZKwXinMmWFvbSc62nyf1YBI6PRHJ0LoSU11WLPiCPPt3fGKqH3GrvFlL2TNpbkQMRAznedZbDtePiAEDPTIRw1VPxPC5Pwq6xiMj3SFnzHRy3tOE_w6XXFjo7GO0NLuEIVMXaI4bfsE9xYAUEsKlgkRvN_5j-f3rXiVj99N573KniGTLBs5_Csv3dn0a8T8AAP__zHCOsw) and test them regularly. It also establishes a $50 million grant program to fund the initiative.

During a Tuesday House GOP Caucus meeting, Republican members voted to support a package of rules and legislative proposals to [prevent future quorum breaks](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-OhCAQx_Gn0Y4N4h-0oLjGbq-90gwyCFkUD0Z39-0v7itcO5N88s3v5z7dwQe_Ld-woqKXjdOGzxyQCNMERNkdCxqEcJ0JCHdID5gEFy3jPRNyMuDDe2pKozQ3Q1WiqmTbiUG0NS-dqoHzYZ65rbQRPdi6rls9V9LigD3YofTqwngvZFVxwdub0Y01vdVy5g10gy4ajsZTTDdySPiCbMM7nphuc1zLoBzRnov6qxBjIUZy6HwI168Qo4srXuWFGNumG4SU7CMwF4-MLOF-6OBn2DI7IyGDBfyWiSWkFGEmfyLbj81nt-JGmdmY2O8R07EynRAemC66TMrsTx-Cz50sGr6s4D8FJf1v01OJvwAAAP__kSqP5w). They decided against retroactive penalties for their Democratic colleagues who left the state for two weeks earlier this month.
## AT&T Buying Frequency Licenses for $23B
AT&T has agreed to [acquire 50 MHz of spectrum licenses](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL_GdCCzgA2Fi2vocu2VaG2vgxUTInsTkr8_cb9w3WhGeiO9n8tywZji_fqNGxl-h32501ESMVNekLmszyt5wnTWjEwPzDdcQMJQy7EGvXiM6bP0lTdW-qmtyLR6UDDB0MlqNaPS1gKOwREpOUrfUZh0UFpBpzsdqmhOmBxBt60EOTTe9sGPwWone1STFb0kH3nPDa_E9MYS0md_UW7cvlXJrMyPIrovAbOA-TiOxt2tO0cB88kWMMvxzErATG7dC2OuC-_uViNzfcRMiUqpt2e5NStvqcrGP46YUixKi15eN4zp747_J-ll4DcAAP__9PN7qw) from Colorado-based EchoStar for $23 billion in an all-cash deal. The telecommunications giant indicated the purchase will facilitate the expansion of its 5G mobile network and wireless home internet service. The deal addresses threats from the FCC to revoke EchoStar's licenses for 20MHz of low-band and 30MHz of mid-band frequencies due to low usage. EchoStar, the parent company of Dish Network, will continue to operate its Boost Mobile service [using AT&T's cellular network](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD3O5CAQRE-DM0a4_R8QbOJsNt3QaqAZo8XGgvbM-PYr7xW-rFQlPZXen-fyxBDD_vqNG2n--rTs9CmRmCkvyFzW80WOMN41I9OB-S8uoKCTapQwLA5DvJa2ctooN9UV6Xroepiga1S1ams81H7o7ei71lmF1PuRjEeomwmtrYK-YWqEoa4VqO7hTOvd6M1gVYv9ZESryAVO-cErMX2x-HilN-WHTVsV9cp8FNH8EjALmPfrSIXvScB8kwXMarxzL2A2Zwk7lSJgRsbtYMlJmvOSn5ApUimyHGQ5n5uMwdJeqEif0ybJrqkwZulTltAYAXOVtTs-IcZQ-kG06rVhiP8_8c9MvjX8CwAA__8C0onv). Earlier this year, SpaceX alleged that EchoStar "barely uses" the spectrum reserved for its satellite service and urged the FCC to make it available to competitors. The criticism prompted FCC Chair Brendan Carr to launch an investigation and [issue a warning](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O7CAQhE-DM0aA_wOClzibl25oNdA2aLGxoD0zvv3Ke4UNu6v0Vam-nvMTQgz7-h821PRZ0rzju0QkwjwDUfHnig4h3m8CwgPyN8xKqJaLgat-dhDiNTeV00a4UVaoZd92alRtLSqve-zc2DpRO2HMIJwE2XYgDY6dRCmgCvqGiUH1Ugol2oczzeKGxfRWNNCNhjUCXaCUH-SR8ANliVd6YX7YtFVRe6KjsPofUxNTE-RCaP0eLNw6U9N98iPFYC-mpjuMqUkMt5eIU-LmvDhanwpB5uVAS_nc-JIyV7Xhy5nJY-a4U8bd-rCv3ISV1zzFsKYjxRtbZe2Od4gxlK5njVg3CPG3IP1t1pdWPwEAAP__cmiOMA) to the company in May. AT&T agreed to purchase Lumen Technologies' consumer fiber operations for $5.75 billion earlier this year. The company has indicated that it plans to [expand its fiber optics network](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL_upCAUhZ8GOwxe_6AFxTQ2uzPtlgbkOpJFMHAdx7ffuK_wa78v5-Tk_HlOT-28C--X3lDRd4lTwDN7JMI0aaK8Hm-0qP2NSRPuOv3VEwhoueg5yMlq56-pKawywg5VgaqSbQcDtLUoVtWgkGZABDAd2EHUPdYdYm1ruYCsmsKpu0z0IKtKgGhLa5rF9ouRs2h0NxjWCLSOYippRcKvzou_4gdTOcet8Gol2jOrHwxGBuN5nuWWw-0YjBj4kRmMWwx4MRjnuO06OLyZJk6cIjfHxXFeYyadeN5xpnRs3LsZQ8bMl5i4NvEgDjU3znsXw51O_PGofuNL_CqSsvt5m9xJ1oj3pp3_P45-dulHwb8AAAD__0Z2jKQ) with cash savings from Trump's tax and spending bill.
## 1,720 Acres Acquired for New State Park
The Texas Parks and Wildlife Department (TPWD) has [acquired 1,720 acres](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuqzAMhp8mbEEhJQSGDHdh613viBxsStSUIHChvP1Veh7hbJZ_6ff3-d99uEOIYXn8hRc5_kxpWOjcIzHTNgDzPr8fhAQxrxmYVtieMGiljVSt1HZACPEa6gKdV9hVBbnKmkZ32txUMTuLHZixMdpaY7tpMujbtqk9-KZVI6oiuFymWm2rSmllSvT1hO3k7ahqaDovakUYOG0lz8T0gX2KVzpoK8f0KqKbmddd3P4I3Qvdn-dZPnfgHArdZ2yh-5hGiEL3-ZTQvWrz3PzksrJKSRg3kl9DmRUlJ-lJIh0U00oowyLfB0QkOab3wpfk9US5w5Xri83heoYYw95YUavHC0L84vHvnno4_T8AAP__0MqLSw) in Uvalde County to establish Bear Creek State Park, located less than a mile from the popular Garner State Park. A Monday announcement touted the [$33.5 million purchase](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DuuszAQBeDVmA5kDw-TwsXf0OVvb4kGewhWhofMQJLdX5Et3HY0Okff-bn3d4wcl8d_nMnJe1z7hV47kwilHkX26XhQIOTrLCi0YXpiDxrqXLc52D5g5E9fZcENOtxMRs7YuoEb1KXOJucbXyOgqagtyftm8GGk0mCw2NqyNVl0V5huwRqjQddFGKoxtONgva6wuQ2q0hSirKmQiYTeuI_8WU9KhV_njN0ksu2q_KegU9DtuOAi6xLXwh8sR6IZt-tTQXcZFHSS8CRW0A2EKfeJ6Jl_bfmFy48TOZCCLksubK_IHPfGqko_Zoz8LZW_TXU6-A0AAP__8nOAmg) as "another feather in the cap of the department for their efforts to provide more public spaces for Texans to recreate in the outdoors." Since January, TPWD has acquired [more than 6,800 acres ](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAQhp8GNtD5YjAePHTJlq4d0YGPYNUBZK4hefvKqG_Q7dd_0nf6_q9bf6MQw3L_pAc7eU1rv_CxRxbh1JPIPv_c2TPFXAsJb5S-qUfApoKuQtN7CvHd69K7AbxVJTtlmhYtNhcoZ-dbNGgGO1rTkdY8WN1q7pRShgC6tgwuw6BDoxQgNLUf9OS7aTAjaGrtUGhgH2RNtcws_KJ9iu_1yake10cZ3Syy7cXlo8BrgdfjOOpxTuuSrwVeY5g41yH6v0hJwhhzWvioTmB1qlXZrUIFqjG2qbd5K5Pz2xFiDHtrCg33B4V4vpX_jfV0-BsAAP__lPx-GA)of parkland through a $1 billion conservation fund approved by voters in 2023. The Hill Country site features numerous canyons and ridges and provides access to the Frio River, Spring Creek, and Bear Creek. Senate Bill 12 aims to restore a power stripped from the attorney general in 2021, when the Texas Court of Criminal Appeals ruled that the Texas Constitution to prosecute election crimes to local district attorneys unless they request assistance. House Bill 8 scraps the end-of-year STAAR test for administered at the beginning, middle, and end of the school year. Schools would not be allowed to administer practice tests, and the state would provide results as percentile ranks within two business days. Senate Bill 3 requires municipalities in flood-prone areas specified by the Texas Water Development Board to and test them regularly. It also establishes a $50 million grant program to fund the initiative. During a Tuesday House GOP Caucus meeting, Republican members voted to support a package of rules and legislative proposals to . They decided against retroactive penalties for their Democratic colleagues who left the state for two weeks earlier this month. AT&T Buying Frequency Licenses for $23B AT&T has agreed to from Colorado-based EchoStar for $23 billion in an all-cash deal. The telecommunications giant indicated the purchase will facilitate the expansion of its 5G mobile network and wireless home internet service. The deal addresses threats from the FCC to revoke EchoStar's licenses for 20MHz of low-band and 30MHz of mid-band frequencies due to low usage. EchoStar, the parent company of Dish Network, will continue to operate its Boost Mobile service . Earlier this year, SpaceX alleged that EchoStar "barely uses" the spectrum reserved for its satellite service and urged the FCC to make it available to competitors. The criticism prompted FCC Chair Brendan Carr to launch an investigation and to the company in May. AT&T agreed to purchase Lumen Technologies' consumer fiber operations for $5.75 billion earlier this year. The company has indicated that it plans to with cash savings from Trump's tax and spending bill. 1,720 Acres Acquired for New State Park The Texas Parks and Wildlife Department (TPWD) has in Uvalde County to establish Bear Creek State Park, located less than a mile from the popular Garner State Park. A Monday announcement touted the as "another feather in the cap of the department for their efforts to provide more public spaces for Texans to recreate in the outdoors." Since January, TPWD has acquired parkland through a $1 billion conservation fund approved by voters in 2023. The Hill Country site features numerous canyons and ridges and provides access to the Frio River, Spring Creek, and Bear Creek. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/59cfca4f63b54b09/?utm_campaign=20250822&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

Fellow patriot,

Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...

_As a matter of fact, it’s my last resort. _

YOU SEE, I’M WRITING TO YOU AS A MAN WHO’S RUN OUT OF TIME,
RESOURCES, AND OPTIONS AHEAD OF THE TRIAL OF MY LIFE.

A DEMOCRAT ATTORNEY GENERAL IS MAKING ME STAND IN A RIGGED TRIAL FOR
BOGUS STATE-LEVEL CRIMES, BECAUSE SHE KNOWS THAT NOT EVEN THE MOST
POWERFUL MAN ON THE FACE OF THE PLANET – PRESIDENT TRUMP – CAN
SAVE ME WITH A _FEDERAL_ PARDON IN _STATE_ COURT.

And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a
former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney,
but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year
prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was
RIGHT.

The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got
me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – ESPECIALLY AFTER
THEY’VE ALREADY STRIPPED ME OF MY LAW LICENSES!

_ No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_

But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot
step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: THE
AMERICAN PEOPLE.

So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that
can save me:_ THE COLLECTIVE VOICES OF MILLIONS OF PATRIOTS LIKE YOU._

My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for
2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — “THE PEOPLE’S
PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/59cfca4f63b54b09/?utm_campaign=20250822&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]—
calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.

_...AND WE’RE NEARLY THERE! _

SO PLEASE, HELP ME REACH THIS LIFE-SAVING (_TRULY!_) GOAL TODAY BY
IMMEDIATELY ADDING YOUR NAME TO “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” AS
CITIZENS UNITE TO CALL FOR MY FREEDOM AND TO DROP ALL CHARGES AGAINST
ME.
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/59cfca4f63b54b09/?utm_campaign=20250822&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/59cfca4f63b54b09/?utm_campaign=20250822&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]
__

ADD YOUR NAME
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/59cfca4f63b54b09/?utm_campaign=20250822&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

Thank you and God bless you,

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/59cfca4f63b54b09/?utm_campaign=20250822&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund

Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=314326&trkid=870962720&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Dem collapse in PA
subject: My party, why have you forsaken us?
body:
We aren’t trying to bash the DNC, we are sharing an objective fact, they are not in a position to invest in this race. The cavalry isn’t coming.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xe7rYCPp3GLjstynswxkiAMsPiMQoNHOz57q4O4VAcrYJfpgqz8UdZhrILhzMXKO5Dide6xkV9uu8aTdzb0LbJDSclMlYdRKAmjvooGC_0pPQ8a39bqZDkQiinrmG9Ep7UfFSx3qb35LfP9yVvX30nqW2zHQeGGr3DSSfScY08NcjJOLewGAs7jap3gWiTy7ym7p-h5VPoAgMYD7tkKZOvbULcc4lp3B8A87MVLXc1c=&c=8QiUK90KAv5JxGc2pyEoZVF_2MXnIK_FY4Q7C3UaGdL7rofw1wbbLQ==&ch=x_QrX_f6dFwCiMSxkZ1ID4PvY4go-loUQtbXDimDDLDxB-6l6Lq1zQ==)

| Peter,
Democrats are two months out from the biggest election of 2025, the PA Supreme Court retention election.
A loss for Dems in this race means all of PA's Democratic house districts can be removed through gerrymandering, a full abortion ban, and free reign for MAGA to conduct egregious voter suppression.
Democrats cannot afford to lose here but that is exactly what we are on track for. While the National Republican Party has zeroed in on this race, the National Democratic Party is nowhere to be found:

| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xe7rYCPp3GLjstynswxkiAMsPiMQoNHOz57q4O4VAcrYJfpgqz8UdZhrILhzMXKO5Dide6xkV9uu8aTdzb0LbJDSclMlYdRKAmjvooGC_0pPQ8a39bqZDkQiinrmG9Ep7UfFSx3qb35LfP9yVvX30nqW2zHQeGGr3DSSfScY08NcjJOLewGAs7jap3gWiTy7ym7p-h5VPoAgMYD7tkKZOtmx-kPpru0yzcV1ybonw4o=&c=8QiUK90KAv5JxGc2pyEoZVF_2MXnIK_FY4Q7C3UaGdL7rofw1wbbLQ==&ch=x_QrX_f6dFwCiMSxkZ1ID4PvY4go-loUQtbXDimDDLDxB-6l6Lq1zQ==)

Republicans are outspending and outorganizing us everyday. If this election were held right now, Democrats would lose.
We have two critical months to mount a comeback and win this race. Defend our Courts has stepped up to lead the charge and we need your help.

name: Chef Andrew Gruel
subject: A Chef’s Take: How we fix our food and our planet
body:
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e349935/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvdXlRN3RhNnFteA/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA4Mjc/LbmNsZXo1dXZBMQ/qP2hpZHM9bmN2UmV1b3BiQ0U2OGpscw/gaK7xZg/s6t24df7ed3)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |

[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
Friend,

>From the kitchen to the coastline, I’ve seen the power of sustainability firsthand.

As a chef, I believe that what we put on our plates is deeply connected to the health of our environment and our communities.

Because when we protect our environment, we’re not just saving trees or oceans. We’re preserving access to clean air, clean water, and real food packed with nutrients.

At my restaurants, I’ve built everything around sustainability, sourcing traceable seafood, supporting responsible aquaculture, and working directly with ranchers and fishermen who care about long-term health over short-term gain.

But no chef, no restaurant, and no individual can do this alone.

We need a national movement to fight for clean water, regenerative agriculture, and responsible stewardship.

That’s where the American Conservation Coalition (ACC) comes in.

**ACC is leading the charge for a cleaner, more sustainable America — _without_ the heavy hand of government mandates.**

They’re building a movement of young, pro-environment conservatives who believe we can protect both our health and our freedoms.

I’m so passionate about their approach that I told the American Conservation Coalition I would help them raise $10,000 before the end of the month to support their mission.

[Please join me today in supporting ACC by donating any amount you can generously afford to support a healthier, more beautiful America! Even $10 makes a difference. >>>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
[Donate $10 >>>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[Donate $35 >>>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[Donate $50 >>>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[Donate $100 >>>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[Donate $250 >>>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[Donate $500 >>>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[Donate Any Other Amount >>>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
The American Conservation Coalition is building the conservative environmental movement. Their goals? To:

👩🏻🌾 **Restore regenerative farming practices** rooted in health and sustainability
🏞️ **Conserve America’s natural resources** for future generations
☣️ **Reduce toxins** in our food, water, and air
✅ **Promote real solutions** that create healthy communities and families

ACC empowers young conservatives to join the national discussion concerning conservation, clean energy, sportsmen’s rights, regenerative agriculture, and more.

With over 80,000 members, ACC branches complete local clean-up projects, influence local, state, and national environmental policy, and drive change that embraces common-sense solutions to the health crises and environmental problems we face.

Friend, this isn’t about politics.

It’s about conserving the things that nourish us – our land, oceans, and our children’s future – _not through mandates or government overreach_ , but by protecting what makes this country beautiful.

**If you believe that thoughtful conservation can heal ecosystems and communities, then I urge you to support the American Conservation Coalition by donating today!**
[Donate Now >>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
Thank you for standing up for health, freedom, and the future.

Chef Andrew Gruel

_The American Conservation Coalition (ACC) is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Donations to the American Conservation Coalition are tax-deductible. The American Conservation Coalition’s tax identification number is 82-3815628._

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e349935/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA4Mjc/LbmNsZXo1dXZBMQ/qP2hpZHM9bmN2UmV1b3BiQ0U2OGpscw/gaK7xZg/sdqd36f95e6)

name: L.t. Gen. Michael Flynn
subject: Here’s the disturbing truth
body:
The Deep State wanted to destroy me| | |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,**Did Barack Obama commit treason when he launched a multi-front campaign to destroy Donald Trump, his allies, and cripple his incoming Administration?** My answer is “Yes” because I was personally and professionally destroyed by them.Barack Obama along with Hillary Clinton, Susan Rice, James Comey, and other power-hungry radicals concocted this scheme from inside the White House.But the real conspiracy wasn’t just behind closed doors.Everyone was in on it – especially and most dangerously the mainstream media. I’m talking about 24/7 hit pieces. The never-ending barrage of mysterious leaks. name: Crystal & Jason Crazy Bear
subject: Stop MVP and SSEP Pipelines — Support Indigenous Leadership at Climate Week and COP30
body:
Your Support Helps Us Take the Fight Against MVP & SSEP to the Global Stage | | | Hi friends, 7 Directions of Service is heading to **New York City this September for Climate Week 2025** —and we need [your support.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38PF_lwrBnzOgHScbVCsk1ZvcJ4zJxh_FOz039loRPOmZUUnirPeNMf5oRXWJpIuJLzxqR02olIaDuTYiX-bQ67hHoSDdhOC47MrrGzfXoovdjUCxWxTvVpUvBPk20OPxpa1cIqY5p8hGThuRaaV2VCyrRHh-q-mDR1PpDOfRRWz_xAfTdcdwkU7Ly9rUssfplLz5RCterH6QIFzKw7ThYJivJvPvhHU7GN7yLE9BPRgOqCTkgKFx31nYPrSh-AxmdFb-wvu-qS5o97K-B8q6hYhO0BbnpMe8zgJEUrwUNu83kALiUuKKciFVa3YuGnuHhAasIv4rhVattF-U-JEC049-w8vWrvSQntKAUw1bDamBP7oKy-NOYbqk8niScxeYpZA-ixK7hZOo6Ct0DSioyofPmkeqEZTRTfnPWGO10m8Q/4je/EMWmBwfZTXeK4IuwN9dhHQ/h0/h001.Ayg8Pv3Ew4_kWhKCFFvBdMjJCWaiD3sL_B-_rMlvkJA) This year, we will present the outcomes of the **1st-ever Indigenous-led Rights of Nature Tribunal (June 2024)** to the **International Judges Assembly**. By the end of Climate Week 2025, these findings from the Judges will be **formalized and adopted****.** In **November 2025, at COP30** , Jason and I will present the verdict on the UN stage, where it can become a **powerful tool for advocacy and change**. For the first time, we are bringing **two staff and two Indigenous Elders** to New York with us. This is part of our commitment to ensuring that Indigenous Peoples are not only present but **also leading** the global climate conversation. This work also matters locally. **This is how we fight the MVP Southgate and SSEP pipelines—by elevating the struggle to the international level.** When communities say no to fossil fuel colonialism, but corporations and state agencies push forward anyway, Rights of Nature provides a new pathway: to hold industry accountable through Indigenous law, international advocacy, and people's power. I know Kasey already sent out our updates about Climate Week. Still, I wanted to dedicate a special email to share exciting news: **we are partnering with AHAM Education and the Southeastern Climate & Energy Network (SCEN) on Monday, Sept 22, to host a fourth panel.** This new collaboration expands our impact and highlights the importance of cross-movement solidarity in meeting the climate crisis. Alongside these milestones, 7 Directions of Service will be hosting **four powerful events** during Climate Week (both in-person & virtual): 📅 **Monday, Sept 22, 2025**
* _Indigenous Futures, Global Goals: Meeting the UN SDGs through Indigenous Leadership_ | 4:30–5:30 PM

📅 **Tuesday, Sept 23, 2025**
* _Rights of Nature in North Carolina: Protecting Land & Life through Indigenous Law_ | 11:30 AM–12:30 PM
* _Appalachia to the Gulf South: Rematriation as Climate Justice_ | 12:45–1:45 PM
* Global Alliance for the Rights of Nature: Judges Assembly Panel | 2:30-4:30 PM
* _Indigenous-led Rights of Nature: Dismantling Fossil Fuel Colonialism and Building Climate Resilience_ | 6:30–7:45 PM

👉 View all events here: [https://bit.ly/m/7DS2025ClimateWeek](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.jTd4CJP2oHMhBHdrjS9uut2Gxdh7I555EtO7p3EwBc9u1YQvOTHkzsjoa79amiIYx2QuX7pBOXG6WSEizGEazUH6NScltba1QAge2YURlhVJgwH4_rIb5rzFeSZgkqojP-xQGtbRTI54jvPfd7kTVvbvvSXBPqVICVf-850fRTiPPiqJfTlZE0ZyP8khlnFcoKIUJBb0SMjiQdRkK3zSM3kWgIV6GeXFRHOFaHr_zX-CCpuOJ4VqXV8Iy7bUkK5q9FZ0DM9XHYLAb9jjDM6KDCSmmNU7yOfyxYV5QwNjhXITZsVUuRj0Lv_FdaYgCXNTsnHdE8uYgLCYD8F_tUgaB2EU6qTt3ElrdjQYY2V7U7KZLx2B7_7kt2qInmJ1msq8/4je/EMWmBwfZTXeK4IuwN9dhHQ/h1/h001._D2fR9PKdcrm4OdAdDB7celpCVCcehJT-yEcORylOks) We are also preparing for the long journey ahead: lobbying the **North Carolina General Assembly through 2026** so that in **2027** we can introduce two Rights of Nature bills—one in the House and one in the Senate—and hold our first-ever **Lobby Day**. However, none of this would be possible without you. 🌱 **Donate today** or ask your[**organization to sponsor**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38PF_lwrBnzOgHScbVCsk1ZvcJ4zJxh_FOz039loRPOmZUUnirPeNMf5oRXWJpIuJLzxqR02olIaDuTYiX-bQ67Bo_jb6QKLltlv7c_qnoiuiFOvPkN6mybzEMVz1uAIk8nfOb7mUhUZQXEEKYkps2Xe-h7Pvv_OdXbq5yII6SOK1JDm5sSKcJPlPTNxPoJpuy_or0gDTidRL9-Qs23npNxg6WnqPQlTDBBOqt2Y83QCoPsMHh4H2My_99fNxQ4-BcTtCMOhrOlyjorAnZ16b2zE36S1OjOJuGUfD9jDkDd1_vf1rWzwZ--LkOxPjhXZ-TTRd0NaZ9X_HSn3jhNbROUt3OsZWcRs7aZ8moKB1MXwijHS9bx3hmeNr8Xg0F_QVtasT7RlF5IBE-BTkaQOz3sKE1iV5fweaZT62AgnkRA5w/4je/EMWmBwfZTXeK4IuwN9dhHQ/h2/h001.Wstof7lthxOgYrk2dr8i8xlc7TEu-npFl5I3rrxZSA0)our Climate Week presence. Every contribution ensures Indigenous voices are at the center of global climate solutions—and strengthens our fight against destructive pipelines at home. clean_body: Your Support Helps Us Take the Fight Against MVP & SSEP to the Global Stage | | | Hi friends, 7 Directions of Service is heading to New York City this September for Climate Week 2025 —and we need This year, we will present the outcomes of the 1st-ever Indigenous-led Rights of Nature Tribunal (June 2024) to the International Judges Assembly. By the end of Climate Week 2025, these findings from the Judges will be formalized and adopted. In November 2025, at COP30 , Jason and I will present the verdict on the UN stage, where it can become a powerful tool for advocacy and change. For the first time, we are bringing two staff and two Indigenous Elders to New York with us. This is part of our commitment to ensuring that Indigenous Peoples are not only present but also leading the global climate conversation. This work also matters locally. This is how we fight the MVP Southgate and SSEP pipelines—by elevating the struggle to the international level. When communities say no to fossil fuel colonialism, but corporations and state agencies push forward anyway, Rights of Nature provides a new pathway: to hold industry accountable through Indigenous law, international advocacy, and people's power. I know Kasey already sent out our updates about Climate Week. Still, I wanted to dedicate a special email to share exciting news: we are partnering with AHAM Education and the Southeastern Climate & Energy Network (SCEN) on Monday, Sept 22, to host a fourth panel. This new collaboration expands our impact and highlights the importance of cross-movement solidarity in meeting the climate crisis. Alongside these milestones, 7 Directions of Service will be hosting four powerful events during Climate Week (both in-person & virtual): 📅 Monday, Sept 22, 2025 Indigenous Futures, Global Goals: Meeting the UN SDGs through Indigenous Leadership | 4:30–5:30 PM 📅 Tuesday, Sept 23, 2025 Rights of Nature in North Carolina: Protecting Land & Life through Indigenous Law | 11:30 AM–12:30 PM Appalachia to the Gulf South: Rematriation as Climate Justice | 12:45–1:45 PM Global Alliance for the Rights of Nature: Judges Assembly Panel | 2:30-4:30 PM Indigenous-led Rights of Nature: Dismantling Fossil Fuel Colonialism and Building Climate Resilience | 6:30–7:45 PM 👉 View all events here: We are also preparing for the long journey ahead: lobbying the North Carolina General Assembly through 2026 so that in 2027 we can introduce two Rights of Nature bills—one in the House and one in the Senate—and hold our first-ever Lobby Day. However, none of this would be possible without you. 🌱 Donate today** or ask your Climate Week presence. Every contribution ensures Indigenous voices are at the center of global climate solutions—and strengthens our fight against destructive pipelines at home. With gratitude and determination, Crystal & Jason Cavalier-Keck Co-Founders, 7 Directions of Service | | Sent via .
