name: Ben Samuels
subject: Gerrymandering's silver lining
body:
What's happening is bad, but that doesn't mean that there isn't opportunity: a renewed push for ranked-choice voting or nonpartisan redistricting, for instance.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5zYW11ZWxzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ekmTu9_FLYNBRJro4xbMWdtsUkKeSmw8tA1VoeJ-Ozg?) for more
---
# [Gerrymandering's silver lining](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2440398&post_id=171895064&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxODk1MDY0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTYzMDI1MjYsImV4cCI6MTc1ODg5NDUyNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI0NDAzOTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.g32O_tx4ix4iuJtdrHwcXv0VwFpOHEXAof67spFuXfg)
### What's happening is bad, but that doesn't mean that there isn't opportunity: a renewed push for ranked-choice voting or nonpartisan redistricting, for instance.
| | [Ben Samuels](https://substack.com/@bensamuels)
---
| Aug 27
---
| [](https://substack.com/@bensamuels)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2440398&post_id=171895064&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxODk1MDY0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NjMwMjUyNiwiZXhwIjoxNzU4ODk0NTI2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjQ0MDM5OCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Oz_ymOHKLfPRYG6sC7Fv8yOWkNBF3UHSwJFz4sPBRVg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2440398&post_id=171895064&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxODk1MDY0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTYzMDI1MjYsImV4cCI6MTc1ODg5NDUyNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI0NDAzOTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.g32O_tx4ix4iuJtdrHwcXv0VwFpOHEXAof67spFuXfg&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2440398&post_id=171895064&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxODk1MDY0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTYzMDI1MjYsImV4cCI6MTc1ODg5NDUyNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI0NDAzOTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.g32O_tx4ix4iuJtdrHwcXv0VwFpOHEXAof67spFuXfg)
---
| | [](https://substack..m7QB59iDDFG_5lfPIVIIv7ou4UwTU2-LArDDR17-YFI?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/bensamuels/p/gerrymanderings-silver-lining?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I wrote two weeks ago about the ever-evolving gerrymanders gripping America's political landscape:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f5e31566-2358-4308-bb13-da5ddbe8f1d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | |
#### [Mutually assured gerrymandering](https://substack.com/redirect/f5e31566-2358-4308-bb13-da5ddbe8f1d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Ben Samuels](https://substack.com/profile/12425779-ben-samuels)| | *
---|---|---
| Aug 13
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/f5e31566-2358-4308-bb13-da5ddbe8f1d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It is, for all the reasons I articulated, really bad for the country. But we shouldn't let a good crisis go to waste,1 and there are opportunities to ride this wave of discontent and anger--on both sides of the aisle--to make things better.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5zYW11ZWxzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9hY2NvdW50IiwicCI6MTcxODk1MDY0LCJzIjoyNDQwMzk4LCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNzU2MzAyNTI2LCJleHAiOjIwNzE4Nzg1MjYsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.j4_uZY0bJqYLSgezdIVGSQtF4tEVUJ_qVRiYRfx04wQ?)
> _**Article summary:**_
> * _Ranked-choice voting got pummeled in 2024 elections. But states like California and Texas are making an extremely compelling case for why it 's more important than ever._
> * _Gerrymandering wars are creating a lane for the rare practical, sensible politician --if they choose to take advantage._
> * _I could envision residents in states across the U.S. taking up ballot measures to push for nonpartisan redistricting._
>

### It's not as simple as "red" and "blue" states
By shorthand, we refer to places like California and New York as "Democratic states," and we refer to places like Texas and Florida as "Republican states."2 But that is, of course, an oversimplification.
**California has the second-most Republicans of any state in the country, and Texas has the second-most Democrats.** Florida has the fourth-most Democrats; New York has the fourth-most Republicans. Here's a back-of-the-envelope rundown of the states with the most Republicans and Democrats.3
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f1626087-a26e-4071-935d-c4e9573010fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The ten states with the most Republicans are also the ten states with the most Democrats, in a slightly different order. Why? These are all really big states, and 40% or 45% of a really large number is still a large number.
[For all the reasons I articulated two weeks ago](https://substack.com/redirect/f589427f-d440-4fe1-84e6-f2efdb2271a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), I think California is justified in retaliating against what's happening in Texas, but the impact is that they're disenfranchising Republicans in the nation's second-most Republican state--exactly what Texas is doing to Democrats right now.
**[Texas' gerrymandering is overwhelmingly unpopular](https://substack.com/redirect/f3d22421-9de4-4c85-a795-114649a85648?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, and it feeds into that narrative of a broken political system. Even among Republicans, only 66% approve--that's surprisingly low, given the partisan edge it'll ostensibly generate.4
Where's the opportunity? **California and Illinois are making an extremely compelling argument for how we change the Republican narrative around ranked-choice voting.**
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2440398&post_id=171895064&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxODk1MDY0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTYzMDI1MjYsImV4cCI6MTc1ODg5NDUyNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI0NDAzOTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.g32O_tx4ix4iuJtdrHwcXv0VwFpOHEXAof67spFuXfg)
### A renewed push for ranked-choice voting
I've been a long-time supporter of ranked-choice voting; I think it'd help mitigate a lot of the intense partisanship we're dealing with as a country. It's something I've worked on and something I wrote about leading into the '24 elections:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c8e515ba-f94d-4b03-b46e-5388fc3b7da9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | |
#### [The case for ranked-choice voting and open primaries](https://substack.com/redirect/c8e515ba-f94d-4b03-b46e-5388fc3b7da9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Ben Samuels](https://substack.com/profile/12425779-ben-samuels)| | *
---|---|---
| October 22, 2024
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/c8e515ba-f94d-4b03-b46e-5388fc3b7da9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Despite [just 4% (!) of voters saying](https://substack.com/redirect/c3255bfb-6869-43a5-ae35-e39ec137c283?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that "the political system is working extremely or very well," reforms like ranked-choice voting that'd improve our political system [fell short almost everywhere in the U.S.](https://substack.com/redirect/657d3b3b-f654-4137-a384-0657648c144c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) last year.
Some of that is because it's become a partisan issue. [Republican voters are more skeptical of ranked-choice voting](https://substack.com/redirect/673848e3-f6c4-45fe-ab2a-e828f9917d2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) than Democrats, and [17 Republican states (and counting)](https://substack.com/redirect/0f0d7b9f-13ac-43d8-930b-d0e40cb8d2ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have banned ranked-choice voting.
What's the opportunity? Here's the argument I'd be making to win over Republicans on ranked-choice voting.
* Because most districts aren't competitive, [91% of elections are decided in primaries](https://substack.com/redirect/e7b71d93-476d-4b64-a181-f883ae114070?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). That number is about to go up, which means that Republicans in California are about to lose any say that they have in elections, and it'll push elected officials in California to the left.5 **Ranked-choice voting would give politicians a reason to care about voters in the minority party**.
* States where Democratic-led gerrymanders are on the table--which include California, New York, and Illinois--functionally strip voting power away from Republicans in states that have some of the largest Republican populations.6 That should outrage Republicans!
* Of course, confidence in Congress is--as it usually is--[extremely low](https://substack.com/redirect/ce633653-6ded-4dd9-8eb3-abaa9c22527c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). There's a chance to reset the narrative here, since the country is paying more attention right now to how **[politicians are picking their voters](https://substack.com/redirect/27dbc838-d0cc-4420-af32-5ce3f1f189d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) , not the other way around**.

I listen to enough conservative talk radio to know that this sort of narrative shift won't happen overnight. But there is an opening, with so many voters having their voting power further diminished.
### Opportunity for sensible governors to own that lane
[In a recent poll](https://substack.com/redirect/f483801f-ec26-4c9a-abab-3dabba859e2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), 94% of Americans agree that, "It is important that both Democrats and Republicans come together to solve the problems that are facing America." On the one hand, it's a meaningless question; of _course_ people believe that parties should work together.7
But: if you look at the roster of people who are possible '28 Republican nominees, there are a _[lot](https://substack.com/redirect/24b49dd7-d906-4a3a-8223-0695c1288b7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ of people actively distancing themselves from any bipartisanship](https://substack.com/redirect/24b49dd7-d906-4a3a-8223-0695c1288b7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Greg Abbott, Steve Bannon, Tucker Carlson, Ted Cruz, Eric Trump, JD Vance, the list goes on.
All of that is to say that if a lot of those people run, even in a Republican primary, there may be a lane for someone with bipartisan bona fides.8
[I've written before about Republican Governor Spencer Cox in Utah](https://substack.com/redirect/556609f2-e3fc-496f-a60e-ec7d46439738?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), who [likes to position himself](https://substack.com/redirect/f70065c1-5c37-42af-9d2b-beb200ef7020?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as more moderate than most Republican governors.9
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f70065c1-5c37-42af-9d2b-beb200ef7020?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Could Cox and, say, New Mexico Democratic Governor [Michelle Lujan Grisham](https://substack.com/redirect/926fa584-6edf-4a3c-9bbe-4d956f733f6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) come together to end gerrymandering in their states?10 Both states are gerrymandered; both have similar numbers of seats. **A partnership between Democratic and Republican governors might help lower the temperature on what has become the country 's hottest issue.**
Call me an optimist, but with 50 U.S. Governors, I think _someone_ in their ranks might be willing to give this a try--if not because it's good policy, then because it might advance their self-interest.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2440398&post_id=171895064&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxODk1MDY0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTYzMDI1MjYsImV4cCI6MTc1ODg5NDUyNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI0NDAzOTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.g32O_tx4ix4iuJtdrHwcXv0VwFpOHEXAof67spFuXfg)
### Citizens can push for change themselves in 20+ states
And if all else fails: [17 states allow their residents to initiate constitutional amendments](https://substack.com/redirect/b7fbe8ce-b04f-4040-a709-52507630c929?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).11 A handful of others [allow their residents to pass laws](https://substack.com/redirect/a9f4adbf-683e-483c-9f84-b0377472a494?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (but not constitutional amendments).
Across the country, because of gerrymandering, states are creating less competitive elections. All of a sudden, a lot of people whose votes used to matter will matter a lot less.
[Gerrymandering is overwhelmingly unpopular](https://substack.com/redirect/7eb31103-72c6-4bbb-b7dc-a8b210388eb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and I think--and hope--that there could be some backlash in the form of citizen-led constitutional amendments.
It's obviously a bad situation all around. But it's not totally hopeless--that is, if we can get creative and be aggressive, and if our elected officials grow a spine. Though I might not count on the latter.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5zYW11ZWxzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9hY2NvdW50IiwicCI6MTcxODk1MDY0LCJzIjoyNDQwMzk4LCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNzU2MzAyNTI2LCJleHAiOjIwNzE4Nzg1MjYsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.j4_uZY0bJqYLSgezdIVGSQtF4tEVUJ_qVRiYRfx04wQ?)
_**Feel free to share this post with someone who will find this interesting.** If you're reading this email because someone sent it to you, [please consider subscribing](https://substack.com/redirect/ec17d8eb-e46b-4a6a-a94a-bbab5612ba79?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)._
1
An expression attributed to everyone from [Niccolo Machiavelli](https://substack.com/redirect/6d4a74a6-cf8a-434e-a821-9521f22b0ee9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to [Winston Churchill](https://substack.com/redirect/e426e94f-4b1c-49d1-996c-987568e84d2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to [Rahm Emanuel](https://substack.com/redirect/ecb21377-affd-4775-aa8b-86c330061bfd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
2
I'm not above this; I've written whole articles using that framing:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/747283e9-7faf-4365-b229-4bcc07da4528?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | |
#### [High-tax states are costing Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/747283e9-7faf-4365-b229-4bcc07da4528?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Ben Samuels](https://substack.com/profile/12425779-ben-samuels)| | *
---|---|---
| Jan 15
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/747283e9-7faf-4365-b229-4bcc07da4528?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
3
The calculations here are all _way_ oversimplified, but how I got to the number of Democrats and Republicans by state: I used the [voting-age population per state](https://substack.com/redirect/8e6fe34f-0612-4c4d-bd98-3507dfdbea51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and multiplied that by [Trump's and Harris' vote shares by state](https://substack.com/redirect/1e5832c8-b617-4384-b6d2-0291abf94be6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
This is inexact in lots of ways--it excludes third-party registrations and independents, people who don't vote, people who identify as Democrats but voted for Trump, etc.--but for this use case, it's close enough. Don't take the numbers in the table above as gospel.
I thought about using state-level party registration data, but the way that's done varies a ton from state to state and some states don't have any registration at all. So I went with the much simpler, if imperfect, approach.
4
[The numbers are almost exactly flipped in California](https://substack.com/redirect/4b1db8b3-6ba5-4d17-b712-f1df87cedfa6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), where Republicans are staunchly in opposition, and Democrats generally support.
My hunch for why Republican support isn't higher: [87% of Americans say that political polarization is a threat to the country](https://substack.com/redirect/b45c56ac-8c71-4039-b51a-7c070d15dc59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and the approach Texas is taking is a pretty brazen power grab.
5
It also means that Democrats in Texas are about to lose any say that they have in a lot of elections, and it'll move Texas' elected officials to the right. The arguments I'm making here are designed to persuade Republicans, but the same thing is true in reverse.
6
Just to be explicit about it: Republicans have already done this in places like North Carolina and Texas. But this is a question of how you win over Republican voters, who will need the most convincing on this issue.
7
Everyone agrees that solving problems is good! The question, of course, is a) what those problems actually are, and b) what the solutions look like.
8
By the way: the same thing may very well be true in the 2028 Democratic primary, though [a lot of the proposed candidates](https://substack.com/redirect/907bd1d7-f5b7-4010-8027-acf4622c7ff2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) are already more moderate in disposition.
9
Let's be clear: there are [plenty](https://substack.com/redirect/f9e307d0-172d-45a2-866d-1770a198b2f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [of](https://substack.com/redirect/d5563408-4d9d-407d-b45a-5877326e3a12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [batty](https://substack.com/redirect/23915404-20c9-4fcd-b907-117d72ffa730?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [things](https://substack.com/redirect/d123a016-7017-4acd-8665-4a22febb964a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) he's done too. Banning [water fluoridation](https://substack.com/redirect/60018e5a-64fd-40b4-9dd8-4b3bd5ff0e29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in particular is crazy, and giving in to the worst of anti-science hysteria.
10
In the time since I started drafting this article, courts ruled that [Utah's congressional maps violated a provision of the state constitution](https://substack.com/redirect/77135919-09ac-4127-9f5c-809f69b07eca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that prohibits gerrymandering. So half of this may be in the works anyway!
11
An 18th state, Mississippi, theoretically allows for this by [gathering a certain number of signatures in five of the state's Congressional districts](https://substack.com/redirect/5e9425c5-cb92-4faf-876f-a3d2ee71548e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But in a wild absurdity, the state only has four Congressional districts. So in practice, the right doesn't exist.

---

But we shouldn't let a good crisis go to waste,1 and there are opportunities to ride this wave of discontent and anger--on both sides of the aisle--to make things better. ? Article summary: Ranked-choice voting got pummeled in 2024 elections. But states like California and Texas are making an extremely compelling case for why it 's more important than ever. Gerrymandering wars are creating a lane for the rare practical, sensible politician --if they choose to take advantage. I could envision residents in states across the U.S. taking up ballot measures to push for nonpartisan redistricting. It's not as simple as "red" and "blue" states By shorthand, we refer to places like California and New York as "Democratic states," and we refer to places like Texas and Florida as "Republican states."2 But that is, of course, an oversimplification. California has the second-most Republicans of any state in the country, and Texas has the second-most Democrats. Florida has the fourth-most Democrats; New York has the fourth-most Republicans. Here's a back-of-the-envelope rundown of the states with the most Republicans and Democrats.3 | | ---|---|--- The ten states with the most Republicans are also the ten states with the most Democrats, in a slightly different order. Why? These are all really big states, and 40% or 45% of a really large number is still a large number. , I think California is justified in retaliating against what's happening in Texas, but the impact is that they're disenfranchising Republicans in the nation's second-most Republican state--exactly what Texas is doing to Democrats right now. , and it feeds into that narrative of a broken political system. Even among Republicans, only 66% approve--that's surprisingly low, given the partisan edge it'll ostensibly generate.4 Where's the opportunity? California and Illinois are making an extremely compelling argument for how we change the Republican narrative around ranked-choice voting. A renewed push for ranked-choice voting I've been a long-time supporter of ranked-choice voting; I think it'd help mitigate a lot of the intense partisanship we're dealing with as a country. It's something I've worked on and something I wrote about leading into the '24 elections: | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | October 22, 2024 | Despite that "the political system is working extremely or very well," reforms like ranked-choice voting that'd improve our political system last year. Some of that is because it's become a partisan issue. than Democrats, and have banned ranked-choice voting. What's the opportunity? Here's the argument I'd be making to win over Republicans on ranked-choice voting. Because most districts aren't competitive, . That number is about to go up, which means that Republicans in California are about to lose any say that they have in elections, and it'll push elected officials in California to the left.5 Ranked-choice voting would give politicians a reason to care about voters in the minority party. States where Democratic-led gerrymanders are on the table--which include California, New York, and Illinois--functionally strip voting power away from Republicans in states that have some of the largest Republican populations.6 That should outrage Republicans! Of course, confidence in Congress is--as it usually is--. There's a chance to reset the narrative here, since the country is paying more attention right now to how , not the other way around. I listen to enough conservative talk radio to know that this sort of narrative shift won't happen overnight. But there is an opening, with so many voters having their voting power further diminished. Opportunity for sensible governors to own that lane , 94% of Americans agree that, "It is important that both Democrats and Republicans come together to solve the problems that are facing America." On the one hand, it's a meaningless question; of course people believe that parties should work together.7 But: if you look at the roster of people who are possible '28 Republican nominees, there are a : Greg Abbott, Steve Bannon, Tucker Carlson, Ted Cruz, Eric Trump, JD Vance, the list goes on. All of that is to say that if a lot of those people run, even in a Republican primary, there may be a lane for someone with bipartisan bona fides.8 , who as more moderate than most Republican governors.9 Could Cox and, say, New Mexico Democratic Governor come together to end gerrymandering in their states?10 Both states are gerrymandered; both have similar numbers of seats. A partnership between Democratic and Republican governors might help lower the temperature on what has become the country 's hottest issue. Call me an optimist, but with 50 U.S. Governors, I think someone in their ranks might be willing to give this a try--if not because it's good policy, then because it might advance their self-interest. Citizens can push for change themselves in 20+ states And if all else fails: A handful of others (but not constitutional amendments). Across the country, because of gerrymandering, states are creating less competitive elections. All of a sudden, a lot of people whose votes used to matter will matter a lot less. , and I think--and hope--that there could be some backlash in the form of citizen-led constitutional amendments. It's obviously a bad situation all around. But it's not totally hopeless--that is, if we can get creative and be aggressive, and if our elected officials grow a spine. name: Lauren Groh-Wargo, Fair Fight Action
subject: Do you have a question for an expert on tracking and stopping autocracy?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
This is part of informing our collective fight for democracy. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114067081/565851737/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250827_T1_RuthBenGhiatE1_v1s2&source=bsc_emm_ffa_20250827_T1_RuthBenGhiatE1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFhYjQxMS00NTgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1QQJ6vXFe34lgqQOMELIUKZZkoKU1jyTvl8DHuIOLMc=&emci=9759d651-a782-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ac1ab411-4583-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277)

| | You might not think it’s calming to read about autocracy. But I’m here to tell you that when I read the work of Ruth Ben-Ghiat — a Professor of History and Italian Studies at New York University, and an acclaimed expert on authoritarianism and fascism — I feel more settled. That’s because I feel more prepared for the battles ahead. For decades, Professor Ben-Ghiat has studied the tools and practices of autocrats. She’s outlined their playbook in rigorous detail. And when we understand the ins and outs of a playbook, we know how to dismantle it. That’s empowering. So here are a few pieces of recommended reading: Her book _[**Strongmen: Mussolini to the Present**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114067082/565851738/293958562?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250827_T1_RuthBenGhiatE1_v1s2&source=bsc_emm_ffa_20250827_T1_RuthBenGhiatE1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFhYjQxMS00NTgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1QQJ6vXFe34lgqQOMELIUKZZkoKU1jyTvl8DHuIOLMc=&emci=9759d651-a782-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ac1ab411-4583-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277)_ (see if your local library has a copy) A recent Substack essay of hers: “[**Is America an Autocracy Now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114067083/565851739/-603584564?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250827_T1_RuthBenGhiatE1_v1s2&source=bsc_emm_ffa_20250827_T1_RuthBenGhiatE1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFhYjQxMS00NTgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1QQJ6vXFe34lgqQOMELIUKZZkoKU1jyTvl8DHuIOLMc=&emci=9759d651-a782-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ac1ab411-4583-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277)” And another she wrote: “[**What Sen. Booker’s Speech Teaches Us About Effective Resistance Strategy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114067084/565851741/377867584?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250827_T1_RuthBenGhiatE1_v1s2&source=bsc_emm_ffa_20250827_T1_RuthBenGhiatE1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFhYjQxMS00NTgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1QQJ6vXFe34lgqQOMELIUKZZkoKU1jyTvl8DHuIOLMc=&emci=9759d651-a782-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ac1ab411-4583-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277)” Don’t miss this powerful quote from that last piece: _“Authoritarians want us to feel hopeless and helpless. It’s up to us to show them that we will not**submit quietly and that we believe in struggle and collective action.”**_ **To inform our collective fight for democracy, the Fair Fight Action team is gathering questions from our community for Professor Ben-Ghiat. And she’ll be able to answer a few in an upcoming email.** [**Is there something you’d like to ask an expert on tracking and thwarting the plots of would-be dictators? Submit your question for Professor Ruth Ben-Ghiat today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114067085/565851742/-1440599904?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250827_T1_RuthBenGhiatE1_v1s2&source=bsc_emm_ffa_20250827_T1_RuthBenGhiatE1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFhYjQxMS00NTgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1QQJ6vXFe34lgqQOMELIUKZZkoKU1jyTvl8DHuIOLMc=&emci=9759d651-a782-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ac1ab411-4583-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277) And thank you for being on this team. By joining and fueling our shared fight for free and fair elections, you’ve already exercised one of the forms of solidarity that has defeated autocracy in the past — and that will again in the future. It’s on us to defend democracy. And this movement is up to the task. Together, Lauren Groh-Wargo

clean_body: This is part of informing our collective fight for democracy. | | | You might not think it’s calming to read about autocracy. But I’m here to tell you that when I read the work of Ruth Ben-Ghiat — a Professor of History and Italian Studies at New York University, and an acclaimed expert on authoritarianism and fascism — I feel more settled. That’s because I feel more prepared for the battles ahead. For decades, Professor Ben-Ghiat has studied the tools and practices of autocrats. She’s outlined their playbook in rigorous detail. And when we understand the ins and outs of a playbook, we know how to dismantle it. That’s empowering. So here are a few pieces of recommended reading: Her book (see if your local library has a copy) A recent Substack essay of hers: “” And another she wrote: “” Don’t miss this powerful quote from that last piece: “Authoritarians want us to feel hopeless and helpless. It’s up to us to show them that we will notsubmit quietly and that we believe in struggle and collective action.” To inform our collective fight for democracy, the Fair Fight Action team is gathering questions from our community for Professor Ben-Ghiat. And she’ll be able to answer a few in an upcoming email. And thank you for being on this team. By joining and fueling our shared fight for free and fair elections, you’ve already exercised one of the forms of solidarity that has defeated autocracy in the past — and that will again in the future. It’s on us to defend democracy. And this movement is up to the task. Together, Lauren Groh-Wargo CEO, Fair Fight Action | = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsnu031j7nh6pb8efdrskkijm265jpggdoe6m1a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi6cp34cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zr738kgn045teosi2gaoose3pmdjlv8ndccf92io_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi6cp34cdh2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgdsrq8q2ve97e8v9r6dtsm070uravt19earkcv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi6cp34cdh2bs)
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z90n3abf3tq93c0ct4khhn4q9103qp6jkoot3f68_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi6cp34cdh2bs)
__
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za0of48agakfsekppjqse9m2ln6li4u92fpqfiso_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi6cp34cdh2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdp75bq06eu2t1ng12rivhlma8eb86n2gimn16b0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi6cp34cdh2bs)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---

---
Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
---

---

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: We’re fired up! We won’t take it any more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
It’s time to rally around working families—and take back our future.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K3NRZJHGRNS49WFM7TX5HW3M_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K3NRZJHGRNS49WFM7TX5HW3M_1)
---
| | | | Peter, The Trump circus is back in town—and it’s louder and more dangerous than ever. From attacks on our democracy to the militarization of our nation’s capital to meetings with Putin, all the chaos is designed to distract, divide and exhaust us. But here in Tennessee, we refuse to look away from what really matters. Because while the cameras chase headlines, working families continue to struggle. Our kids are being shortchanged. Our rights are under attack. And the Republican supermajority is wasting time on culture wars instead of solving real problems. That’s why the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus is staying laser-focused on what’s most important: ✅ Fighting for working families and living wages
✅ Expanding Medicaid and protecting rural hospitals
✅ Fully funding public education—not vouchers and privatization
✅ Defending reproductive freedom and civil rights
✅ Restoring accountability and transparency in our state government
✅ Protecting our democracy from extremist overreach
We’re fired up—and we’re ready to fight. But we can’t do it without you. ** ** **This moment demands action. Every single dollar you give fuels organizing, messaging, and resistance in every corner of our state.**
** ** We’re building a movement that puts people first. And it starts today. Right now.
---
| | [ Chip in now to power this fight ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K3NRZJHGRNS49WFM7TX5HW3M_2)
---
| Together, we _will_ rise above the noise. We _will_ reclaim our power. And we _will_ build a better Tennessee.
In solidarity,
**Tennessee House Democratic Caucus**

---
| | | |
---
| _Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Cold hard, FACTS you won't see on FOX
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Thank you for your attention to this matter!

We have been getting a lot of attention on Fox News lately, but here are some cold, hard FACTS you won't hear on that network.
💰 Middle class families in California pay LESS in taxes than in states like Texas, Oklahoma, and Arkansas.
👷 50 million of the 52 million jobs created since the Cold War have been created in Democratic administrations. Republican presidents have one thing in common: recession.
🔴 Life expectancy, infant mortality, deaths of despair, wages and uninsured rates are all worse off in red states.
🚨 For Greg Abbott: California is the fourth largest economy in the WORLD. We contribute $83 billion to the federal government while Texas takes $71 billion.
🥇 California is #1 in manufacturing, #1 in farming, #1 in new business starts, #1 in tech and VC investments, #1 in Fortune 500 companies, and the #1 public higher education system in the country.
👨👩👧👧 California has some of the strongest gun laws in the country and as a result has a 43% lower gun death rate than the rest of the U.S. according to data from the CDC while President Trump oversaw the largest spike in homicides recorded in U.S. history.
😡 Republicans across the country are fanning the flames of culture wars to distract from the fact that on health, wealth, and economic outcomes they are failing.
🗳️ When Democrats go on OFFENSE, we WIN.
THANK YOU FOR YOUR ATTENTION TO THIS MATTER,
Gavin Newsom
* * *
i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸
I have heard the calls do "Do something!" and I agree. If Texas wants to redraw their maps, California will fight fire with fire.
God help us if we're not successful. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House; going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges and the free press... We have to act.
[**Please make a contribution to help us get it done. The amount isn't as important as the donation itself. I need to know you're with me as we press forward.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250827&refcode2=2500_4767699_hp6nlc&akid=2500%2E4767699%2Ehp6nlc)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em250827&refcode2=2500_4767699_hp6nlc&akid=2500%2E4767699%2Ehp6nlc)**
---

---

Paid for by The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee. Committee Top Funders: Newsom for California – Governor 2022, House Majority PAC, Bill Bloomfield.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpmr7suuehjlhpsc78pqigjt9tooudd0k10prlho_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi62o34clh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2bdjue7j2d2qqk3u6hhd4f94ekfjo0j3k3pqdm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi62o34clh2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z54tsj6u94fod24ibhqioj453jra29spfk2uue1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi62o34clh2bs)
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcv4f8odt2n3opb00dmt0bnifsd6106c4njrkul8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi62o34clh2bs)
__
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0vuqvecdh8d8644fihm2ira98in0ju2rio9fd0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi62o34clh2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znuff8lidd8p4btenq6f1j7fnfdo5l5tg8nfaug8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi62o34clh2bs)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---

---

---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Bo Mitchell
subject: Here’s why we’ve set a big goal this month.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bo Mitchell for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114072491/565869022/1330170104?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_EOM1_250827_all_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2M5ZGZmNTAtNDc4My1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Nl86bf1qkAEQbk74Wead4OUhlD7TCyqg7S0-n_Beq-k=)

| | Peter,

In a matter of just a few months, voters in Tennessee’s 7th Congressional District will be heading to the polls to pick the person who will replace runaway Republican Mark Green—and we’re prepping now to reach people all over the district.

To keep building the campaign we’ll need to win and show we’re ready to take on the far-right machine that will spend big to hold this seat, we’ve set a goal to raise $5,000 by the end of the month.

[_**Will you chip in now to help us hit our goal and build a campaign that’s ready to win?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114072493/565869023/646698565?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_EOM1_250827_all_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2M5ZGZmNTAtNDc4My1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Nl86bf1qkAEQbk74Wead4OUhlD7TCyqg7S0-n_Beq-k=)

It’s ambitious—but so is the task ahead of us.

**This is one of just a handful of open-seat races in the country this year—and Republicans are already pouring dark money into it. They’re counting on a low-turnout special election and a cash advantage in their SuperPACs to keep this seat red.**

But we know better. We know Tennesseans are ready for a representative who will fight for public schools, affordable health care, good jobs, and a government that puts people first—not politics.

[_**We’ve got 4 days left to hit this goal—and it starts with you. Every grassroots donation helps us reach people at the doors, fund our digital ads, and compete district-wide. Chip in now >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114072495/565869024/646698565?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_EOM1_250827_all_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2M5ZGZmNTAtNDc4My1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Nl86bf1qkAEQbk74Wead4OUhlD7TCyqg7S0-n_Beq-k=)

Thanks for being with us from the start.

— Bo Mitchell ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114072497/565869025/646698565?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_EOM1_250827_all_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2M5ZGZmNTAtNDc4My1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Nl86bf1qkAEQbk74Wead4OUhlD7TCyqg7S0-n_Beq-k=)**** ****

It’s a strategic move that could determine the balance of power in the Senate – and the future of the America First movement. The man President Trump just endorsed is a warrior. But he can’t win this fight alone. The Liberal Cabal is already mobilizing – pouring millions into targeted attacks and dark money operations to crush this campaign before it begins. clean_body: | | | Peter, President Trump made his decision. I’ve made mine. And now... we’re waiting on you. This isn’t a routine announcement. It’s a strategic move that could determine the balance of power in the Senate – and the future of the America First movement. The man President Trump just endorsed is a warrior. But he can’t win this fight alone. The Liberal Cabal is already mobilizing – pouring millions into targeted attacks and dark money operations to crush this campaign before it begins. We’ve all endorsed him. I’m not exaggerating when I say your endorsement might be the most important one left. You were identified for a reason. You’re one of the few we trust to finish this job. There’s no room for hesitation. The future is on the line. For the fight, JD Vance Vice President of the United States | | Paid for by Rogers for Senate. |

Trump’s attacks on mail-in voting are just the latest in his scheme to upend our democracy.
In 2020, he tried to toss out our votes in the presidential election and fanned the flames of the violent Jan. 6 insurrection at the Capitol.
Now, he’s pushing for massive Republican gerrymanders in states like Texas and working to make it even harder for us to vote— _sowing even more doubt in our elections in the process._
I’ve fought to secure our elections before as a voting rights lawyer, and I’ll never stop standing up for the right to vote in this country—no matter what Donald Trump and his Republican allies try to throw our way.
[**I’m working to ensure every eligible American has the right to use their voice at the ballot box. I’ll never give up on our democracy—and I need your support. body:
We are working to change that. | | |

---
Hi Peter,

National studies continue to rank Oklahoma as one of the worst states (if not THE worst state) for women. Oklahoma has the highest rates of domestic violence and the worst maternal death rates nationwide. They have one of the strictest abortion bans in the country, with no exceptions for rape or incest. Most recently, in the aftermath of Trump’s so-called Big Beautiful Bill, over half of Oklahoma's rural hospitals are at risk of closing.

Unsurprisingly, they are among the states with the lowest women’s representation in their state government. We are working to change that, which is why we are thrilled to officially announce a very exciting endorsement:

**We are proud to endorse Cyndi Munson for GOVERNOR of Oklahoma!**

Cyndi flipped a majority Republican district and kept it for the last 10 years while increasing her margins election after election. She accomplished this by knocking on doors, having honest conversations, and staying true to her values.

[**As women across Oklahoma endure harsh conditions inflicted on them by their majority-male government, we can help make an actual difference for them in their state. Now is the time to rush EARLY support to ensure Cyndi’s campaign can keep up momentum through 2026. Will you help us bring pro-women leadership to Oklahoma by rushing a split donation of $20.25 or more today? →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-cyndi/?refcode=EM_F_250823Cyndi_N_CD_90DO_11_G_N_L1&amount=20.25)

As Governor, Cyndi will repeal the abortion ban in her state. As she has been traveling across the state meeting with voters, she’s found that voters on both sides of the aisle feel that the current anti-abortion laws do not meet their values and instead prevent women from getting the care they need.

**Additionally, birth control is at risk (!!!).** While debating a bill to make it easier for women to obtain contraceptives, an OK Republican State Senator, Dusty Deevers, stated that birth control “induces the abortion or murder of a human embryo” and argued that **women’s brains shrink while on birth control.** This is one of the men making laws about women’s bodies in Oklahoma. 🤯

**Women need a champion in Oklahoma.** According to the 2024 March of Dimes report, 51.9% of Oklahomans do not have access to maternity healthcare, and an additional 18.2% have low/moderate access to healthcare.

**As Governor, Cyndi wants to increase access to maternity healthcare for women across the state, and fully eliminate these healthcare deserts through legislation that would support increased funding for hospitals and assist in the recruitment of doctors who specialize in women’s healthcare.**

Here’s the thing: We’ve seen Democratic Governors win in “red” states – despite having Republican supermajorities in their State Houses and Senate chambers. Kentucky and Kansas, for example, both elected popular Democratic Governors. Cyndi has been building the momentum needed in her state to get the job done. If anyone can do it, it’s her.

[**Cyndi will serve as a deeply needed champion for the women of her state. You can rush critical early support by chipping in a split $20.25 or more contribution between Her Bold Move and Cyndi’s campaign today. →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-cyndi/?refcode=EM_F_250823Cyndi_N_CD_90DO_11_G_N_L1&amount=20.25)

Thank you,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Betrayed by My Own
body:
I'm James O'Keefe, and right now, my heart aches as I write this. I built Project Veritas with my bare hands, risking my freedom and dedicating my life to shining light on evil.

| [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztj058npt9jd0v2l4p30qvqklo1a7eu90ldfl0mo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi6ao72cph2bs)
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6ff2bm9h506lfbfbvnf5g0d3ve3qnun1oq584gg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi6ao72cph2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and right now, my heart aches as I write this.

I built Project Veritas with my bare hands, **risking my freedom and dedicating my life to shining light on evil.**

It was more than a job - **it was my calling**.

Then, they fired me, the founder, and hit me with a lawsuit to bury me and [**I need your help to keep going.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zse5uvljj6s7kvpl04829tlobacmde72sknabtd8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi6ao72cph2bs)

This betrayal has tried my soul like nothing else, pitting pure good against profound evil in a war for truth.

**But justice is stirring.**

On July 15, a federal judge ordered their former Chief of Staff to sit for a face-to-face videotaped deposition. **He fought it on July 26 over embarrassment fears, but lost on August 13**. This step could expose the darkness within their ranks.

To push forward, [**we must fund this deposition**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2m1ck0kmk1sd4fttj9dmlm2dh1r102be23tig88_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi6ao72cph2bs) - the fees, the prep, the battle.

**Your gift today fuels the good in this epic struggle.[**Please donate and help me win**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf5quh8llgvpvoq9jtlaont5de4qig38dvd1a7fo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi6ao72cph2bs).**

With gratitude and resolve,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvbj20t6aufdqfmt3n89v4u0esipmbs0qem56q88_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi6ao72cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31c3jm4p74s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhb25f9i4q0naskq859f2mohuufcglin1tohmrco_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi6ao72cph2bs)_

name: Team Haley Stevens
subject: Michigan's students deserve so much better than this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Take our new public education poll by midnight

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=699%2E49239%2EwrYCNk)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5005?t=2&akid=699%2E49239%2EwrYCNk)
---
It’s back-to-school season, but too many students and teachers in Michigan are already at a disadvantage.

**Why?** Because the Trump administration has pushed _devastating_ federal cuts to education – and the consequences? 👇
📉 Fewer resources for teachers and classrooms

🍎 Decreased support for students with disabilities

🧠 Reduced access to mental health care in schools

🧪 Lost investments in STEM fields

🏫 And a higher gap in the quality of education between schools – especially in working-class communities
At a time when we should be investing _more_ in our children, Trump’s chaos agenda is gutting public education.
**[But we want to know what YOU think, null. We need 75 responses from 18326 by midnight, so take our one-click poll ASAP:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5006?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=699%2E49239%2EwrYCNk)**
**Do you approve of the Trump administration's cuts to education?**
| | | [YES](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5006?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=699%2E49239%2EwrYCNk)
---
| [NO](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5006?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=699%2E49239%2EwrYCNk)
---
In solidarity,

Team Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5007?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=699%2E49239%2EwrYCNk) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5005?t=7&akid=699%2E49239%2EwrYCNk)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my caign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=8&akid=699%2E49239%2EwrYCNk)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Betrayed by My Own
body:
I'm James O'Keefe, and right now, my heart aches as I write this. I built Project Veritas with my bare hands, risking my freedom and dedicating my life to shining light on evil.

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbfm40j1228f66gr02oj4epc8oflcvnlb9ergqs0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi66pr4clh2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zehbhsbkm2d5hdmokregrkpief414j8gqd3cti6o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi66pr4clh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and right now, my heart aches as I write this.

I built Project Veritas with my bare hands, **risking my freedom and dedicating my life to shining light on evil.**

It was more than a job - **it was my calling**.

Then, they fired me, the founder, and hit me with a lawsuit to bury me and [**I need your help to keep going.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs6pt5j12o3877b1uvo2e11v6si1vtgikjd47bh8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi66pr4clh2bs)

This betrayal has tried my soul like nothing else, pitting pure good against profound evil in a war for truth.

**But justice is stirring.**

On July 15, a federal judge ordered their former Chief of Staff to sit for a face-to-face videotaped deposition. **He fought it on July 26 over embarrassment fears, but lost on August 13**. This step could expose the darkness within their ranks.

To push forward, [**we must fund this deposition**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z07gqsro3tm48outbruiddss4aho9itlkff99mr8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi66pr4clh2bs) - the fees, the prep, the battle.

**Your gift today fuels the good in this epic struggle.[**Please donate and help me win**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5djm6ba7emgusqa2hk81obkadi2tdkrcj8phlp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi66pr4clh2bs).**

With gratitude and resolve,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zggfbvpt7871hovu8v8t44if9tkkvpnmol31l2s8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi66pr4clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob0stj64pr24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6oo24m1ih0pvo65htlnf1kjhpcq2pa4ff58d5r0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cpi66pr4clh2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjsqns320h5nelmuthq0gdavgc415kr77q7fovt8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr5cdj68or7chim49fg)

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1062&refcode=email-20250827_v&akid=9252%2E5885482%2ExlS4h2 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

As Trump ramps up his authoritarian takeover, the oligarchs are
celebrating right alongside him.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33722?source=email-20250827&t=1112&akid=9252%2E5885482%2ExlS4h2 ]Headline: Meet the billionaires profiting the most from Trump's
draconian policies

Billionaires like Palantir’s Peter Thiel are getting richer by the second
thanks to Trump’s deportation and surveillance regime, while using their
massive influence to demand deregulation and massive tax breaks.

We HAVE to fight back. Which is why this weekend, Our Revolution is
bringing the fight right to the doorsteps of America’s ultra-wealthy.

Our team is joining our coalition of allies in the Hamptons – the
playground of billionaires – where we’ll rally, march, and send an
unmistakable message: the people are rising up against oligarchic rule.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1108&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250827nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9252%2E5885482%2ExlS4h2 ]Will you chip in whatever you can right now to fuel our anti-oligarch
actions in the Hamptons and across the country?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1093&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250827nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9252%2E5885482%2ExlS4h2 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1094&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250827nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9252%2E5885482%2ExlS4h2 ]CHIP IN $22

Earlier this summer, billionaires and oligarchs rejoiced as Trump and his
MAGA Republicans rammed through massive tax giveaways for the
ultra-wealthy – paid for by slashing health care and nutrition assistance
for millions.

Now, as families struggle to put food on the table and cover skyrocketing
health care costs, America’s 1% will spend Labor Day weekend sipping
cocktails behind gated mansions, untouched by the crises they helped
create.

That’s why Our Revolution is mobilizing to burst the billionaire bubble by
showing up to protest at their doorsteps. Across the country, our
organizers are coming together, confronting the billionaire class, and
pressuring elected officials to stand with their constituents over
corporate donors.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33722?source=email-20250827&t=1111&akid=9252%2E5885482%2ExlS4h2 ]Photo of Our Revolution protest

These powerful protests aren’t funded by Wall Street or Silicon Valley
moguls. They’re powered by $10, $25, $50 at a time from people like you.
This fight to take back our democracy means going toe-to-toe with the
richest and most powerful interests in America – and that takes resources.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33253?t=1105&amount=22&refcode=email-20250827nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9252%2E5885482%2ExlS4h2 ]Will you donate now to fuel our protests in the Hamptons and beyond – and

When we organize, we win.

name: Eileen Filler-Corn
subject: What I’ve been working on lately
body:
| | | | Hi Peter,
I sincerely hope this email update finds you healthy. It is hard to believe we are almost at Labor Day. I wanted to take a moment to share what I've been up to since my last update, both politically and professionally.
On the political front, I had the honor of co-hosting an event for Abigail Spanberger as she campaigns for Governor. It was a tremendously successful event, and I am proud to support her in her campaign for Governor. I enjoyed catching up with many of you and reconnecting with many friends and supporters. [Get involved with her campaign ->](https://fhfislgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D3S6hm-F42wTYOrnUThNwM6qHm7pYmkxvC57thyyRJb2XKQeevjfk2hSJKGenUrTSCOX66XkjaZMTwJoJtv5HrJaosZvRDyD3WevkRlh-klMrr597NR6bol9iPQSFuWW02PeznKZB4Y30uCfUhdUiYGGRzcBSLMvOq9yYOBBaYkPdNlR-13AkQ==&c=rznw5UQf0_bDmishGc5LHQyuzvN1dZZclV7LKtazBpK0TO8BD1ok8Q==&ch=hoQmss6Ngvy74OI8xd6pavfuspl3XVmDqQeiFogkkJPl6sEUjW8REg==)
I'm also lending my strong support to James Walkinshaw in the upcoming special election on September 9th in Virginia's 11th Congressional District. As an early endorser of James and a long-time friend, I am thrilled to support him for Congress. This is a critical race, and I know James will bring the kind of thoughtful, results-oriented leadership our community deserves as he succeeds our incredible Congressman Gerry Connolly. [To support his campaign, chip in here ->](https://fhfislgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D3S6hm-F42wTYOrnUThNwM6qHm7pYmkxvC57thyyRJb2XKQeevjfk2hSJKGenUrTGtwJMsrUuiSNJKquD_rghnugPwP9MTJ_tbVgPhg_rbqa9vWU7IszAjJK66IT5ycToypiw3-AcYtOA_KBdMeLRZYOcb4d6_b1i-z7Jecflu67gBCcumrffLOpuaeOgjO0LvPH3eo-Xyq4NZdwBTP1Jp117iV98mZN&c=rznw5UQf0_bDmishGc5LHQyuzvN1dZZclV7LKtazBpK0TO8BD1ok8Q==&ch=hoQmss6Ngvy74OI8xd6pavfuspl3XVmDqQeiFogkkJPl6sEUjW8REg==)
Like so many of us, I also remain deeply concerned about what Donald Trump is doing throughout the country and world, but also right here in Washington, D.C. His recent actions are an abuse of power that undermines the safety of not just D.C. residents but the entire DMV region. Our communities are interconnected, and reckless policies that destabilize one part of the region inevitably harm us all. I will continue to raise my voice to ensure our values of safety, fairness, and respect for democratic institutions are defended.
Much of my time has also been devoted to my work at EFC Strategies LLC. My clients include non-profits, corporations, educational organizations, charitable foundations, and start-ups. EFC Strategies LLC provides a variety of services on behalf of these clients, including association management, general consulting and advising, political and strategic management, and economic development support.
This summer has been very busy as I represented clients at the Democratic Governors Association meetings, the National Governors Association annual meeting, and the National Conference of State Legislatures annual meeting, just to name a few. I have been on the road and racking up the travel miles all summer, and I still have several upcoming association meetings to attend in support of my clients this fall.
As you well know, fighting antisemitism and calling it out wherever we see it (which unfortunately is prevalent), supporting the return of the Oct. 7 hostages, advocating for increased funding for security grants for religious institutions, and building stronger communities nationwide are priorities for me -- especially in this moment.
I also remain very involved in politics and our community, serving on several nonprofit boards. I am excited to share three upcoming events. I want to respectfully ask if you would consider supporting one or more:

* I am joining Rebecca Geller and Brad Cheney in co-hosting a fundraiser for James Walkinshaw on Tuesday, September 2, from 5:30 - 7:00 PM in Fairfax Station. I'd love for you to join us at this critical and family-friendly event (kids welcome)! [You can RSVP or contribute here.](https://fhfislgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D3S6hm-F42wTYOrnUThNwM6qHm7pYmkxvC57thyyRJb2XKQeevjfk2hSJKGenUrToIURXKXYH8meO1i_p3LSFymber00ZikoNfbj7Pe8sLTTG5R53Ugf46Rs1LZ4LF4ph02z0tO6pPaPOEnZQAyqMm3kUCCaBeecCEpRUBLT_oQLMbH9ScYDKMXI9oQ4OgkKxgBmmlO3nmzj01DE9aBJ_OODnfdYtPq8&c=rznw5UQf0_bDmishGc5LHQyuzvN1dZZclV7LKtazBpK0TO8BD1ok8Q==&ch=hoQmss6Ngvy74OI8xd6pavfuspl3XVmDqQeiFogkkJPl6sEUjW8REg==)
* I am a Co-Host of the 2025 JCRC of Greater Washington Annual Gala, a special evening to celebrate the vital work of the Jewish Community Relations Council. [You can learn more here.](https://fhfislgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D3S6hm-F42wTYOrnUThNwM6qHm7pYmkxvC57thyyRJb2XKQeevjfk2hSJKGenUrTQ6SFEG-9Bc2NHeyHPNkQypylLJYUx-1TDGuqBo4Sxg2prlZbq0Ej6RRDHXv5BHpfhrmsZwVTfnxrNxWnGNm7qVtSIOktPpjrutT93QmPF4jPHSnlX8vF_g==&c=rznw5UQf0_bDmishGc5LHQyuzvN1dZZclV7LKtazBpK0TO8BD1ok8Q==&ch=hoQmss6Ngvy74OI8xd6pavfuspl3XVmDqQeiFogkkJPl6sEUjW8REg==)
* As a proud board member of ArtsFairfax, I'd love for you to join me at their upcoming fundraiser on October 24th. Supporting the arts is critical to ensuring Fairfax County remains a vibrant, inclusive community for all. [Learn more here.](https://fhfislgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D3S6hm-F42wTYOrnUThNwM6qHm7pYmkxvC57thyyRJb2XKQeevjfk2hSJKGenUrTwsfD-Nm2l4_9POuW5UETbT4f4uKnj8UddRDmZ63TwEFHMFmYhL5h63NS6KTdlsiZfMb-Y7UKjoibaQgR6PCRQeNA1X7m21kl&c=rznw5UQf0_bDmishGc5LHQyuzvN1dZZclV7LKtazBpK0TO8BD1ok8Q==&ch=hoQmss6Ngvy74OI8xd6pavfuspl3XVmDqQeiFogkkJPl6sEUjW8REg==)

As always, I welcome the opportunity to hear how you are doing. Please let me know if you would like to schedule a call, Zoom, or meet for coffee.
Thank you for staying connected with me. Whether through politics, advocacy, or community service, I remain grateful for your friendship and support.
Sincerely yours,
Eileen

---
| | | | Energized for Change | P.O. Box 523082 | Springfield, VA 22152 US
---

name: Ohio Democrats
subject: ⚠️ Loser LaRose begins ANOTHER voter purge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114085415/565904107/98733755?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_EOM2_250827_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWJiZjY2OC00ZjgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jYh3_RczpHhGdVIPqqOC_I1gNbkq5SBuL-2M1vuPbrw=) **Loser LaRose is at it again, team: he’s unveiled a new plan to purge hundreds of thousands of Ohioans from the voter rolls over the next four years.**

LaRose is known for shady moves like this. Remember when he rewrote the abortion rights amendment ballot language to confuse voters? This time, he’s resorting to blatant disenfranchisement.

This is a targeted voter suppression tactic straight out of the MAGA playbook. It’s designed to silence working families, young people, and communities of color – the very voters who want to hold the GOP accountable at the ballot box next year.

Loser LaRose knows if Ohioans turn out at the polls in 2026, Republicans lose. This isn’t about “cleaning up the voter rolls.” **_It’s about rigging the game before one of the most consequential elections of our lifetime._**

clean_body: | = Loser LaRose is at it again, team: he’s unveiled a new plan to purge hundreds of thousands of Ohioans from the voter rolls over the next four years. LaRose is known for shady moves like this. Remember when he rewrote the abortion rights amendment ballot language to confuse voters? This time, he’s resorting to blatant disenfranchisement. This is a targeted voter suppression tactic straight out of the MAGA playbook. It’s designed to silence working families, young people, and communities of color – the very voters who want to hold the GOP accountable at the ballot box next year. Loser LaRose knows if Ohioans turn out at the polls in 2026, Republicans lose. This isn’t about “cleaning up the voter rolls.” It’s about rigging the game before one of the most consequential elections of our lifetime. We need to contact Ohio voters who are set to be purged to ensure they’ll be able to update their information and remain registered to vote. But we need your help, and it's urgent. = _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Ohio Dems = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

body:
We’ll win this race together.

Peter, our mission is clear: _Stand up for the American people who are being pushed aside in favor of billionaires and corporations._
Elected leaders need to stand for something more than a political party or personal power. Our people deserve nothing less than leaders who will do everything possible to make their lives better.
_That’s why I’m running for Senate._
**[This is the most competitive Senate election of 2026 — and The Hill is already calling it the #1 most likely to flip. Join me in taking on the GOP and split a donation between me and Heartland Patriots to our campaign here >>>](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94025?refcode=em20250827-9316&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9316%2E614464%2EzXtGeb)**
Look, politicians in Washington are not serving their constituents — the millions of Americans just trying to get by day in and day out. They’re serving Donald Trump and the billionaires he wants to befriend.
**I will take them on.**
I will speak up for the people and speak out when those in power do us harm. I will defend the rights Americans hold dear and the democracy that is at the very core of who we are.
I am deeply grateful for the thousands of supporters who have stepped up in the last few days. Your enthusiasm, courage, and commitment to our shared cause is inspiring. **You are the reason I believe that our best days are ahead of us, Peter — but only if we stop the damage that’s happening now.**

name: DemsGive
subject: FEMA workers punished for warning Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Protect Our Democracy Fund
body:
They signed a letter. The next day, they were locked out of their jobs.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K3NY42X1FZHE3S41KNGK933A_0)
---
| | | | Hey Peter, More than 180 FEMA workers signed an open letter warning that Trump’s overhaul of the agency could lead to catastrophic disaster response failures. The next day, several were placed on administrative leave. Their email access was revoked. They were ordered not to contact coworkers. The message is clear. Speak out, and you are out. This moment echoes what happened after Hurricane Katrina. But this time, the warning is coming before the next disaster. [**Read the full story**](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K3NY42X1FZHE3S41KNGK933A_1)[ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K3NY42X1FZHE3S41KNGK933A_2) More soon, Andy
DemsGive.org

name: Dan Osborn
subject: I’ll be the 51st vote in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
People like me aren't supposed to run for office
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114086688/565907212/358649031?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5590-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWUzMmFmMS01MDgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TS3Jzz5ZC-iRJmn_DBMUBi1I0CccepEzVpp1BE6Vgi0=)
Hello,
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate against billionaire Republican Pete Ricketts here in Nebraska. But before I do, please let me explain why your donation today is so important.
I'm not rich. I'm not a politician. I'm a blue collar guy who was president of my local union until I was fired for leading a strike.
People like me aren't supposed to be able to run for office – let alone U.S. Senate – and we certainly aren't supposed to be able to win...
**But last year we almost did just that. I got 47% of the vote in one of the closest Senate races in the country. And now, I'm running again for the U.S. Senate – this time against billionaire Republican Pete Ricketts.**
In the Senate, I'll be the 51st vote to protect our democracy, the 51st vote to stop the corruption and get money out of politics, and the 51st vote to stand up against the billionaires like Ricketts who have been screwing over working people like me for decades.
And that's exactly why the Super PACs are going to come after me twice as hard this time to try to stop us again from flipping this seat.
**We need to raise $50,000 before our end-of-month fundraising deadline if we're going to be able to fight back against the lies and win this Senate seat – but right now, we're still short with time running out.**
**[I have nowhere else to turn: Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and Jacky Rosen's to help me defeat billionaire Republican Pete Ricketts and flip Nebraska's Senate seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114086689/565907214/358649031?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5590-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWUzMmFmMS01MDgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TS3Jzz5ZC-iRJmn_DBMUBi1I0CccepEzVpp1BE6Vgi0=)**
I know what it's like to work a 90-hour workweek. I know the value of a dollar. So I truly appreciate any amount you can afford to give.
Thank you – from the bottom of my heart,

Dan Osborn
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=P5ZAKfxl8ibcJDTWy3Bju29plf%2BVfIHrRwF5CnZBjbgaNX58aY9x%2Btdju6UQ151vXK%2BZ%2BQFKodYt4w%2FRthdhcgxYiLRGOasz4a4tW0555NNmebMVoW8qH%2Bsj8DZ7vQPX5hBrgPal4AdPYkYBM0ut%2Bn2vau3e0IHOpdJKnp5xJ7%2BpUgEVzM2Q73D5Q0sHBb8M7uVV7p8eOixFArK7ug5OqOQbfDXenQJItyuQBJEi7DaRNrlBRSlKRHhFVXE4aIiZbh%2B0U9s1FiDxfX0AoQzouHyFJUw1GIn63nzi04NDZSgssiq2nqkYIuHKwKddOLwBO9BLdDIsF9tfu0H4Q0J3AHZfmua1LLsMyv2hFZPLSUfyOW54Je2lA4BZELiBIN870zf9erma5azWu%2Bzk3ez1JZCYwubciValBBZPQHnalV0%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible.
