clean_body: People like me aren't supposed to run for office | | | = Hello, In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate against billionaire Republican Pete Ricketts here in Nebraska. But before I do, please let me explain why your donation today is so important. I'm not rich. I'm not a politician. I'm a blue collar guy who was president of my local union until I was fired for leading a strike. People like me aren't supposed to be able to run for office – let alone U.S. Senate – and we certainly aren't supposed to be able to win... But last year we almost did just that. I got 47% of the vote in one of the closest Senate races in the country. And now, I'm running again for the U.S. Senate – this time against billionaire Republican Pete Ricketts. In the Senate, I'll be the 51st vote to protect our democracy, the 51st vote to stop the corruption and get money out of politics, and the 51st vote to stand up against the billionaires like Ricketts who have been screwing over working people like me for decades. And that's exactly why the Super PACs are going to come after me twice as hard this time to try to stop us again from flipping this seat. We need to raise $50,000 before our end-of-month fundraising deadline if we're going to be able to fight back against the lies and win this Senate seat – but right now, we're still short with time running out. = I know what it's like to work a 90-hour workweek. I know the value of a dollar. So I truly appreciate any amount you can afford to give. Thank you – from the bottom of my heart, Dan Osborn | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada P.O. Box 46110 LAS VEGAS, NV 89114 United States |

name: EMILYs List Campaigns
subject: Cities are counting on Democratic pro-choice women
body:
Trump and his cronies are targeting cities, but EMILYs List mayors are standing strong. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114086751/565907307/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE859_20250827_MayoralSlate_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056860&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2UzMmFmMS01MDgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OiltxG8F91zTP0RWAM2KSOQLuR7xUFBDjJD0MWj2IM8=) Peter, let's be clear: Donald Trump and his allies are looking to target and take over our cities — to score political points with their base, push their chaotic and cruel agenda, and distract from their political failures.

But these cities are the very places where Democratic pro-choice women are leading with courage and conviction.

Just last week, when the Justice Department tried to pressure mayors to fall in line, Boston Mayor Michelle Wu fired back: "_The U.S. attorney general asked for a response by today, so here it is ... Stop attacking our cities to hide your administration's failures."_

That's the kind of fearless leadership EMILYs List women bring to city halls across America. **[And right now, some of the most important fights of 2025 aren't happening in Congress — they're happening in our communities. Together, we can elect more Democratic pro-choice women mayors. clean_body: Trump and his cronies are targeting cities, but EMILYs List mayors are standing strong. | = Peter, let's be clear: Donald Trump and his allies are looking to target and take over our cities — to score political points with their base, push their chaotic and cruel agenda, and distract from their political failures. But these cities are the very places where Democratic pro-choice women are leading with courage and conviction. Just last week, when the Justice Department tried to pressure mayors to fall in line, Boston Mayor Michelle Wu fired back: "The U.S. attorney general asked for a response by today, so here it is ... Stop attacking our cities to hide your administration's failures." That's the kind of fearless leadership EMILYs List women bring to city halls across America. = | = We've proudly endorsed a slate of mayoral candidates so far this cycle. Meet our extraordinary candidates: = Michelle Wu(Boston)— History-making mayor seeking reelection after delivering fare-free transit, stronger housing protections, and a bold Green New Deal for Boston. = Eileen Higgins (Miami)— County commissioner, engineer, and business leader running for mayor on a vision of inclusion, resilience, and opportunity. = Helena Moreno (New Orleans)— City Council president who's taken on crime prevention, energy, and infrastructure — and fought corruption every step of the way. = Mary Sheffield (Detroit)—City Council president running for mayor to invest in neighborhoods and keep Detroit moving forward. = Vi Lyles (Charlotte)— Mayor seeking reelection with a proven record on affordable housing, job creation, and building an equitable city for all. And let's not forget — EMILYs List candidates have already had two BIG mayoral victories this year: Barbara Lee (Oakland) and Gina Ortiz Jones (San Antonio)! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for standing with women who lead, protect, and deliver. – the EMILYs List Campaigns team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. clean_body: Confirm that you’re by our side >> | State Republican HQ Allies List Name: Peter Email: Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT ${Recipient.FIRSTNAME}, we noticed you've been quiet lately, and we're getting concerned. The Radical Left is doing everything in their power to dismantle the America First agenda, and we need your help to defend it. Their out-of-touch policies are a direct attack on our American values, and it's crucial we stand strong against their attempts to undermine our nation. It is more important now more than ever to know who has our back in this fight. Knowing that patriots such as yourself are with us has been CRUCIAL as we work to stop the Radical Left at all levels of government, and we can't afford to lose your support now. | | | By providing your mobile phone number, you are consenting to receive calls and texts and P2P messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from RSLC and its affiliated PACs. body:
| | | | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e6c813c1047b4c0d90513eabbb690dc4&_e=fq5aaUYj5yscbECHKcp6lgNOYy26KEw9rYeFQKIXkPzgh7CRJRSZuHeaGNKqK8tEzaiqhMVjDWQLhZqnrxyMOBTKTUeDvvw00uszor-2rpNPGpUrIL3ItkTq49tlds1A25IBcNO7ow6qbEWL0cdr3MAy0GQ_0d35tKs5HP_mJoGDPsWxpi2xSWw044qO-XhWhHnMf6WzRpOK3L7wwy6OhIurkB9gz_rAo3d8BFhH3CmecqHKs1jUv8MYYt0dKg0dVtDxtQgs2YoO8i_xTSBbc3yEu4_7M34RKR9sbgJky69QWFy4QaqjhGwrEDXeHqiX_ey3G5VF9MCCcZ1E8HY0tQQW63ds99oKKo8mnL2YU94XDFvEc6Q38HcJC8dIudxaHZUGrtMFL27y9Lyvfnf8kSe_y7mjF-urLFESKC7Cw8HqXwo48gOGv6VN3F-G-7vDp8qUk4wbDFv_-Xn6cMiXHW0HJMNrZ_J0K3Mg43OWw5ZOPlgJJWOpph_NbUGiDgwzrpqj7R_aGT-NwRhpgvgtrwMuQoxmYooKqPNxXcuJcyD54e94AOKBpA9Romc-riw6XFoHVARkBPUgBfjXRlRWvMRfXVW-QVOUgTIeMA6CgILmCxggFqdA-ySfbsPM33_MtVwu_FF8Zil6MVTPCh4bkExKGB9-bfr2tKxM2NJev48%3D)[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e6c813c1047b4c0d90513eabbb690dc4&_e=fq5aaUYj5yscbECHKcp6lgNOYy26KEw9rYeFQKIXkPzgh7CRJRSZuHeaGNKqK8tEzaiqhMVjDWQLhZqnrxyMOBTKTUeDvvw00uszor-2rpNPGpUrIL3ItkTq49tlds1A25IBcNO7ow6qbEWL0cdr3MAy0GQ_0d35tKs5HP_mJoGDPsWxpi2xSWw044qO-XhWhHnMf6WzRpOK3L7wwy6OhIurkB9gz_rAo3d8BFhH3CnucyYnFpCm449XqQtynNhs9bYqxwG4JFGOloGaYyv2L8GiLKDHxJ2Eax-swd-MIA_9PU_6OxAMfveS3GzOkVkKAlFxpjgazGxUSlzP0Asu_9cLFSep_AEvIQgBjibIEjRHcyiKB6k6rAnodvV3g0HW9pLrrfVcIf_B_Nf3GVN5Yb8tgqyMnC9aWi68mABN-m4vs-hMYmGVyw7i2s9QGL7qZJZ8k71zgBVktZOFc3pD9u9PR3B_UIrLCp9qqd5OHi-VObCSiE_w1jamVxh7KNGPxi31K_1Ss2tIZZRz6HR6a0Y75BZaScUp9mhALz7NoGMQd322yNcAgC4_eQvobdeHDttwjXsHH5pjseE9_TqNmWFhM2FzvUTu25kcSe9OVe-68QUHF9CwoYqUxprpULhGZx_X87-P42JYlrIC678EcoVfk9WfoC3IMJCrGqijzV0%3D)This is a sign that a racist protester held up as I spoke to the Arlington County School Board about keeping our girls safe.Peter - I'm disgusted, but not surprised.
Sadly, this is nothing new to me. I've borne _venomous_ insults and been called so many _horrible_ names throughout the years.
The "tolerant" Left will turn racist and ugly the instant a black woman decides to reject the Democrat party and embrace common sense. Liberals just can't wrap their heads around the fact that I dare to think differently, that I am not beholden to their political agenda simply because of the color of my skin.
I'm the sitting Lieutenant Governor, second in command in the former Capitol of the Confederate States. I'm an immigrant, a Marine, and above all, a human being. There is no place for this disgusting hatred in our nation. I won't let their insults define me, and I certainly won't let them slow me down!
I didn't become the first black, female Lt. Governor of Virginia by playing the victim. I did it by embracing my conservative values and trusting in God!
Leftists can spew whatever racist nonsense they like, but I will win the race for Governor of Virginia with you on my side.

clean_body: | | | | | is a sign that a racist protester held up as I spoke to the Arlington County School Board about keeping our girls safe.Peter - I'm disgusted, but not surprised. Sadly, this is nothing new to me. I've borne venomous insults and been called so many horrible names throughout the years. The "tolerant" Left will turn racist and ugly the instant a black woman decides to reject the Democrat party and embrace common sense. Liberals just can't wrap their heads around the fact that I dare to think differently, that I am not beholden to their political agenda simply because of the color of my skin. I'm the sitting Lieutenant Governor, second in command in the former Capitol of the Confederate States. I'm an immigrant, a Marine, and above all, a human being. There is no place for this disgusting hatred in our nation. I won't let their insults define me, and I certainly won't let them slow me down! I didn't become the first black, female Lt. Governor of Virginia by playing the victim. I did it by embracing my conservative values and trusting in God! Leftists can spew whatever racist nonsense they like, but I will win the race for Governor of Virginia with you on my side. Here's my call to action: back against the liberal media and the entire Democrat establishment is never easy, Peter. With patriots like you on my side, I know we will win in November and beyond. subject: Can a spoonful of butter before bed help flatten your belly?
body:
Feel lighter and more regular

For decades, we've been told by health experts that butter can clog arteries, pack on pounds, and belongs nowhere near a "healthy" lifestyle...
But here's the thing...
It also contains a little-known compound that acts like a _**"[switch](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgbnn1fqtputitik6n6e5clca1eivn9oom7e5t40_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cph60pj2cph2bs)"**_ -- helping your body flip out of a bloated, sluggish, and constant hunger loop...
Into one that feels lighter, more regular, and noticeably slimmer.
[**_That 's why one renowned heart doctor is now recommending you do THIS immediately:_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsidob0qp5rabu7rb5km0m3846ra95s7g9ur8cng_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cph60pj2cph2bs)

name: D.O.G.E. Outreach Division
subject: URGENT: Confirm Your $5,000 D.O.G.E. Refund Eligibility.
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206x3rld03k3d8zbfzckbs7oljuett1bzbdqgmuko0hwmm90keriwrqrnzbw0o1o6o3jjmm49yi8id0yljd&__stmp=t1nqvd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1nqvd&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1j6x87tp1t5v04f5jhz7pt024oadq6rgmiojtdrhi58hogz75aoho0rkv76713mdue2nzfsfzcangqr41up6nctvuyxn58nyeumesc1vudeyok5f26pgwdnkq9579qrpa9hg9w6xbp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1nqvd&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1nqvd&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1nqvd&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1nqvd&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1j6x87tp1t5v04f5jhz7pt024oadq6rgmiojtdrhi58hogz75aoho0rkv76713mdue2nzfsfzcangqr41up6nctvuyxn58nyeumesc1vudeyok5f26pgwdnkq9579qrpa9hg9w6xbp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1nqvd&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1nqvd&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Anika Page
subject: Two Saturdays That Could Shape Your Child’s Future
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/msla2025-12849842?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Good morning Friend, As parents and grandparents, we know how quickly these years fly by—and how important it is to invest in opportunities that prepare our children for the future. That’s why I’d love for you to consider the **Mississippi Leadership Academy (MSLA).** It’s a program designed to help students grow in confidence, character, and leadership—without taking over their schedules. And the best part? **It’s completely free to apply and participate.**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a3a017f4a9&e=5703353baa)
---
_Apply by clicking on the photo above!_
| **Why MSLA is worth it:**
* Only **one Saturday a month for two months**
* **Real leadership training** from statewide elected officials, legislators, and community leaders
* **Volunteer hours signed off** by our nonprofit team (for attending both sessions)

name: Updates For Great Americans
subject: Can a spoonful of butter before bed help flatten your belly?
body:
Feel lighter and more regular

For decades, we've been told by health experts that butter can clog arteries, pack on pounds, and belongs nowhere near a "healthy" lifestyle...
But here's the thing...
It also contains a little-known compound that acts like a _**"[switch](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg77c0oapfm295ksqc3e0q1jescg63f3rejcdmfg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cph68oj2clh2bs)"**_ -- helping your body flip out of a bloated, sluggish, and constant hunger loop...
Into one that feels lighter, more regular, and noticeably slimmer.

name: Bob Brooks
subject: I’m running to defeat Ryan Mackenzie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Austin Davis
body:
Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XrGKMtCcbE2djJaqLq6C9g2?unsubscribedata=bEQkJQVaUCFq%2FtiBaoEqcuQN0gYQf9OyYHL5vlFEyS6K2Gf3L0evwcW%2BEe9F7O%2FmT%2Fv4AP8Gw%2Bh2gjnXtrOy9s10Zy8T7Z9IFv9Ktq9zaQfR7qymkfzhi2rPYl0ZIajUNNqb4luuEcPWNqo8ULwM24fcOd8%2FitoQZ0vglnBPO2mFcNFtD1UiIzuoJEE6hiZHwILYjSS1303odI7WAiVSboKyAitT%2FKmOo4fqdNhfs283J3sfgfAQx2f45zTLS9bb3yUZJzPNx85WYNIFG95lAMk%2FFfxKNEM6iaF0hTUJfqRlQwh%2BZ1kiQS4RBEJ6xnrlKLmny7KjUdNm8jwpX38gL8fieop1vMp3Bb48UG6e0QL7krdJsev1j7leYUppWnYF8w4fwc%2FftwifIRX8Hrfubg0CMSGw1KSR4OEGAKGz9yabOhK4f6KoUUusKwCa17fd)
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114092837/565925927/-2144366653?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_082625_BROOKS_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDQxOTNlOC01NzgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x61a8jsDL_2e-d2W4n9FVSuAYlH6EVMLWfj3_vWqch0=) Peter, I'm Bob Brooks. I’m a firefighter, a dad, and someone who has spent his life working hard for myself, my family, and my community. **Today, I’m announcing my campaign to defeat Republican Ryan Mackenzie in PA-07. Last year, he won this race by just one percentage point. Next year, we have the chance to defeat him.** [**I want to tell you a bit more about who I am and why I’m running for Congress, but if you’re already with me in the fight to flip this competitive seat, then I’m humbly asking you to split a donation between Lieutenant Governor Austin Davis and me →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114092838/565925928/-2144366653?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_082625_BROOKS_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDQxOTNlOC01NzgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x61a8jsDL_2e-d2W4n9FVSuAYlH6EVMLWfj3_vWqch0=) | | **[Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114092839/565925929/-2144366653?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_082625_BROOKS_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDQxOTNlOC01NzgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x61a8jsDL_2e-d2W4n9FVSuAYlH6EVMLWfj3_vWqch0=)**
---
I faced a lot of obstacles at home as a kid. My childhood was a mix of challenges and hard work. My mom was a bartender and my dad was a mason. But in the early years, he served time in prison, so my mom raised me mostly on her own until she remarried.
I was a kid who loved sports — football, baseball (I played every position except pitcher and catcher), basketball, wrestling.
I went to college mostly because I wanted to play baseball. But an injury ended my career, and I dropped out soon after.
That’s why, from a young age, I worked plenty of different jobs. Paperboy, fry cook, dishwasher, bartender, pizza delivery driver — you name it, I did it. I know what it’s like to clock in early, work hard, and still wonder if you’re getting ahead.
**But in 2005, I found my passion: I became a firefighter with the city of Bethlehem.**
I threw myself into that job. I did every job the Fire Department had — I started out driving Truck 2, drove under three different chiefs, moved on to drive Ladder 2, and sometimes served as a hoseman. From the start, I was deeply involved in the firefighters’ union, serving as secretary, vice president, and president.
I spent 20 years there because fighting fires was more than just a job for me — it was about serving my community and standing up for the people who keep us safe.
I’ve worked hard. I’ve struggled. And I’ve lived through the hardships that too many of my fellow Pennsylvanians know — but that politicians never will.
**That’s exactly why I’m running for Congress.**
Republicans in Congress like Ryan Mackenzie are spending their time prioritizing Donald Trump and the wealthy billionaires who back their campaigns.
While families in PA-07 struggle with rising costs and making ends meet, Mackenzie is busy supporting policies that slash Medicaid and SNAP to pay for tax cuts to the rich and powerful.
We deserve better. We deserve someone who understands what working class families and small business owners are going through. We need someone who knows what it means to work hard and still wonder if you’re going to get by.
I’m that person, Peter. I’m running so that I can fight for you, the people.
**[So if you believe we need real representation in Congress that puts the people of PA-07 first, I’m asking for your support. clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, I'm Bob Brooks. I’m a firefighter, a dad, and someone who has spent his life working hard for myself, my family, and my community. Today, I’m announcing my campaign to defeat Republican Ryan Mackenzie in PA-07. Last year, he won this race by just one percentage point. Next year, we have the chance to defeat him. = | | = I faced a lot of obstacles at home as a kid. My childhood was a mix of challenges and hard work. My mom was a bartender and my dad was a mason. But in the early years, he served time in prison, so my mom raised me mostly on her own until she remarried. I was a kid who loved sports — football, baseball (I played every position except pitcher and catcher), basketball, wrestling. I went to college mostly because I wanted to play baseball. But an injury ended my career, and I dropped out soon after. That’s why, from a young age, I worked plenty of different jobs. Paperboy, fry cook, dishwasher, bartender, pizza delivery driver — you name it, I did it. I know what it’s like to clock in early, work hard, and still wonder if you’re getting ahead. But in 2005, I found my passion: I became a firefighter with the city of Bethlehem. I threw myself into that job. I did every job the Fire Department had — I started out driving Truck 2, drove under three different chiefs, moved on to drive Ladder 2, and sometimes served as a hoseman. From the start, I was deeply involved in the firefighters’ union, serving as secretary, vice president, and president. I spent 20 years there because fighting fires was more than just a job for me — it was about serving my community and standing up for the people who keep us safe. I’ve worked hard. I’ve struggled. And I’ve lived through the hardships that too many of my fellow Pennsylvanians know — but that politicians never will. That’s exactly why I’m running for Congress. Republicans in Congress like Ryan Mackenzie are spending their time prioritizing Donald Trump and the wealthy billionaires who back their campaigns. While families in PA-07 struggle with rising costs and making ends meet, Mackenzie is busy supporting policies that slash Medicaid and SNAP to pay for tax cuts to the rich and powerful. We deserve better. We deserve someone who understands what working class families and small business owners are going through. We need someone who knows what it means to work hard and still wonder if you’re going to get by. I’m that person, Peter. I’m running so that I can fight for you, the people. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Bob * | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. Now, he's helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. Here are three reasons why you should make a contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger as Governor of Virginia.
#
Peter, if you've been waiting to make a contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger as Governor of Virginia, now's the moment. Here are three reasons why:
✅ Our race is the biggest election since Trump returned to power.
✅ Republicans have spent over $1 million on TV and digital ads so far.
✅ And if we win big here, it will give a big boost to Democrats heading into 2026.
Here in Virginia, there is no limit to how much individuals can donate to candidates for office. For that reason, our opponent has been raking in money from far-right megadonors.

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: WATCH: Let's talk about Medicaid.
body:
| | |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=09825bf052664933b81f14fe3f961a91&_e=zIR-PObtS_M6IvXtwaNia9sTGX2Jr7IHUVH1bkOoiRNauTPYcQ4yY84uatIGPfGx7_-8eUlUFi9bnUmsu0EgUSVgxUqdDiRqPw9IbcesCoXwIwwxqktAMHgMYjioDSwQXDJUPG3W2QcDYfFFetTFbYx-1Bivqt0FfdXjDSKU0E1fkZyIelCYg-HPp2of3cXKXJ0KIiM85v22u7veOicLhWUJyCpdUj23p9NHnDqxFxHirZGdzPuOpnKm0t3K5beTMEF10Gi6rzQYBwIKw_e4UpFTwKu7MvH-hkLAGt77bFsGFt_3skAyIrm67oTq6sCe)
---

---
Medicaid now costs nearly $900 billion and covers over 70 million Americans. But the real issue isn’t just Medicaid—it’s the skyrocketing cost of healthcare. The average American family faces over $35,000 a year in healthcare costs, rising 40% faster than inflation. No wonder so many are turning to Medicaid. If we want to reduce Medicaid spending, the answer is simple: make healthcare more affordable for every American. When families can afford their own coverage, fewer people will need Medicaid. President Trump is already pushing for change—fighting to lower drug prices and cut out middlemen by giving patients direct access to doctors. **_But there’s more we can do:_**
* Cheaper, tailored insurance plans.
* Portable subsidies.
* Expand group coverage.

_**Watch the _America First Policy Institute's_ Video on Medicaid ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_

clean_body: | | | Medicaid now costs nearly $900 billion and covers over 70 million Americans. But the real issue isn’t just Medicaid—it’s the skyrocketing cost of healthcare. The average American family faces over $35,000 a year in healthcare costs, rising 40% faster than inflation. No wonder so many are turning to Medicaid. If we want to reduce Medicaid spending, the answer is simple: make healthcare more affordable for every American. When families can afford their own coverage, fewer people will need Medicaid. President Trump is already pushing for change—fighting to lower drug prices and cut out middlemen by giving patients direct access to doctors. But there’s more we can do: Cheaper, tailored insurance plans. Portable subsidies. Expand group coverage. Watch the America First Policy Institute's Video on Medicaid ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎** Medicaid’s growth is troubling, but the bigger crisis is unaffordable healthcare. Let’s work together to drive down costs, expand choice, and protect the American dream. Every family deserves healthcare they can afford—without relying on government dependency. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by AmericaNext

name: First Look News
subject: Can a spoonful of butter before bed help flatten your belly?
body:
Feel lighter and more regular

For decades, we've been told by health experts that butter can clog arteries, pack on pounds, and belongs nowhere near a "healthy" lifestyle...
But here's the thing...
It also contains a little-known compound that acts like a _**"[switch](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5sigusagud46l1pvr0hdnk16o2775srmelik8ng_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cph64p34cph2bs)"**_ -- helping your body flip out of a bloated, sluggish, and constant hunger loop...
Into one that feels lighter, more regular, and noticeably slimmer.
[**_That 's why one renowned heart doctor is now recommending you do THIS immediately:_**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zc34mkuod66mlenvrjjmkj597u3gu79uipmqrkt0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cph64p34cph2bs)

Friends, something big is happening -- and if we move fast, it could be the flashpoint we've been waiting for. In recent weeks, Democrats have pulled off major upsets in places like Iowa and Pennsylvania, where Trump won handily in 2024. We're talking about **rural, red districts** that the political class had written off -- until we showed up, organized, and proved them wrong. **These weren 't flukes. These were proof. Proof that when we listen to local voters, focus on real issues, and give candidates the support they need, we can win anywhere -- even in the heart of MAGA country.** This is exactly what we need more of in 2025 -- and it's how we build real momentum for the 2026 midterms. We have the formula. Now we need the fuel. This is our moment to go all in--to expand what's working, invest in overlooked communities, and make sure no Democrat is left behind. **[If we can build on these wins, district by district, we can take back control from the far-right and finally stop the chaos Trump and his allies are unleashing. clean_body: | | Friends, something big is happening -- and if we move fast, it could be the flashpoint we've been waiting for. In recent weeks, Democrats have pulled off major upsets in places like Iowa and Pennsylvania, where Trump won handily in 2024. We're talking about rural, red districts that the political class had written off -- until we showed up, organized, and proved them wrong. These weren 't flukes. These were proof. Proof that when we listen to local voters, focus on real issues, and give candidates the support they need, we can win anywhere -- even in the heart of MAGA country. This is exactly what we need more of in 2025 -- and it's how we build real momentum for the 2026 midterms. We have the formula. Now we need the fuel. This is our moment to go all in--to expand what's working, invest in overlooked communities, and make sure no Democrat is left behind. Let's prove again that there's no such thing as "too red to win." Team No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . name: Phil Izon
subject: 54.86% income tax on each Alaskan child from birth to 18. ($45K) But how?
body:
Please share with friends and family | | | [](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68af22f4a3e00e0317ef31e9&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D68af22164725aa1ca664b458%26ss_email_id%3D68af22f4a3e00e0317ef31e9%26ss_campaign_name%3D54.86%2525%2Bincome%2Btax%2Bon%2Beach%2BAlaskan%2Bchild%2Bfrom%2Bbirth%2Bto%2B18.%2B%2528%252445K%2529%2BBut%2Bhow%253F%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-08-27T15%253A23%253A58Z&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68af22164725aa1ca664b458&l=en-US&s=k9qNNbre1Fe_xU4h3hhwdMocnEU%3D)
---
|
---
|

**Based on my research. A newborn Alaskan child could potentially have a significant amount of money diverted from their PFD.****So far if a baby was born in 2016, they have had $16,376 diverted from each Alaskan Baby. That is a tax. An income tax on babies?****Projected diversions put Alaska on track to have $45,000 diverted from each Alaska child from birth to 18.****What could your kid do with $45,000, better question is what are the teachers unions and NGOs going to do with your kids $45,000?****It gets better, because they are taxing you too, and most are too checked out to even realize it.****The average effective tax rate on ALL ALASKAN CHILDREN IS 54.86% if they all only receive the PFD as income from 2016-2025.** 2016 Income: $2,052 2016 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $1,030 - tax rate 50.19%2017 Income: $2,300 2017 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $1,200 - tax rate 52.17%2018 Income: $2,900 2018 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $1,300 - tax rate 44.83%2019 Income: $3,004 2019 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $1,398 - tax rate 46.54%2020: Income: $3,106 2020 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $2,114 - tax rate 68.06%2021 Income: $4,198 2021 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $3,084 - tax rate 73.46%2022 Income: $4,200 2022 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $914- tax rate 21.77%2023 Income: $3,641 2023 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $2,329 - tax rate 63.96%2024 Income: $3,644 2024 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $1,942 - tax rate 53.30%2025 Income: $3,892 2025 Taxes Withheld By Each Alaska Child - $2,892 - tax rate 74.30%In 2022, there was a one time energy relief payment that created an outlier in the data set.
---
|
---
---
|
---
#### **Education Is Key, Learn Why Jungle Primary And Ranked Choice Voting Are Bad For Alaska And America.**
[https://tropictundra.com/governor](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68af22f4a3e00e0317ef31e9&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FBJRA6sBsbW&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68af22164725aa1ca664b458&l=en-US&s=dVKGdfJDpitYY8yArKkPU096IM0%3D)
---
[_ _ Click Here To See The 2026 Alaska Governor’s Race So Far _ _](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68af22f4a3e00e0317ef31e9&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Fgovernor%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D68af22164725aa1ca664b458%26ss_email_id%3D68af22f4a3e00e0317ef31e9%26ss_campaign_name%3D54.86%2525%2Bincome%2Btax%2Bon%2Beach%2BAlaskan%2Bchild%2Bfrom%2Bbirth%2Bto%2B18.%2B%2528%252445K%2529%2BBut%2Bhow%253F%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-08-27T15%253A23%253A58Z&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68af22164725aa1ca664b458&l=en-US&s=TqqncWcEmyA7iESf_OSAoUo73WU%3D)
---
---
|

---
|

---
|
---
---
|
---
I built RCV Election Simulators, they’ve been picked up [@Stop_RCV](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68af22f4a3e00e0317ef31e9&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2FStop_RCV&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68af22164725aa1ca664b458&l=en-US&s=4hsSZJVTOa6Pao4PqOL-MGHKqS4%3D) StopRCV, as well as [@A1Policy](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68af22f4a3e00e0317ef31e9&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2FA1Policy&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68af22164725aa1ca664b458&l=en-US&s=XrtRzBYiB-x-XPVynMoKKnRbOhM%3D) America First Policy Institute to educate people about RCV. Right here in Alaska, one man is trying to make a difference for the country, national groups are using my designs, ideas, videos, and content. Very humbled.StopRCV just made my election simulators live on their website. I built these custom for them.
---
#### **Check Out The Custom Simulators on StopRCV.com**
#### [**https://stoprcv.com/rcv-in-action**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68af22f4a3e00e0317ef31e9&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FFs48fz7UWJ&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68af22164725aa1ca664b458&l=en-US&s=zuTaAPSsGPmrPI-PAR68iFkZfJM%3D)
---
|
---
Our partners at Michigan Fair Elections Institute (MFEI) have released a of comprehensive fact based assessment on RCV: _[Ranked Choice Voting: A Threat to Our Electoral Process](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68af22f4a3e00e0317ef31e9&u=https%3A%2F%2Faa3979fb-9421-4dd8-ba7d-8ead2d346103.usrfiles.com%2Fugd%2Faa3979_1c9e4b6a7e6247988eb011ff3524a789.pdf&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68af22164725aa1ca664b458&l=en-US&s=tqJ6kr2w7moaPoZCpUyxF74WUiw%3D)_ It is peer-reviewed and based on data from major US universities and the London School of Economics. Unlike the left and a handful of well-paid "Republican" RCV supporters, it has actual, you know, data and history that proves the absolute folly of RCV. It is critical that Michigan voters understand that RCV acts against them. If you don't want your ballot sent to the trash can (ie, eliminated through RCV recounting) then please make sure you oppose the pro-RCV Constitutional Amendment coming to MI in 2026. Oh. And its not just Michigan. Sixteen states (WV, WY, TN, FL, ID, SD, MT, KY, AL, MS, LA, OK, MO, AR, KS, ND) have banned RCV. If you're not in one of those - look out - oppose RCV now before it's too late.
---
#### **I was asked to write a testimonial**
---
---
|
---
#### [**Click Here To Read The Michigan Report**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68af22f4a3e00e0317ef31e9&u=https%3A%2F%2Faa3979fb-9421-4dd8-ba7d-8ead2d346103.usrfiles.com%2Fugd%2Faa3979_1c9e4b6a7e6247988eb011ff3524a789.pdf&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68af22164725aa1ca664b458&l=en-US&s=tqJ6kr2w7moaPoZCpUyxF74WUiw%3D)
---
|
---
#### **America First Policy Institute Update**
---
**My first videos with AFPI are now sitting with their executives for approval. We are now taking my Anti-RCV Education to three additional States (Michigan, Minnesota, and Georgia). All of the videos we created to STOP RCV last year in Idaho, Oregon, Arizona, South Dakota, Nevada, and Colorado in 2024, we have now made available free of charge to AFPI, they will now be spending their own money pushing my content across the country. Targeting places where RCV is still being pushed.****My work with AFPI will produce RCV education to millions of people, I have RCV simulators that show in real time the election changes and the redistribution of votes. I explain each step so everyone can understand it. I have made these simulators available in 15 languages that are most used in each State. I am also going to be showing my movie about RCV “Frozen Odds” in multiple states next year at multiple events in each state.****My goal is simple, the complete and utter elimination of RCV in American Elections (Considering 17 States have banned it in 3 years and 7 states rejected it at the ballot in 2024, I would like to think we are on the right track).****I would like to thank all of my 6,000 newsletter subscribers, my nearly 10,000 followers on X, and my 6,400 followers on Linkedin for sharing my messages and helping me generate over 12 million views just on my X account in the last two years. I have also sent out over 650,000 emails from 2023-2025.**
---
**My partnership with America First Policy Institute has already grown beyond the initial scope. My original idea was to help in Michigan, now my work is going to be used in Michigan, Minnesota, and Georgia. Talk about Amazing, the multi-state collaboration and ability to bring my movie “Frozen Odds” to show all over the country all to stop the spread of RCV Ranked Choice Voting. Big thank you to all the supporters and followers, volunteers, and donors. I have taken upon myself to educate America about the dangers of RCV.****On top of this, one of my amazing newsletter subscribers donated a large sum of money to AFPI to support our efforts, I never asked for any money for this project, but AFPI is a 501(c)3 organization and our efforts will be under the education umbrella. If you would like to donate to them, here is their information. I am not affilated to them and I am not being paid in anyway by AFPI.**[**https://www.americafirstpolicy.com/**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68af22f4a3e00e0317ef31e9&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.americafirstpolicy.com&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68af22164725aa1ca664b458&l=en-US&s=lY0M3kEn15MLstoElhoezn6iKEE%3D)**They have done amazing work in many states, I originally started working with them in Arizona fighting against RCV in 2023 and 2024. They specifically asked me to work with them on creating content and help distribute content across multiple states. Pretty amazing experience.****I want to extend a huge thank you to all the movie supporters, golden ticket holders, angel ticket holders, my petition volunteers, my volunteer leads that are spread across the whole state, and all the amazing people who voted on my repeal of RCV in 2024. I am just getting started and your funding of my movies, your time helping collect signatures, and your continued support have led us to this point. The point where we eliminate RCV from every state before they have a chance to even do a petition to get it. So far 17 states have banned RCV in 3 years, it took them 20+ years to get 2 states to use it. We are winning, keep up the pressure.**
---
---
|
---
**My organization Izon Education**[**@907Honest**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68af22f4a3e00e0317ef31e9&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2F907Honest&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68af22164725aa1ca664b458&l=en-US&s=8wF0dqeyAqLnJOt62859YMC_eyY%3D)**are working on big educational projects with America First Policy Institute even to go as far as to fly me to DC for an interview.**[**@A1Policy**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68af22f4a3e00e0317ef31e9&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2FA1Policy&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68af22164725aa1ca664b458&l=en-US&s=XrtRzBYiB-x-XPVynMoKKnRbOhM%3D)**I am excited to collaborate and help educate Michigan about all the issues with Ranked Choice Voting. Including animated videos, RCV Election Simulators in 30+ languages, RCV guidebooks also in 30+ languages, both of my books ( free of charge and copyright free ) and so much more. Plan to show my movie “Frozen Odds” all over Michigan next year with the help of America First Policy Institute.**
---
---
|
---
**“Frozen Odds” and “The Permanent Short” are both on schedule, plan to release “Frozen Odds” & “The Permanent Short” in October pending delays from our partnership with America First Policy Institute. They are helping me edit the footage to fit their national needs.**
---
**“Frozen Odds” has expanded beyond Alaska, it will now be a series about America’s fight against RCV, with filming taking place in each state with the people who faced RCV. Currently Michigan is facing an RCV ballot measure aimed at 2026, I have partnered with multiple national organizations to make sure “Frozen Odds” will be shown to thousands of people in 2025 and 2026. Alaska’s message is powerful and I am thankful for all the people who have contributed to take this film to this stage.**
---
---
|
---
### **More News**
---
---
|
---
**Exciting News, My team and I have been hired to manage and deliver the Eaglexit project for Eagle River and Chugiak. The objective is to break Eagle River and Chugiak into their own borough.****The phase approach is:****1\. Education / Volunteer Training / Building****2\. Gather signatures for Petition / Education****3\. GOTV (Get Out The Vote) / Education****Our team at**[**http://PetitionEngine.com**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68af22f4a3e00e0317ef31e9&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2Fq3ow7fFBOA&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68af22164725aa1ca664b458&l=en-US&s=yedepvqc-Fj9jLzWJGqvc01JLXg%3D)**, is proud to manage and deliver the full-scale rollout of Eaglexit for Eagle River and Chugiak. Let’s make history.**[**https://eaglexit.com**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68af22f4a3e00e0317ef31e9&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FCwYOkRQoPB&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68af22164725aa1ca664b458&l=en-US&s=lNHDq9drw2s3LWQyQHicXgQnbcA%3D)
---

Eagle River

We are winning, keep up the pressure. | My organization Izon Education working on big educational projects with America First Policy Institute even to go as far as to fly me to DC for an interview. am excited to collaborate and help educate Michigan about all the issues with Ranked Choice Voting. Including animated videos, RCV Election Simulators in 30+ languages, RCV guidebooks also in 30+ languages, both of my books ( free of charge and copyright free ) and so much more. Plan to show my movie “Frozen Odds” all over Michigan next year with the help of America First Policy Institute. | “Frozen Odds” and “The Permanent Short” are both on schedule, plan to release “Frozen Odds” & “The Permanent Short” in October pending delays from our partnership with America First Policy Institute. They are helping me edit the footage to fit their national needs. “Frozen Odds” has expanded beyond Alaska, it will now be a series about America’s fight against RCV, with filming taking place in each state with the people who faced RCV. Currently Michigan is facing an RCV ballot measure aimed at 2026, I have partnered with multiple national organizations to make sure “Frozen Odds” will be shown to thousands of people in 2025 and 2026. Alaska’s message is powerful and I am thankful for all the people who have contributed to take this film to this stage. | More News | Exciting News, My team and I have been hired to manage and deliver the Eaglexit project for Eagle River and Chugiak. The objective is to break Eagle River and Chugiak into their own borough.The phase approach is:1\. Education / Volunteer Training / Building2\. Gather signatures for Petition / Education3\. GOTV (Get Out The Vote) / EducationOur team at, is proud to manage and deliver the full-scale rollout of Eaglexit for Eagle River and Chugiak. Let’s make history. | | Phil Izon 12110 Business Blvd Ste 6 PMB 113 Eagle River United States | ---|---

Dear Peter,

It could look like any other delivery: A plain, discreet box. No fanfare. Just a lifeline. Inside? Small, FDA-approved medications. Safe. Effective. Abortion care without needing to travel, wait, or face judgment.

For millions of people, especially those in rural areas, [**this small box means freedom.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114094537/565931128/1824768205?sourceid=1150866&utm_campaign=26emama-0805aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjFkYWNjNC01YTgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=djz2tgvXMnxxftYBYEijdlJechEq9Z8WvzuHe28Oozk=&emci=57b40cbe-5a83-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=021dacc4-5a83-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237) The only way to end a pregnancy safely—without a plane ticket, days off work, or hundreds of miles to the nearest clinic.

[**This freedom is under attack. Legislators in Texas are considering a bill right now to allow private citizens to bring lawsuits against anyone who manufactures, mails, delivers, prescribes, or distributes abortion pills.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114094538/565931129/1824768205?sourceid=1150866&utm_campaign=26emama-0805aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjFkYWNjNC01YTgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=djz2tgvXMnxxftYBYEijdlJechEq9Z8WvzuHe28Oozk=&emci=57b40cbe-5a83-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=021dacc4-5a83-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237) | [**DEFEND ACCESS NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114094539/565931130/1824768205?sourceid=1150866&utm_campaign=26emama-0805aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjFkYWNjNC01YTgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=djz2tgvXMnxxftYBYEijdlJechEq9Z8WvzuHe28Oozk=&emci=57b40cbe-5a83-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=021dacc4-5a83-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237 "RUSH YOUR GIFT NOW")
---
This is a deliberate strategy to end abortion access without calling it a ban. And it hits hardest in communities with the least ability to fight back. We can’t let them succeed.

**[The Center for Reproductive Rights is preparing for legal battles across the U.S. in states where access is threatened. But we can't do it without you. Your support fuels our strategy, powers our lawsuits, and makes victories possible.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114094540/565931131/1824768205?sourceid=1150866&utm_campaign=26emama-0805aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjFkYWNjNC01YTgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=djz2tgvXMnxxftYBYEijdlJechEq9Z8WvzuHe28Oozk=&emci=57b40cbe-5a83-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=021dacc4-5a83-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)**

This fight is about more than pills—it’s about the right to make personal decisions. Privately. Safely. With dignity.

[**Please, give now to defend access to safe abortion care.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114094542/565931133/1824768205?sourceid=1150866&utm_campaign=26emama-0805aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjFkYWNjNC01YTgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=djz2tgvXMnxxftYBYEijdlJechEq9Z8WvzuHe28Oozk=&emci=57b40cbe-5a83-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=021dacc4-5a83-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: I'm running to defeat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do - and spend - whatever it takes to defeat us
body:
I’m running for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert (R), flip the House blue and stand up for working families in my hometown.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R5xdOutXVMYyMb9Z54HlQNAQehib3NplUN5DlFfTh0URKDse3crcxI4PJ5z9wuBddy-qZrlb5y-LkNXB0LpXrhaWQBfdnL-Ydj7Wu98XViSvC9EdlI-MbPhb2ABmJDocW8JngZEqaZAlhKL0mhNxAlbCorFp0Fca3ZVbuuPUrWCre_UHHouIAP7CT9IEnRGZSMef-4jf4EfQgnn4FHemZJWMPzE2xfAshb8mQWRVZfTc5L4CYZX9yw==&c=0O1pFE03AZKJjzxjxIEsqGfrdxHk8x0_ZmTRejvQbnXffDBv5o2gMA==&ch=CjfJKoP1DaXOf4LDNF0tsq_CKLafU0Dmup5__TmVQeFnLK5PjLy18g==)
---
| Peter, my name is Trisha Calvarese (D) - and I'm running for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert (R), flip the House blue and stand up for working families in my hometown. My story begins in the rural Eastern Plains. My dad was a dedicated civil servant, and my mom was a child care provider. From the beginning, they've been my models of what servant leadership means.
When they both became terminally ill with cancer less than two years ago, I returned home to provide end-of-life care for them. It was the toughest thing I've ever done.
It opened my eyes to how broken our systems are - and I couldn't believe that our members of Congress weren't doing more to fix them. So that's what I'm doing: I'm running for Congress to stand up for the dignity and care of families in my hometown.
That means protecting Social Security and Medicare. It means working to bring down the cost of everything from prescription drugs to groceries. It means creating good-paying jobs and opportunities right here at home.
I know the road ahead won't be easy. Lauren Boebert is bought and paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do - and spend - whatever it takes to defeat us. But if there's anything I've learned from growing up in Colorado, it's this: There are things money can't buy, greed can't steal, and corruption can't crush. It's us. We the people. This is our seat.
So, Peter, I'm asking you to join our movement today: [Will you please split $10 or more between Defend our Courts and my campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert so we can take back the House for Democrats and give working families the voice they deserve in Congress?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R5xdOutXVMYyMb9Z54HlQNAQehib3NplUN5DlFfTh0URKDse3crcxI4PJ5z9wuBddy-qZrlb5y-LkNXB0LpXrhaWQBfdnL-Ydj7Wu98XViSvC9EdlI-MbPhb2ABmJDocW8JngZEqaZAlhKL0mhNxAlbCorFp0Fca3ZVbuuPUrWCre_UHHouIAP7CT9IEnRGZSMef-4jf4EfQgnn4FHemZJWMPzE2xfAsstvVK1H22omevthVa9yA5g==&c=0O1pFE03AZKJjzxjxIEsqGfrdxHk8x0_ZmTRejvQbnXffDBv5o2gMA==&ch=CjfJKoP1DaXOf4LDNF0tsq_CKLafU0Dmup5__TmVQeFnLK5PjLy18g==)

clean_body: I’m running for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert (R), flip the House blue and stand up for working families in my hometown. | | | | | == | Peter, my name is Trisha Calvarese (D) - and I'm running for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert (R), flip the House blue and stand up for working families in my hometown. My story begins in the rural Eastern Plains. My dad was a dedicated civil servant, and my mom was a child care provider. From the beginning, they've been my models of what servant leadership means. When they both became terminally ill with cancer less than two years ago, I returned home to provide end-of-life care for them. It was the toughest thing I've ever done. It opened my eyes to how broken our systems are - and I couldn't believe that our members of Congress weren't doing more to fix them. So that's what I'm doing: I'm running for Congress to stand up for the dignity and care of families in my hometown. That means protecting Social Security and Medicare. It means working to bring down the cost of everything from prescription drugs to groceries. It means creating good-paying jobs and opportunities right here at home. I know the road ahead won't be easy. Lauren Boebert is bought and paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do - and spend - whatever it takes to defeat us. But if there's anything I've learned from growing up in Colorado, it's this: There are things money can't buy, greed can't steal, and corruption can't crush. It's us. We the people. This is our seat. So, Peter, I'm asking you to join our movement today: == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Thank you for your early support. There's a lot of work ahead of us, but I'm so grateful to have you by my side. Together, I know we can win this thing. Trisha Calvarese | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | ==

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

RR - Cao,
clean_body: It’s now or never | | | | | | | | | | It’s fighters like you that help launch winning campaigns. From the bottom of my heart,THANK YOU. Friend, it’s Nancy Mace. - I want to convey how much this means to me, because I wasn’t supposed to make it this far... Let me explain. At 17, I dropped out of high school. My parents, a tough Army General and an even tougher schoolteacher, gave me two choices: Go back to school, or get a job. So I went to work at a fine-dining establishment some of you may know as Waffle House. Simply put, I’ve had to work for everything I have ever had in life. Jesus carried me through trauma, heartbreak, single motherhood, public failure, and private grief. He carried me**when I was diagnosed with PTSD. He carried me when I moved four times to keep my children safe. And when I had nothing left to give,He filled me with living water. Twenty-five years ago, I made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel. I got here the hard way. And I’ve been FIGHTING ever since: 💥 I go toe-to-toe with Fake News CNN anchors on live TV. 💥 I fight every single day for President Trump’s agenda. 💥 I’ve suffered DEATH THREATS for fighting to keep MEN out of women’s bathrooms. This isn’t about headlines. I’ve had a target on my back since I took on the establishment, but now they’re serious. They will stop at nothing to silence me. Dems are hurling MILLIONS against me, and establishment Republicans are throwing their support behind RINOs just to shut me down. Friend, The battle is just getting started. Let’s**HOLD THE LINEand make history together. Thank you for standing with me. — Nancy | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter. Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained. At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history. Nancy is fighting to: Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR | | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 |

Hi Peter,
Our Summer Sustainer Drive ends today! We need 15 more people to sign up to give to OLCV monthly to reach our goal – will you help? $5 a month is the price of one cup of coffee. Can you give up one coffee a month to join our Sustainer Circle? [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2]

Our volunteers are the ones getting out there and talking to voters, lobbying our elected officials, and educating the public about our issues. The more volunteer power we have, the more we can accomplish. Their combined voices can sway voters and elected officials — we know this. None of our work of recruiting and training these volunteers is possible without the support of our donors, especially our Sustainer Circle members.
If we reach our goal by the end of the day, we would have succeeded in raising the funds to recruit 24 new volunteers! We need all the help we can get as we take on another anti-climate, anti-environment Trump administration. It’s absolutely critical that we harness the power of our grassroots supporters to continue making progress here in Oregon. Our volunteers are donating their time to this cause, you give just $5 a month to join us? [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2]
Monthly donors provide the reliable support we need to make it through tough times like this. Ongoing monthly gifts sustain our work, and we need your support now more than ever!
Give now [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=5&amtOpts=&recurringAm=5&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=cGVmDn0oHPgsZpPAJeF0zXcJjRCFPw1JXlUDednOQquEhNX/idcNoel5Jp7kJBh1f80VD+r2cLKKlvhkGHouOBMe9VrM5VQT2HPnwdYPMP6VU3XvVoGalkRf6arPTIzt]
Thank you,

subject: This email could change someone's life
body:
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=5435823ce2b94162bf4bc17e93a3bd1e&_e=4ZnjK0h5UPVX3MhmjjYUYuR6aPXA3dLlWFANx39aNJBYdsKhUi0q2599yvNLXAaQZsLUXHHNDhnfITUr_n5kT3uX0n1VJrZTcxYeXlvJBaM2LqyyeqsH2Y244mAC12Rhsgk-_H8uEMpYdyE7Vywb02g_HuZLGrU7XE5VK4Ng1nKQ_k7Qrcjiy5EdkzmTgUSMhAHWQryOSgQXraCWkr25lXOCUVkTJE1795p7mtkfOy9t5xBDWzqsH9V4z2bkE8RkW-KCsOuiZYfnMjpVRNBBjnx4M_t-ghCE_Hi1hzxmLkMoJRpG6Hmwq18CJHqfpPzcBRS7R2Djz0qpIO8UqERaWBxhEzBoGlhNBJbO-A6iRsW777cji9cey99PHdgBjDYDilh0ZZwCxD9AFb_N2x17JVRT1iP14iGPMtc76-UnlADQIHHhlV8nd6kAE78SwG3CR1oD1LSF5JzS2BRNuRacSgTcExeh3-ctYOyeFQioKOk2BvP1Qno0XNXRYjt9Ob9i02nJnaWwbfNlq5uw7gUIPHrEYo_Mux3773eudVFpKTdlEex64lJNYidE7flS73TEEzaOGdJmM8C19azOfZC1UjtsfTZ0O2DV3YBejjWNDyeowMPHoVlrnJYEoSHr_5no)

Friend,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

[If that is all you need to hear, then please contribute $10 or any amount you can generously afford using the button below:](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=5435823ce2b94162bf4bc17e93a3bd1e&_e=4ZnjK0h5UPVX3MhmjjYUYuR6aPXA3dLlWFANx39aNJBYdsKhUi0q2599yvNLXAaQZsLUXHHNDhnfITUr_n5kT3uX0n1VJrZTcxYeXlvJBaM2LqyyeqsH2Y244mAC12Rhsgk-_H8uEMpYdyE7Vywb02g_HuZLGrU7XE5VK4Ng1nIoG1uudp8R7vmI4T5eu4_igrpo87SCrwN8-GVttqzKARRVCifVEKw8SBmtFXUrPIDxfLxycQf9ZLVttKABLbAzymYLAEX_ggoA1MMJv_Be87vy1E6OxTmeahMjQBl67Be5wRSmP1gEgS_Js07NP6RtlJhhVYJneq0J4h3HqhkpyskiroRSUzkbNw_60LH2OV8E-XKjDyniJvyeUF8N5FJGPdA1mUNEMPTIV5NKNJLXLHjlrLPX8urGjqwp5Phm4BVOH2koy2JHxwe5sd7ntXqrOgY3zVYgLAtqrCgO4mS2kVvILrnTyyIagK7WcgYyKhpPYHcb3c-oJurKavCLkPqWRritby2ZnqQGdfmveBti3D0o-lptvYh8qibJJTVQOyjToUD59r1pK-rrHZh-uEg4chRh1obHapuHF2QXy9_L-Fd8onkHkMFaUDzpmxJ5X3d7-6QYIpXaKXcmwMbdOx0pA113GqDH0H8TQ16ywXbUyA%3D%3D)

[Donate Now](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=5435823ce2b94162bf4bc17e93a3bd1e&_e=4ZnjK0h5UPVX3MhmjjYUYuR6aPXA3dLlWFANx39aNJBYdsKhUi0q2599yvNLXAaQZsLUXHHNDhnfITUr_n5kT3uX0n1VJrZTcxYeXlvJBaM2LqyyeqsH2Y244mAC12Rhsgk-_H8uEMpYdyE7Vywb02g_HuZLGrU7XE5VK4Ng1nLgO300kIUcVIM9UK43X62WM0tIdm3ZuMLEiXIaYv2OaJS3CmZOUGoLsTsos6VToh1sCnM5JjmXlM8dpWIVUY-Jph0p1n2P-LoN-MMc7SeCPMU6e62Dw_jHNL-qBuMdmeLYOOjnX3dc2CGPqAJsWPGgyIIBS87jvJgJo3iPrzvwbPCsJl57XaqSEo1fts0TN29raKLnI7hYK_2i2h7gnY2uPHLaQW5GcallGlmFiO2xG5P3tSGOOsEW5eHFhkX8J6otvXnaJAqEzB_C4yA0PKtG9UkuR5-GIRTP3i-bl3CmPLUoGtURG16SLKE76FM19EYOFRViRKxhukGF0QufpgmmVtn75XCRrn8zt0JzH2NDJBXq5mzrYpfY8kGkHKCE2xcbPXUhpetD0WaNP82-ixRhXiSW5H2NhRJlIF0GeVUOrUoc8M_5oLBHyt-mLbzGaA_D-vpfV0OCGDlpuYML6tWLklcqV9FCXunkB0MvowQiUQ%3D%3D)

**Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because the _" crime"_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

$10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet.

$10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

[$10 because no one should have to face these hardships alone.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=5435823ce2b94162bf4bc17e93a3bd1e&_e=4ZnjK0h5UPVX3MhmjjYUYuR6aPXA3dLlWFANx39aNJBYdsKhUi0q2599yvNLXAaQZsLUXHHNDhnfITUr_n5kT3uX0n1VJrZTcxYeXlvJBaM2LqyyeqsH2Y244mAC12Rhsgk-_H8uEMpYdyE7Vywb02g_HuZLGrU7XE5VK4Ng1nKCduOXvizncN_S2lIKMe9FubEg3CNkHw58WbTP11l1S0YhJX-n3nw_Xo-MG8pQJbOEUXs7p4xvAiSADaiKAWTY0FrJ8NxjQ6Pr5boJ9UcSMqNaM0YbrSg4cG2NlgfeRq054MZDjLnyAFdiP4lrMxAamz0z7Nqr_aIR5VgHLJBv84MtJR-iFBiwrZXbQIprabddpUGFM2NdR84Sn_ySl5i7lakI-_WHSVBGm-CronYr8Fzbc5u9oYQXEd2mmmsLiz7i9_3-YH9U4kJTbpt-qHd3yhZkfyRFmAauVTR9m0nG9xQjWlMTvGc29xTkyvQKbRjgu9JkFjrG1d543JT5r_K5WwSSpZ15T3BAwulHQkSahkccpnJCH0vrTtp52ExA2q8ZP4hrvLKyKB8RMbojb_P2sIUBSu4ftvyzY0OGkSMED5movzyi0aDT0QQt0PJpN8MvI6nmp-gr3j8Pa_iO_8Q1_mkjgUiGVao9Q_zDa9udJQ%3D%3D)

Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions.

_And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance.

**Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today.**

[Donate $10](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=5435823ce2b94162bf4bc17e93a3bd1e&_e=4ZnjK0h5UPVX3MhmjjYUYuR6aPXA3dLlWFANx39aNJBYdsKhUi0q2599yvNLXAaQZsLUXHHNDhnfITUr_n5kT3uX0n1VJrZTcxYeXlvJBaM2LqyyeqsH2Y244mAC12Rhsgk-_H8uEMpYdyE7Vywb02g_HuZLGrU7XE5VK4Ng1nLR8ItkUnOA6vZ_RbIbC7n5CfotmGn3oa-bbh-D7mcdtRYCpG9dgw-lpcSCDE1cqQpNYuEjsv3C9B8l_XQx1U79-Ty9wwj7dz03tFenlWcjTpvTp5qGy_AfAwMG9ticbda2jbTVakFlZxOtOI8B44c6UgpLRQSHUZ_LC9A6B7H2mF86XGSuOwEpfJfOOkbeV4O4A31VTMiNtBs9S1OfbamZMMS6_z-IKELLSDGeSKNl7GFxuFczquwKmFiXJvyAfeuV6f9Om7c1Pb3I_lBRhAqXQ0khs_Vhx4GlJRU06uL8sT6Tt5b0791w6KwUYR3Zr7obb4L4laatz5NlOeENbVWjJFn52P_THX1OL8Zu_ThTfvI1t6YayG0k_Cupb6O6o22Vp7p9dGd_4O3szPwmFFiSG95-KRpouX8op43F_b-6HZv1KQzNldVlEYcHyZ4N0o5bP1CPyGeZbTBZt7gvJM1i-8WkY346gIDHHHpKrApKbzYmqN07F0tEHKGyJvJeoxU%3D)

clean_body: Friend, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Rome News-Tribune: Eligibility of 364,000 Georgia voters challenged [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/RNT_GeorgiaEligibilityChallenged.png]
Georgia and other states have an expansive legal statute that permits any voter to challenge the right to vote of any other voter in that county or municipality. Dark money voter suppression groups have allegedly used this legal tactic to threaten the voter eligibility of hundreds of thousands en masse in Georgia alone.
We want to hear from supporters in your area about this tactic. Will you take our one-click poll right away?
Team: Do you think political action groups should be able to mass question the eligibility of voters?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=082725_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=082725_1no&amount=15]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082725_1&amount=20]

name: Team Evergreen
subject: Recess doesn't mean they're off the clock
body:
How to engage your members of Congress while they're home this week
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3916074/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi friend,

This summer, the impacts of climate change are being felt far and wide, leaving people in all corners of the country reeling from extreme weather events.

Tragic flash flooding is wrecking entire neighborhoods in Texas and Wisconsin. Wildfires are forcing families in California and Oregon to evacuate their homes. And devastating storms like Hurricane Erin are barreling through communities along the East Coast, just as peak hurricane season is about to ramp up.

At the same time, Congress passed Trump’s reckless economic plan earlier this summer, attacking clean energy and promoting dangerous fossil fuels—**which we know contribute to rising temperatures and intensifying climate disasters** —all while cutting Medicaid, giving tax breaks to the wealthy, and adding to the country’s deficit.

If you’re feeling frustrated, heartbroken, or angry, there’s never been a better time for channeling those feelings into advocacy.

Because your members of Congress are still on August recess, **activists like you have a one-of-a-kind opportunity to hold them accountable while they’re at home in their districts for just a few more days.**

[**To get started, check out this comprehensive toolkit that gives you everything you need to make a real difference.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3916075/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[LET'S GO!](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3916076/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Climate and clean energy advocates have unique power in this moment, and we’ve made it easy for you to unleash it. |
| | **Specifically, the toolkit contains:**

✅ Step-by-step instructions for connecting with your members of Congress, including specific tactics based on how they voted on the disastrous budget

✅ Detailed talking points you can pick and choose from to craft the message that means the most to you

✅ Ways to connect with local climate groups who are engaging in recess advocacy

✅ Scripts, templates, and checklists to make it easy for you to get involved
---
---
| Whether you’re a seasoned activist or brand new to the climate advocacy space, we hope you’ll engage with this toolkit in whatever way feels most empowering for you. By doing so, **you can make sure your members of Congress understand we’re holding them accountable** —especially while they’re supposed to be taking this time to hear directly from the people they represent. |
---
[GET THE TOOLKIT](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3916077/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| In solidarity,

Team Evergreen |
---
| **P.S.** If this toolkit was helpful to you, please let us know by replying directly to this email or by dropping a quick note to [hello@evergreenaction.com](mailto:hello@evergreenaction.com) so we can make more resources like this in the future. |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3916078/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/?utm_source=digital_template&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evergreen&utm_content=footer)
---

---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3916079/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3916080/87SdQ4wZ)
---|---
And follow our new project, **Hope This Helps.**

name: All On The Line
subject: The fight that makes all other fights possible
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
From reproductive rights to protecting health care, fighting for our values starts with fairness in our democracy
|
---

Peter,
The fight for fair representation belongs to all of us.
Maybe you care about expanding healthcare for the most vulnerable among us. **The fight for fair maps is your fight.**
Perhaps you’re passionate about eliminating child poverty and ensuring every family can put food on their table. **Then the fight for fair maps is your fight.**
Or you could be someone who believes everyone should be able to marry the person they love, regardless of gender identity or sexual orientation. **The fight for fair maps is your fight, too.**
Gerrymandering takes power away from the people. It creates safe seats where some radical politicians never truly have to face their voters. Worse, in these skewed districts, candidates are rewarded for taking extreme positions.
**Put simply, without fair representation, our system gets more extreme, more divided, and less accountable to the people.**
**That’s why All On The Line is building the biggest, broadest coalition possible of people who care deeply about our democracy and are ready to fight for their values. From organizing grassroots supporters to sounding the alarm about power grabs in Texas and beyond — our work has never been more urgent or more vital.**
[**Make a gift today to help win the fight that makes all other progress possible.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114098622/565944415/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_TheFight_email_20250827-AOTL-Tier1-TheFight_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250827-AOTL-Tier1-TheFight_&utm_campaign=TheFight&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlODBhNGVhLTVlODMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qR0UAVlyIxJfYcL9-kVkMx3tiXfXpfibyao37AUfFwM=)
