Make no mistake: If we don’t ultimately defeat attempts to suppress the will of voters, we won’t be able to fight for the issues that matter to us at all.
Reproductive rights.
Humane immigration policy.
Getting money out of politics.
Affordable, accessible health care.
**Fair representation might not always feel as urgent or obvious as these issues. But without it, our democracy gets weaker. That’s why we fight day in, day out for fair maps that are a cornerstone of a healthy democracy.**
[**All On The Line knows there are no off years for redistricting — and 2025 has proven that decisively. Step up with a donation to power our work through this inflection point so we can preserve our democracy and fight for our values in the years to come.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114098629/565944422/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_TheFight_email_20250827-AOTL-Tier1-TheFight_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250827-AOTL-Tier1-TheFight_&utm_campaign=TheFight&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlODBhNGVhLTVlODMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qR0UAVlyIxJfYcL9-kVkMx3tiXfXpfibyao37AUfFwM=)

— All On The Line

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: This is a pivotal moment
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250827-1498-foote&t=1001&akid=1498%2E342411%2EsgpJu4 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We’re staring down a critical end-of-month deadline — and there are just
five days left to meet our goal. Here’s where we stand right now:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250827-movement.eGBTKT&refcode=em20250827-1498&t=1002&akid=1498%2E342411%2EsgpJu4 ]Thermometer at 61%

This isn’t just about the number — it’s about building the momentum and
capacity our people-powered movement needs to win.

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are on the front lines — taking on
corporate greed, defending our rights, tackling the climate crisis, and
building a democracy that works for everyone. But this movement only works
if we all show up.

If we miss this goal, we risk falling behind — giving MAGA extremists and
corporate-backed candidates the upper hand. We can’t afford to scale back
our support for progressives ready to challenge the status quo.

This is a pivotal moment — and we need every voice and every ounce of
momentum we can gather.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250827-movement.eGBTKT&refcode=em20250827-1498&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1498%2E342411%2EsgpJu4 ]Can you pitch in $3 before Sunday’s end-of-month
deadline to help us power this movement forward?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250827-movement.eGBTKT&refcode=em20250827-1498&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1498%2E342411%2EsgpJu4 ]Contribute ››

The real force behind this work? It’s you — everyday people coming
together to demand bold change.

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1498%2E342411%2EsgpJu4

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Nicole Neily, Defending Education
subject: The NEA’s Radical Roadmap: 5 Resolutions Parents Shouldn’t Ignore
body:
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10345432/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvNE5lM3pyZ1RDeA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4Mjc/LbmNsOGE2UzE5OQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNna0JTUXl5aFoxa2Rscw/gaK8wqw/s5m548f38a0)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10345432/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kZWZlbmRpbmctZWQvc2ItYWN0aW9uLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4Mjc/LbmNsOGE2UzE5OQ/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kZWQyNTA3MDEmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1yZXZzaGFyZSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXNiJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxMzM3X3dyMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1sb2dv/gaK8wqw/sfpcd231845)
_**"Once I realized how deeply political our profession had always been, I knew I could no longer stay on the sidelines."**_

— NEA’s 2025 Teacher of the Year

Patriot,

It would be irresponsible for me not to let every American know what the largest teacher union in the country is doing behind closed doors, whether during their annual conference or in their 2025 handbook that they quickly deleted from their website once word began to spread about it.

I’m very familiar with the NEA and I was even shocked to see the resolutions that passed during their summer conference and were included in their 2025 handbook (that they have since deleted from their website)

Below are five of the most alarming resolutions:

1. To "**defend against Trump’s embrace of fascism** by using the term facism [sic] in NEA materials to correctly characterize Donald Trump’s program and actions."

2. To “use existing media channels to oppose any move to eliminate the U.S. Department of Education as an illegal, anti-democratic, and racist attempt to destroy public education and privatize it in the interests of the billionaires.”

3. To support students’ "right to dissent and **organize against Trump’s policies** " and "against ICE raids and deportations."

4. **To push more gender ideology** despite the recent Supreme Court ruling in Mahmoud v. Taylor, to ensure that “all transgender students have access to the bathroom and locker room of their choice” and to protect student confidentiality, **including from their own parents.**

5. To "not use, endorse, or publicize any materials from the Anti-Defamation League (ADL),” continuing an **anti-Israel agenda.**

I created the organization **Defending Education** in 2021 to fight back against the excess of politics and ideology that had made its way into our schools.

We have made a big dent in the problem but there is still a long way to go!

Here’s how you can help:

[I have set a goal to raise $50,000 as part of our Back to School Drive. Can you donate $10, $35, $50, $100, $250, or ANY amount you can generously afford today? Click here to contribute >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Here’s how Defending Education is establishing a quality, non-political education for all students:

**Investigations** : Our groundbreaking investigations expose the harmful political agenda being pushed in schools.

You have likely seen our investigations in the news.
* We recently exposed that 18 states & D.C. are flagrantly disregarding federal directives on Title IX, still letting boys compete against girls and enter their private spaces.
* We uncovered more than $1 billion in Department of Education spending on DEI-related initiatives.
* We revealed how the Biden administration mobilized the FBI against parents advocating for their children at school board meetings.

**Legal Action:** Not only do we expose harmful agendas in schools, we also bring them to court to change policies!
* We filed a lawsuit against the state of Colorado (Defending Education et al. v. Sullivan, et al) after they passed a law to compel schools and students to use preferred pronouns.
* We filed an emergency injunction last year to stop school districts that were violating Title IX by allowing males to use the girls’ bathrooms.
* 22 states and 9 organizations filed amicus briefs in support of our petition to stop compelled pronoun use in Defending Education v. Olentangy Local School District.

**Parent Groups:** Defending Education provides resources and training to parents who want to get involved in their local schools. Our resources and toolkits teach parents how to effectively advocate for change and push back against bias, activism and ideology in their schools.

This is an urgent call to action.

[Please help me reach this critical goal of $50,000 this month as part of our Back to School Drive. Your support will provide the resources needed to remove politics and ideology from the classroom.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate $10](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $35](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate Any Amount](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
We have seen math and reading scores go into free fall because teachers are taking time on the above topics.

Bring education back to its roots.

Thank you,

Nicole Neily
President
Defending Education

_Defending Education is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization and charitable contributions are tax-deductible. Our federal tax identification number is 86-1596460._

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10345432/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4Mjc/LbmNsOGE2UzE5OQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNna0JTUXl5aFoxa2Rscw/gaK8wqw/s2r85378462)

name: Reagan Dunn
subject: An unmitigated disaster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
My worst fears were proven right | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=277e9fa276&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7da1a4681c5b/an-unmitigated-disaster?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=39f8f38d06&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Friend,

Yesterday, the King County Council heard the final report of an audit I called for of the Department of Community and Human Service's taxpayer funded contracts. The results of the audit were jaw dropping.

While grant funding increased from $22 million in 2019-20 to **more than $1.5 BILLION** in 2023-24, accountability was nowhere to be seen. The audit uncovered shocking abuses: potential fraud, payments to unapproved subcontractors, altered or forged documents, overspending, and even taxpayer funds being withdrawn as cash.

**Let me be clear, this waste of taxpayer dollars is an unmitigated disaster.**
[Watch my interview on KOMO News.](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=ea427fbd4e&e=77eef70c61)
[](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=424c61cb67&e=77eef70c61)
I have been warning about a lack of accountability for years, which is why I requested this audit back in 2023. Sadly, my worst fears have been proven right, and I have already introduced legislation to increase accountability and transparency of these funding programs. **[Support my campaign to protect taxpayers!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=612f870c67&e=77eef70c61)**
Friend, when I talk about being the last line of defense in King County, **this is what I mean**. Without my persistent demands for this audit to be conducted, these scandalous findings might have never come to light.

That's why I'm running for reelection -- to fight waste and fraud, protect taxpayers, and keep our communities affordable. But I can't do it alone. **_[Will you chip in $75, $50, or even $25 today to ensure King County has a voice standing up against fraud and waste?](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=c001c01877&e=77eef70c61)_**
This election is too important to ignore! Taxpayers literally _cannot afford_ to continue to pay for higher taxes while funding millions of dollars of fraud and waste. I am fighting to protect your pocketbook at the King County Council. With your support, we can win this November and continue to safeguard taxpayer dollars. \---------------
[DONATE NOW!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=4d8cd6b230&e=77eef70c61)
\---------------- Thank you for your support! Reagan Dunn

---
| | [Follow on Twitter](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=ad1fc62de6&e=77eef70c61) | [ on Facebook](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=cc0af40ae9&e=77eef70c61) |
---

P.O. Box 40417
Bellevue, WA 98015

# Cook still at work as the Fed ignores Trump firing and turns to the courts
President Donald Trump's unprecedented attempt to fire Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook over alleged mortgage fraud **[has sparked a legal battle](https://substack.com/redirect/ae922309-8440-4004-aeb6-a0d09c130261?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as the courts prepare to weigh in.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae922309-8440-4004-aeb6-a0d09c130261?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Fed Defends Independence:** The Federal Reserve has vowed to abide by court rulings, emphasizing that governors can only be removed "for cause," safeguarding monetary policy from political interference.
* **Cook 's Legal Stand:** Lisa Cook, backed by attorney Abbe Lowell, plans to sue, arguing Trump's firing lacks legal basis, as she continues her duties at the Fed.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/18aabcd3-673a-47d6-888c-91fd5a0af39a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump 's Strategic Move:** Trump aims to reshape the Fed's board, potentially gaining a majority to push for lower interest rates, with Stephen Miran nominated to replace an existing governor vacancy.
* **Market Uncertainty Looms:** Some analysts warn Trump's actions could destabilize markets, increasing economic uncertainty if the Fed's independence is compromised. The Supreme Court will likely to decide the outcome of Cook's future.

## Why did Trump fire Cook in the first place?
President Donald Trump **[fired Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook,](https://substack.com/redirect/d1375704-15c0-4f67-b502-bf88d14a5613?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** alleging mortgage fraud after she claimed two properties as primary residences, sparking a legal battle over her unprecedented ousting from the central bank.
* **Criminal Referral Sparks Controversy:** Federal Housing Finance Agency Director Bill Pulte accused Cook of falsifying mortgage documents for homes in Michigan and Georgia, prompting a Justice Department investigation.
* **Cook Denies Allegations:** Cook, the first Black woman Fed governor, insists she won't resign and plans to sue, arguing Trump lacks legal authority to fire her without cause.
* **Legal Limits Questioned:** The Federal Reserve Act allows presidential removal only for malfeasance, raising doubts about Trump's move, which could set a precedent for Fed independence.
* **Dem 's Latest Political Football:** Critics, including Sen. Elizabeth Warren, call the firing an "authoritarian power grab," linking it to Trump's push for lower interest rates and control over the Fed.

# Desperate DC shop owner says teens steal from her store every day - "I'm afraid!"
The White House **[released a video featuring Tumika,](https://substack.com/redirect/506763d5-234b-4aad-ae4d-b6e380474aa2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** a D.C. store owner who says teens stealing from her business has become a daily occurrence and that she's afraid to walk to her car after work, with crime becoming so severe that employees have been attacked.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/01e18175-678b-4c5b-9daa-512ef41e96b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Sometimes I be afraid to walk out this door and go to my car," Tumika explained in the video. "People work hard for their business. I'm tired of kids looting. They stealing every day. Even adults come in here and steal - they walk beside the kids, the kids stuff in their pockets - what kind of parenting are you doing?"
"A lot of teens need to be dealt with and [be held] accountable for their actions, because they know right from wrong. If their parents can't be accountable for them, I mean the government needs to step in," she added.
* **Community Approach:** Despite the ongoing theft, Tumika tries to combat crime with generosity by offering free items to hungry kids and telling them there's no need to steal, but she believes parents and the government need to hold teens accountable for their actions when parents fail to do so.
* **Federal Response:** Following a severe beating of a former DOGE employee in an attempted carjacking, President Trump directed the Secretary of Defense to mobilize the D.C. National Guard and federal law enforcement to fight crime in the capital, with plans to potentially expand this approach to other cities like Chicago.
* **Political Pushback:** Trump's crime-fighting measures face strong opposition from Democrats who call his concerns "manufactured" and have introduced congressional resolutions to reverse his federal takeover, while the White House argues that critics and media are dismissing real problems affecting business owners like Tumika.

# Big Money Engagement: This is how much Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are worth
Pop superstar Taylor Swift and NFL champion Travis Kelce **[announced their engagement](https://substack.com/redirect/0fb88344-b58e-41ab-9d9c-adb2af5e218b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on August 26, 2025, in a romantic garden proposal, boasting a combined net worth of $1.67 billion.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0fb88344-b58e-41ab-9d9c-adb2af5e218b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Swift 's Billionaire Status**: Taylor Swift's $1.6 billion fortune, driven by her record-breaking Eras Tour and music catalog, makes her the world's richest female musician, dwarfing Kelce's wealth.
* **Kelce 's Diverse Ventures**: Travis Kelce's $70 million net worth includes $111 million in NFL earnings and $80 million from endorsements, podcasts, and film roles like _Happy Gilmore 2_.
* **Engagement Ring Value** : Kelce proposed with a 13-carat diamond ring, estimated at $650,000, reflecting Swift's lucky number and their high-profile romance.
* **Cultural Power Couple** : Their combined wealth places Swift and Kelce among elite celebrity couples, rivaled only by Jay-Z and Beyonce in fame and financial clout.

# Trump aligned 1789 Capital just invested millions in prediction company Polymarket
Donald Trump Jr. has **[joined betting firm Polymarket's advisory board](https://substack.com/redirect/64d4c61d-fe94-455f-a753-f4d4d5ba7aac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as 1789 Capital invests millions, boosting the crypto prediction platform's U.S. comeback amid surging interest in betting on politics and global events.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/64d4c61d-fe94-455f-a753-f4d4d5ba7aac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Prediction Markets Gain Traction:** Polymarket, founded in 2020, processed $6 billion in trades this year, offering bets on topics like Federal Reserve decisions and political outcomes.
* **Regulatory Challenges Overcome:** After a 2022 CFTC fine, Polymarket acquired QCEX for $112 million, securing a U.S. license to expand legally.
* **1789 Capital 's Mission:** Led by Omeed Malik, the firm promotes "American exceptionalism," aligning with Trump Jr.'s role and conservative investment strategies.
* **Critics Question Ethics:** Some liken prediction markets to gambling, raising concerns over speculation on sensitive issues like elections.

# Wall Street awaits Nvidia's Q2 Earnings report at market close with bated breath
Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang navigation of China's chip market with a 15% revenue-sharing deal is **[fueling anticipation for Wednesday's Q2 earnings](https://substack.com/redirect/16321242-cf15-4ef4-a30f-f39aec88c4a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** amid a booming AI-driven transformation.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d895d5fb-f6b1-4490-bcc0-de0338cfc8f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Blackwell Ultra Awaited:** Nvidia's Blackwell Ultra GPU, set to ship in late 2025, is expected to drive significant growth, with production already sold out for demanding AI workloads.
* **China Sales Challenges:** H20 chip sales could add $2-3 billion to revenue, but export restrictions and a 15% U.S. tax may limit Nvidia's China market gains.
* **Hyperscaler Dependency Risk:** Half of Nvidia's AI capital spending comes from AI hyperscalers (such as Amazon, Microsoft and Google) making it vulnerable to macroeconomic shifts and unpredictable AI industry trends.
* **Analyst Revenue Outlook:** Wall Street expects Nvidia's Q3 revenue to hit $52.7 billion, a 50% rise, driven by strong AI chip demand and Huang's strategic global partnerships.

* * *
* * *
# California's High Speed Rail "boondoggle" just had another $175m cut from its budget
Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy **[slashed $175 million](https://substack.com/redirect/166abf8b-25b9-4366-9ad7-6fdbba2f2d43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from California's high-speed rail project Tuesday, escalating tensions with state leaders who denounced the Trump administration's move as an illegal attack on Central Valley progress.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/166abf8b-25b9-4366-9ad7-6fdbba2f2d43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Project Costs Soar** : California's high-speed rail, initially budgeted at $33 billion, now faces a $22 billion price tag for a scaled-down 170-mile Merced-to-Bakersfield route, with completion projected for 2033.
* **Duffy Criticizes Mismanagement** : Duffy called the project a "boondoggle," citing $15 billion spent without a single piece of high-speed track laid, prompting a Federal Railroad Administration review of all related grants.
* **California Fights Back** : The California High-Speed Rail Authority plans to purchase track components to advance construction, while state officials sue, arguing the funding cut violates legally binding agreements.
* **Political Tensions Escalate** : Governor Newsom labeled the defunding a "politically motivated" attack, while Duffy's op-ed accused Newsom of incompetence, intensifying the clash between state and federal leadership.

Wall Street awaits Nvidia's Q2 Earnings report at market close with bated breath Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang navigation of China's chip market with a 15% revenue-sharing deal is amid a booming AI-driven transformation. Blackwell Ultra Awaited: Nvidia's Blackwell Ultra GPU, set to ship in late 2025, is expected to drive significant growth, with production already sold out for demanding AI workloads. China Sales Challenges: H20 chip sales could add $2-3 billion to revenue, but export restrictions and a 15% U.S. tax may limit Nvidia's China market gains. Hyperscaler Dependency Risk: Half of Nvidia's AI capital spending comes from AI hyperscalers (such as Amazon, Microsoft and Google) making it vulnerable to macroeconomic shifts and unpredictable AI industry trends. Analyst Revenue Outlook: Wall Street expects Nvidia's Q3 revenue to hit $52.7 billion, a 50% rise, driven by strong AI chip demand and Huang's strategic global partnerships. California's High Speed Rail "boondoggle" just had another $175m cut from its budget Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy from California's high-speed rail project Tuesday, escalating tensions with state leaders who denounced the Trump administration's move as an illegal attack on Central Valley progress. | | ---|---|--- Project Costs Soar : California's high-speed rail, initially budgeted at $33 billion, now faces a $22 billion price tag for a scaled-down 170-mile Merced-to-Bakersfield route, with completion projected for 2033. Duffy Criticizes Mismanagement : Duffy called the project a "boondoggle," citing $15 billion spent without a single piece of high-speed track laid, prompting a Federal Railroad Administration review of all related grants. California Fights Back : The California High-Speed Rail Authority plans to purchase track components to advance construction, while state officials sue, arguing the funding cut violates legally binding agreements. Political Tensions Escalate : Governor Newsom labeled the defunding a "politically motivated" attack, while Duffy's op-ed accused Newsom of incompetence, intensifying the clash between state and federal leadership. clean_body: | | | | | | | This is urgent. Our end-of-month deadline hits Sunday at midnight and my team just told me the truth: We are 137 new donors short of our 500 goal. Every new donor is proof that Americans are fed up with the Left’s reckless agenda. Every donor is one more patriot raising their hand and saying, “I will not surrender this nation.” I’m asking you personally: will you be one of the final 137? Be donor #364 out of 500: [[DONATE $10]]() [[DONATE $25]]() [[DONATE $50]]() [[DONATE $100]]() [[DONATE $250]]() Thank you for never backing down. Let’s finish this together. | | In Liberty, Josh Hawley | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | |

name: Rachel Barnett
subject: I get it, so I'll make this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Hi Peter,
I’m Rachel Barnett, Maxine’s Finance Director.
I know—there’s so much happening in the world and you’re tired of politicians asking for money. I get it, so I’ll make this as quick as possible.
Here’s the deal: campaigns like ours need to keep the lights on because we’re up against the GOP’s machine. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250827_EOM2_actrs]
Big money doesn’t just influence policy—it drowns out the voices of everyday people because those in power answer to the donors who bought their seats, not us. And the GOP has no problem taking money from megadonors, corporations, and super PACs who will sell out working families without a second thought.
But that’s not Maxine.
Dr. Dexter first ran for office because she saw the injustices in our medical system firsthand. As a physician, she’s watched families go bankrupt and people suffer because care was out of reach. She knew she had to make the system work for everyone, not just the wealthy few.
Maxine ran for office to protect our bodily autonomy, the air we breathe, and the health care that pays for life-saving procedures because she knew she needed to get people to listen and act. And she’s doing it.
Here are three of the 20+ pieces of health legislation she’s co-sponsored:
🩻 Medicare for All Act
🚸 Children’s Health Protection Act of 2025
🏥 Right to Contraception Act
Can we count on your support to help us build a bench of leaders like Maxine Dexter who actually care about people, families, and communities? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250827_EOM2_actrs]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=x_250827_EOM2_actrs] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=x_250827_EOM2_actrs]

Yours,
Rachel
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250827_EOM2_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250827_EOM2_actrs] Maxine Dexter is a critical care physician with decades of experience using facts and following science to help her patients.
Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare.
To learn more about Maxine, visit MaxineForOregon.com [https://maxinefororegon.com/] .

I get it, so I’ll make this as quick as possible. Here’s the deal: campaigns like ours need to keep the lights on because we’re up against the GOP’s machine. [] Big money doesn’t just influence policy—it drowns out the voices of everyday people because those in power answer to the donors who bought their seats, not us. And the GOP has no problem taking money from megadonors, corporations, and super PACs who will sell out working families without a second thought. But that’s not Maxine. Dr. Dexter first ran for office because she saw the injustices in our medical system firsthand. As a physician, she’s watched families go bankrupt and people suffer because care was out of reach. She knew she had to make the system work for everyone, not just the wealthy few. Maxine ran for office to protect our bodily autonomy, the air we breathe, and the health care that pays for life-saving procedures because she knew she needed to get people to listen and act. And she’s doing it. Here are three of the 20+ pieces of health legislation she’s co-sponsored: 🩻 Medicare for All Act 🚸 Children’s Health Protection Act of 2025 🏥 Right to Contraception Act Can we count on your support to help us build a bench of leaders like Maxine Dexter who actually care about people, families, and communities? name: Ted Cruz
subject: I hope you’ll read this right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
I’m going all in on helping Senate Republicans retain control of the chamber next November

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._cdQzMmx2C-aDQ)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, I'll level with you - we will have difficulty keeping our hold on the Senate majority next November if you don't start involving yourself with the day-to-day business of the politics of it all. For starters, were you aware that there are now THREE OPEN SENATE seats up for grabs where Republicans can go on offense? _Michigan_ -> retirement of liberal Sen. Gary Peters. Pickup opportunity no. 1.

MICHIGAN is a state President Trump WON in 2024, and withSenator Gary Peters out of the way --- Republicans should beprimed to sweep to victory in the Great Lakes State. _New Hampshire _-> retirement of liberal Sen. Jean Shaheen. Pickup opportunity no. 2. NEW HAMPSHIRE is a state that just elected my former Senate colleague, Republican Kelly Ayotte, to the governorship lastyear, and with Senator Jeanne Shaheen stepping down --- Republicans can WIN in the Granite State. _Minnesota_ -> retirement of liberal Sen. Tina Smith. Pickup opportunity no. 3. MINNESOTA is a state ready to make a change following failedDemocrat rule from the likes of lunatic liberals such as Governor Tim Walz, and with Senator Tina Smith opting toretire --- this signals Republicans have the momentum to finally flip the Gopher State. These three seats each present Republicans with a unique and exciting opportunity to compete in contests where we don't have to run our candidates against incumbent senators running for reelection. There hasn't been an open seat in New Hampshire in 15 years! And in Minnesota, there hasn't been an open seat since 2006! We have such opportunities this cycle, Fname, but our good fortune won't mean anything if you don't get involved. Do you have two minutes to answer some critically important questions for me right now? If you answered "yes" in your head, then please take my 2025 Conservative Census right now. **[< <Begin Census Questionnaire>>](http://trk.tedcruz.)** As you know, I'm no stranger to being outspent by the left. I've been outspent in every race I've run, and won every time. _But I 've never been outmaneuvered. _ I know how imperative it is to invest early on in an election, pouring resources into defining not only an opponent before they can define themselves to voters but also oneself before an opponent can define you. So that's why I'm asking YOU to take _TWO_ important actions right now: **_ONE_****:** Complete your _CONSERVATIVE CENSUS_ to give our GOP Senators a game plan for now until next November.

_**TWO:**_ Consider contributing all that you can to giveU.S. Senate Republicans the critical resources needed to _flip_ _all three open Senate seats_.

You may not think completing questionnaires like this one are important, but I can tell you they are critical to our success. If you're willing to offer your valuable time to us by answering several of our questions via email outreach, then you're highly likely to vote in next year's midterm elections, and that means we need to know where you stand on the issues of the day. **[< <BEGIN CONSERVATIVE CENSUS NOW>>](http://trk.tedcruz.)** As you know, midterm elections are historically less favorablefor the party in the White House. That means the odds are stacked against us, but that shouldserve as extra motivation to all of us America First Republicans whoworked so hard last year to get President Trump back into theWhite House. No matter your decision today, you can count on me to hit thecampaign trail early and often to help defeat the Democrats and elect more Conservatives to the Senate. **[< <BEGIN CONSERVATIVE CENSUS NOW>>](http://trk.tedcruz._A)** For liberty,Ted Cruz P.S. Please, **_I need you to join me in this race to replace THREE_**** _retiring liberal Senators with THREE Pro-Trump Conservatives._**
---

Houston, TX 77265

body:
Republicans in Texas are currently redrawing the map for U.S. House districts to correct the congressional map that the Biden Department of Justice insisted on after the 2020 census. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=509baaae34b34720bae63b4fc6573ea5&_e=JJFOJv3uHDLcXIIQ4yE8WB7wyf18vqc9J4YEC1mVBGdiL5XT1Pmy_roh2b16X63l_Oo4ZVRNPNLMHQFzzqC-8mAZ5loLYfgQc-rKvw77pkj8rDfTuEqQewrqnbOxhsCvoSBN9zwcXsjeoyYPx948b7F6JBftAwTmYrYuEh7pnzHmN3FfT0YwnIvKHtLE_EKwcAXCm5KdtmKuvquxx-DyehPqyfbTD6nfhP4ZHCu82A9mpnReae3l2qF5NPLKRE1lN3Aycd-EqLqAR_Ldc95-kl6NsOulJT53czhYUs-N3OnKhpBTT8aWvd698iq9Iefa3J5LvA4rinCAdivUd0OOul10ztMwpsbGgxS1Jl21KmWOkEGqgSB9HPkXRdMoPdOLrmoUkEgOFONLM6k0l-zmOuoWx-MKcP8nwP6CKvs4HTdNWtm2huF8J-Q3hnVpvtXliI30UgoRcP97XtjIipA0WH04tOsNDL5F0dRpN-h4rndjJI9K6EJRap3aIH6I9FZRgh1fv8mkibgfp8LJSH_ZgxkVyiMnVryMLs73h_OorSLenv1273x9TuYfANdGPN_bz7kb47JadW4xH0ctLBqM9B2uqmw2-Hc7KIb9dPmXscX7F2nHI2DWZr_xJWdJbDQ4yTt5p2NNQsk1id_dESXusfPI8-t3Zfw8SAR-FyHIHX9_ky_4M5KyQGxajn-Vf_AZ0mgsoI45oBiZ9BndE8pUGqZkr2Oyd-E7sfUr6kD4QOguIYowunv-1op-fCN4OAGP0gMkWmmSAIrsjHmcyFAsGA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

_**I need you to read this carefully**_ — what’s happening with redistricting right now could reshape Congress for the next decade, and Democrats are doing everything they can to rig the game before the next election.

**After the 2020 Census** , Biden’s Department of Justice forced states like Texas to redraw their congressional districts to help Democrats. Now, under the Trump administration, the DOJ has reversed course — declaring those maps to be unconstitutional gerrymanders.

**Texas Republicans are taking action — redrawing the map in a special session, and the result could be up to 5 new GOP seats in the U.S. House.**

That’s why Democrats are panicking. **Gavin Newsom is already threatening to redraw California’s map in retaliation. And Eric Holder and Barack Obama — through their pet project, the National Democratic Redistricting Committee** — are mobilizing in New York, New Jersey, Minnesota, and Washington to offset our gains.

This isn’t a drill. It’s a coordinated attempt to rig the system before voters even head to the polls.

**[Will you chip in $5, $15, or even $50 right now to help us expose and fight back against these Democrat power grabs?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=509baaae34b34720bae63b4fc6573ea5&_e=JJFOJv3uHDLcXIIQ4yE8WB7wyf18vqc9J4YEC1mVBGdiL5XT1Pmy_roh2b16X63l_Oo4ZVRNPNLMHQFzzqC-8mAZ5loLYfgQc-rKvw77pkj8rDfTuEqQewrqnbOxhsCvoSBN9zwcXsjeoyYPx948b7F6JBftAwTmYrYuEh7pnzHmN3FfT0YwnIvKHtLE_EKwcAXCm5KdtmKuvquxx-DyehPqyfbTD6nfhP4ZHCu82A9mpnReae3l2qF5NPLKRE1lN3Aycd-EqLqAR_Ldc95-ku-Rkzl-ZVvBY9G5eioNi91Hj_5AotRL_zJjsRoWA7C-dycRvM5DZHcWjKIdF9hYMbT09xzVKzRxW2KZGAiJ6wGXDwB2gyPRRCsTg8goXN6RlXDHzybIbCH0xbC7kUXmAr5KLVycgCJ4yZ4x5nKPkDZvz2VH-5nJ7zBq7d-XbwJC0I2R1XoHDt1thuzPhFwMrrBjeWfdx2Z8PmhSf53zvdRn7uckVfZHYP-yLAr-keEvZ81xfHnL4nXh5BbrrwL8aptnR7OLRdeIMPmreDF-WC4s5lEQWl2cw4Rb0NPSTDMbsoY-gtA1eHDjyQ-zwjyy0WAWBPTRvlPHfKNt1ba6hiNec0Mtvw7Kcw9vSs7vmMZwsYAay7xa81ZISnrPwMCRCYv-hn9woI26vVXDAqADvXE5SL32XtckP1DaMmIVeC35vaE9tyTmhcQiPjzSTxWCs4zY4s-rVAln-gjEJd2DlXfMKkm1DsHvDS0taWEMcV2b0mwIPXPJsIHfEIYVLC61Rg%3D%3D)**
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=509baaae34b34720bae63b4fc6573ea5&_e=JJFOJv3uHDLcXIIQ4yE8WB7wyf18vqc9J4YEC1mVBGdiL5XT1Pmy_roh2b16X63l_Oo4ZVRNPNLMHQFzzqC-8mAZ5loLYfgQc-rKvw77pkj8rDfTuEqQewrqnbOxhsCvoSBN9zwcXsjeoyYPx948b7F6JBftAwTmYrYuEh7pnzHmN3FfT0YwnIvKHtLE_EKwcAXCm5KdtmKuvquxx-DyehPqyfbTD6nfhP4ZHCu82A9mpnReae3l2qF5NPLKRE1lN3Aycd-EqLqAR_Ldc95-kmz0aH9QffK3_doNC_fBU51vvxSssyhEPGHRelyPz0guOLG74n19V4NXKTYb2Kuh6lRu-47i5y3MvA4W7RA7OXLLOW2EnaFyZF5CbWYb5mfWgirTHEO-9ce0oEauxwlzrI0uZ7tNwYn-80C0PoBOwKMjttWaYTxORQfoPiG2jlblyhnzXHLu6pKDleI6cRmAwwJznUZgtk4U5tIReFBHxRGDRrJTVwK9m7-AeQlXoNmFIye9sKCtBPZD_LZog5qyvcPx6K3JH6p3jSvTgCfBZVphlnFeHuGTc0eZ1r3KE17ZUbwZnwyrXFADbXQOOlWeZCCLLY-S8Z2aAxPM6O09NquD5xRkcUdjRc9zqWDmIA14RPbsgx8_4T6pxxkuqU1mjvX2gjdolbrwAS46jqvnPWO7LnIuAsIIpClpQBRF8HSnfd8yHBgwBR9nkxLKDk1hXrZCIXynxgssXKO7f2Mb-wdyTzDoWvxXqCFDLJ6qZzY_Gi48usNW_JyL8eNOQGm35w%3D%3D)
[**STOP THE DEMOCRAT GERRYMANDER**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=509baaae34b34720bae63b4fc6573ea5&_e=JJFOJv3uHDLcXIIQ4yE8WB7wyf18vqc9J4YEC1mVBGdiL5XT1Pmy_roh2b16X63l_Oo4ZVRNPNLMHQFzzqC-8mAZ5loLYfgQc-rKvw77pkj8rDfTuEqQewrqnbOxhsCvoSBN9zwcXsjeoyYPx948b7F6JBftAwTmYrYuEh7pnzHmN3FfT0YwnIvKHtLE_EKwcAXCm5KdtmKuvquxx-DyehPqyfbTD6nfhP4ZHCu82A9mpnReae3l2qF5NPLKRE1lN3Aycd-EqLqAR_Ldc95-kpAnETZwWYX0HZBHcQmhs1WKyGcBMCUHS5WWZo31Fy7vJXn53y0P_EJLcIP-N8mlQ7iZQhWpOPB2pIUtebuRWizvXqZinvckduzFdfwJlw2tGohnTi8ocIkUmlEh29bvdwUdWaYP5r3eFkDTk-dXHeeLgBwVBuciBfTpr6p3cJiHBhtm6JV4IjPB4zoLzS9Hro5sxVBjDHaG1tPG4FXwrmy47TLP6mdAmQvCZEuaLP8Rvs9DRHIGk97WVMkaMYi9EvaK2kvU32F1AcwwmEbthB34OUxRWmOe40R4XVULoYRUh5MQyWIDXbvNwnZyQphpYUO4DNWNa7LmO2NsR7p8M8TfE5GZuI-HkIQIA82Phxq6JeqOuUoLse5x26p9Cu-nuAvKw9CLkKCwl4YslAY_LbEOOA179AhEvPFGHp0_3fD--WxIwRTEAJJjH0NSMLTChGx4gkzlgXPdAQejd4VMnUoOUOHYWRG3dhtku9umg7eKUj30j2Ysk9OQMlBAbEKaFg%3D%3D)
Democrats have already raised over $52 million to fund their efforts — with help from Obama’s old Organizing for Action network and the Hollywood elites.

We must match their energy if we want to preserve the Republican majority and defend fair representation.

I may not serve in the House, but as a U.S. Senator, I know how critical it is that we hold the line — because if we lose the House, the Senate won’t have the votes needed to deliver for President Trump’s agenda.

clean_body: Republicans in Texas are currently redrawing the map for U.S. House districts to correct the congressional map that the Biden Department of Justice insisted on after the 2020 census. | Fellow Conservative, I need you to read this carefully — what’s happening with redistricting right now could reshape Congress for the next decade, and Democrats are doing everything they can to rig the game before the next election. After the 2020 Census , Biden’s Department of Justice forced states like Texas to redraw their congressional districts to help Democrats. Now, under the Trump administration, the DOJ has reversed course — declaring those maps to be unconstitutional gerrymanders. Texas Republicans are taking action — redrawing the map in a special session, and the result could be up to 5 new GOP seats in the U.S. House. That’s why Democrats are panicking. Gavin Newsom is already threatening to redraw California’s map in retaliation. And Eric Holder and Barack Obama — through their pet project, the National Democratic Redistricting Committee — are mobilizing in New York, New Jersey, Minnesota, and Washington to offset our gains. This isn’t a drill. It’s a coordinated attempt to rig the system before voters even head to the polls. Democrats have already raised over $52 million to fund their efforts — with help from Obama’s old Organizing for Action network and the Hollywood elites. We must match their energy if we want to preserve the Republican majority and defend fair representation. I may not serve in the House, but as a U.S. Senator, I know how critical it is that we hold the line — because if we lose the House, the Senate won’t have the votes needed to deliver for President Trump’s agenda. , and raise awareness across the country. Can you rush a donation right now to help stop Democrats from trying to rig the map in their favor? We’re facing threats in California, New York, and beyond — and we cannot let them go unanswered. So when the President sees the writing on the wall for next year’s midterm elections, it might not be too surprising that he’s asked a compliant Republican Party to change the rules wherever possible to give themselves an unfair advantage. As Republicans in Texas and other states attempt to invalidate the opportunity for voters to make their voices heard, California has responded. name: Team Downing
subject: Barack Obama COMMITTED TREASON!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Explosive docs show Obama officials pushed false Russia narrative. Is it time for indictments?

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Peter,
Barack Obama has just been named in a criminal referral tied to the origins of the Trump–Russia collusion hoax.
[According to newly declassified documents released by Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard](https://trk.emails.troydowning.), Obama and top members of his administration may have manufactured intelligence to create the narrative that Donald Trump colluded with Russia, despite knowing no such evidence existed.
**Now, the Department of Justice has launched a "strike force" to investigate. **
With Attorney General Pam Bondi and FBI Director Kash Patel leading the charge, every shred of evidence is being examined, and no name is off-limits.
_Obama. Brennan. Clapper. Comey. Rice. Clinton. McCabe._
The list goes on.
So we’re asking you, Peter, a top conservative supporter: [Should Barack Obama be investigated, indicted, and arrested?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[CAST YOUR VOTE NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._M7u2FPiNGuiXhiVg)This may be the biggest political scandal in American history, and justice cannot be selective.
If the evidence points to crimes, no one – **_not even a former President_** — is above the law.
Time is short, and the DOJ strike force is moving fast. Please submit your critical input before 11:59 p.m.
Thank you,
**GOP Alerts (via Team Downing)**| |

| Peter,

Republicans are banking on us being so overwhelmed by the nonstop chaos in the news that we stop fighting back. When they’re rigging maps and silencing voices like they are in Texas, they’re counting on us to give up.

But our August deadline is just four days away and right now, we’re still falling short of our goal. If we don’t close the gap, we’ll have fewer resources to train women, fewer programs to prepare them to run, and fewer leaders ready to take the fight directly to Republicans.

We cannot hand them that victory.

[_**Can you make your first contribution of $25 to help us train the women who will fight back?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114103058/565957618/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmY2M3ZWYwLTY5ODMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zIvRRpHcc7e3YN3wsHunzxOlKiT1d4TyDshXQW-_Piw=)

clean_body: They want us to give up. We’re not going anywhere. | = | Peter, Republicans are banking on us being so overwhelmed by the nonstop chaos in the news that we stop fighting back. When they’re rigging maps and silencing voices like they are in Texas, they’re counting on us to give up. But our August deadline is just four days away and right now, we’re still falling short of our goal. If we don’t close the gap, we’ll have fewer resources to train women, fewer programs to prepare them to run, and fewer leaders ready to take the fight directly to Republicans. We cannot hand them that victory. = | = Every dollar we raise in these next 4 days will go toward building the movement Republicans are desperate to stop. They want us to give up. We’re not going anywhere. Ashley Floyd Senior Development Director * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

name: George Whitesides
subject: Mike Garcia is back
body:
Peter,

I wanted to make sure you saw the news that we officially have our first Republican opponent in CA-27.

**[Before I ask you to contribute $3 in response, I need to explain why this announcement is so significant.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114103566/565959144/-1384072709?refcode=em-8.27.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWUwYWQ3ZS02YjgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gRgaD_ueefKxObMm3X5POPAymmcKPJ2hrWLoOquK3A8=)**

**This new challenger is stepping into the race with a full-throated endorsement from none other than Mike Garcia -- the MAGA Republican I defeated last year.**

Since leaving office, Garcia hasn’t backed down from Trump’s worst ideas. He’s spent the last seven months defending Trump’s reckless tariff policies that nearly tanked our economy. Now, he wants to handpick the person who’ll bring that chaos back to Congress.

This isn’t just about one endorsement. It’s about what’s coming: a national Republican machine lining up behind a candidate who’s ready to rubber-stamp Trump’s agenda -- no matter the cost to working families.

**This first re-election is the most important fight of my career.** We need to send a message -- _right now_ \-- that CA-27 won’t go back to a Trump lackey who favors the wealthy while cutting support for everyone else.

Not while families are still struggling with housing costs, healthcare premiums, and wildfire threats. Not while billionaires get tax breaks and working people are told to tighten their belts. Not while the so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” is stripping health care and essential programs from millions of Americans.

The GOP sees a first-term Democrat in one of the most competitive districts in the country. If we show strength now, we can set the tone for the rest of this race, but I need you with me:

**[Will you rush a donation of $3 or anything you can to help us fight back and defend CA-27?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114103567/565959145/-1384072709?refcode=em-8.27.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWUwYWQ3ZS02YjgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gRgaD_ueefKxObMm3X5POPAymmcKPJ2hrWLoOquK3A8=)**

Thanks for standing with me,

George

****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114103568/565959146/-1384072709?refcode=em-8.27.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWUwYWQ3ZS02YjgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gRgaD_ueefKxObMm3X5POPAymmcKPJ2hrWLoOquK3A8=)****

Newhall, CA 91322

body:
The Trump administration is gutting our disaster response system to power its mass deportation machine.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114103888/565960081/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-08-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY5YTZjMS02YzgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UI4Zx7ywYUDvoZJrczbqZfGaZ4c20gxDXanxBBIzRKI=)
---
| Peter,

The Trump administration is gutting our disaster response system to power its mass deportation machine.

According to new reporting from _The Washington Post_ , more than 100 FEMA employees have been reassigned to ICE — not to respond to floods or fires, but to process new hires for Trump’s anti-immigrant agenda.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114103890/565960083/-177200256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY5YTZjMS02YzgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UI4Zx7ywYUDvoZJrczbqZfGaZ4c20gxDXanxBBIzRKI=&emci=b7acce28-4b83-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=7ef9a6c1-6c83-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=6681226)
FEMA is a critical assistance program. We need more workers in disaster response, not more wrongful deportations.

As someone who represents communities vulnerable to wildfires and climate disasters, I know what happens when FEMA is understaffed. It delays relief. It costs lives.

clean_body: The Trump administration is gutting our disaster response system to power its mass deportation machine. | = | Peter, The Trump administration is gutting our disaster response system to power its mass deportation machine. According to new reporting from The Washington Post , more than 100 FEMA employees have been reassigned to ICE — not to respond to floods or fires, but to process new hires for Trump’s anti-immigrant agenda. FEMA is a critical assistance program. We need more workers in disaster response, not more wrongful deportations. As someone who represents communities vulnerable to wildfires and climate disasters, I know what happens when FEMA is understaffed. It delays relief. It costs lives. | Add your name now to demand that the Trump administration stop using FEMA as a pawn in its deportation agenda. body:
Republicans in Congress will say anything to distract from their Big Sh**ty Bill and tax breaks for billionaires.

| Our country is facing an affordability crisis, a climate emergency, and a flailing authoritarian regime. **But the #1 issue on House Republicans’ minds? They changed the Cracker Barrel logo! 😭** Republicans in Congress will say anything to distract from their Big Sh**ty Bill and tax breaks for billionaires. They have more to say about a restaurant rebrand than they do about helping our neighbors afford gas, groceries, rent, and healthcare. So, we’re wasting no time. We’re starting NOW to organize here in Washington and in our adopted swing district to elect leaders who care more about working people and less about culture war nonsense. **If you support our efforts, please donate $25 or any amount before our end-of-month fundraising deadline:_[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rs_er4c_fr_q32025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114103977/565960462/1134054401?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.27_CrackerBarrel_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2MxYmY0Zi02ZDgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=go7YTFQEKKhrQLOOyfnQBH6j9BL7sVvNLE-3-GGTQlk=)_**

| Hi Peter,

**FIRST:** We launched this campaign with one goal: **to flip PA-07 and bring real, people-powered change to Congress.**

body:
https://www.movement4freedom.com/home [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home]
Hi Peter,
Our democracy is on life support! If we’re going to make it to the next election, we need to start working right this minute, and that means we need your help. Can you contribute $5 or more to our movement today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250827_trumppetition_act&amount=5]
Trump just laid out his next outlandish and illegal move: he wants Republicans to take 100 more seats in Congress.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250827_trumppetition_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250827_trumppetition_act]
This is following his “big win” in Texas, where Republicans just rammed through a new redistricting map that could hand the GOP five extra Congressional seats . Now, other red states are lining up to follow.
On top of that, Trump is tying these plans directly to his push to end mail-in voting, in a direct assault on our democracy.
This isn’t politics as usual; it’s a coordinated attack to lock extremists into power, gut abortion rights, and silence women, immigrant communities, and LGBTQ+ voices for a generation. Our democracy is literally on life support.
Movement for Freedom is mobilizing voters in the communities Trump and his allies want to erase. But building a movement takes allies, accomplices, and resources, and we need you to stand with us.
Peter, ADD YOUR NAME to say you’ll fight back against Trump’s extremist plan and to stop the real steal! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FIyl_DkQ4k6ttucE2Km0kw2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FIyl_DkQ4k6ttucE2Km0kw2]
And after you sign, please consider donating today. Movement for Freedom is on the ground organizing, training leaders, and mobilizing voters to fight back, but we cannot do it without funding >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250827_trumppetition_act]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250827_trumppetition_act]

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, Our democracy is on life support! If we’re going to make it to the next election, we need to start working right this minute, and that means we need your help. Can you contribute $5 or more to our movement today? [] Trump just laid out his next outlandish and illegal move: he wants Republicans to take 100 more seats in Congress. [] This is following his “big win” in Texas, where Republicans just rammed through a new redistricting map that could hand the GOP five extra Congressional seats . Now, other red states are lining up to follow. On top of that, Trump is tying these plans directly to his push to end mail-in voting, in a direct assault on our democracy. This isn’t politics as usual; it’s a coordinated attack to lock extremists into power, gut abortion rights, and silence women, immigrant communities, and LGBTQ+ voices for a generation. Our democracy is literally on life support. Movement for Freedom is mobilizing voters in the communities Trump and his allies want to erase. But building a movement takes allies, accomplices, and resources, and we need you to stand with us. Peter, ADD YOUR NAME to say you’ll fight back against Trump’s extremist plan and to stop the real steal! [] ADD YOUR NAME [] And after you sign, please consider donating today. Movement for Freedom is on the ground organizing, training leaders, and mobilizing voters to fight back, but we cannot do it without funding >> [] DONATE TODAY [] Trump wants 100 seats. Let’s show him millions of us are ready to stop him. — Movement for Freedom [] Movement for Freedom is a campaign, founded by former Congresswoman Cori Bush, that calls for radically transforming how we build justice, safety, and liberation through love and solidarity. name: PA Dems
subject: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are engaged!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

We’re sure you’ve already heard the news, but here at PA Dems, we are shouting it from the rooftops: **Pennsylvania native Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are engaged!!**

At a time when it seems like all the headlines are negative, we are happy to hear about this Love Story. But we know All Too Well that even in moments like these, we can’t lose focus on the work we are doing.

That’s why today, we are asking you to help us meet another major moment for our state – November’s Supreme Court elections. We’re working around the clock _(yes, even now)_ to make sure we are Ready For It this November, but we need your help.

clean_body: | | Peter, We’re sure you’ve already heard the news, but here at PA Dems, we are shouting it from the rooftops: Pennsylvania native Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are engaged!! At a time when it seems like all the headlines are negative, we are happy to hear about this Love Story. But we know All Too Well that even in moments like these, we can’t lose focus on the work we are doing. That’s why today, we are asking you to help us meet another major moment for our state – November’s Supreme Court elections. We’re working around the clock (yes, even now) to make sure we are Ready For It this November, but we need your help. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Taylor Swift said it best – “They aren't gonna change this. We gotta do it ourselves.” Thank you for being a part of our team, and congrats, Taylor, from Swifties across Pennsylvania! – PA Dems = | Follow us on , , and **! name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Re: They’re rigging the game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
States across the country are embroiled in redistricting fights. The fight is fundamental to our democracy. | |
---
Peter, **Texas and Louisiana’s gerrymandering could rig the maps and flip several districts for Republicans.** And Trump says more red states are coming. Now, blue state governors in California, Maryland, and more are stepping up to fight back. **But that’s not good enough.** [**The Supreme Court is meant to protect our right to vote and ensure our democracy is fair and representative for everyone. Tell the MAGA justices to stop supporting Trump’s authoritarian rigging and side with the people!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xlBV8K-h1SPh5Rb04hGqQo1cI6CCijVNPWNR_oUIpHxtl5I1KzJiC9-XHF5yNZzXlVuZ3LzgM2prbiT7Gzsq3PWdMZ3_d4QT3VBSF3qX4he14p5SkMch2wL07cR0PRwRNAiwllHiBBSE6NRvfRIEoEW7O1UT5sGVDwuVKePFy1WvQs2DEV3OYGQXLctmEXO-zMudx2Z0KPsueeAh8fgNec89CaG_ZS7T5Q5u1_-RKxz4M1pCep8Zv40qVeS-7XWS6_HFf8JcWNBgLAtc1CsNYUy4KqZ-M9pPwO7J0YaZE8ZZ4a8X6lnG2eqaYHZg94XoOQS37-bXDS3focnJGFCSRwgRtNSq9zGN2OfcKnQ-bcFhtgYc72i-CM5x3rYVePkQ/4je/Kkngvx7wTlGSdaS936_W6A/h0/h001.D77-QKf8LmVIxz4_EDSELvP0rMVfZMEChITlvIgBCE8) Thank you for standing up to gerrymandering, Morgan Stahr
United for Democracy **\-- PREVIOUS EMAIL --** **Peter,** ****Texas just officially voted to rig the game and increase Trump’s chances of holding the majority in the U.S. House of Representatives.** The state will move forward with a redrawn map that could flip as many as five House seats for Republicans.[****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xlBV8K-h1SPh5Rb04hGqQo1cI6CCijVNPWNR_oUIpHxtl5I1KzJiC9-XHF5yNZzXlVuZ3LzgM2prbiT7Gzsq3PWdMZ3_d4QT3VBSF3qX4he14p5SkMch2wL07cR0PRwRNAiwllHiBBSE6NRvfRIEoEW7O1UT5sGVDwuVKePFy1ZlCzBN4Auw9tTkYXe8AnVN5PgNlSSn6doa7mI2G8EJY3GV9jy6tuDYK2okqboxNe-JWIFxeaBOjKBSZ-jd0T7YiKG_ZK_BdmJsJWKQprXVVK_GVaHCpvNvm6_4-sfTsH_8fDen0cfIr4S8uSm90JKIkXlHDRq9mo_uruslllcV-cdtbv8NuY7gxTDWxKBKB0bgredrzFI1U-nbvk2KK-t4/4je/Kkngvx7wTlGSdaS936_W6A/h1/h001.BCFkXgbA_veaU61TEZcO1hEX0MRSkwxeacJPtHVA23s) Now, Trump says Florida and Indiana may join Texas in redistricting for Republicans. In response, Democratic Governor Gavin Newsom is launching a California redistricting campaign. Maryland, Illinois, and New York have all indicated they could join the fight as well. **This nationwide fight over redistricting is fundamental to our democracy.** We need the Supreme Court to throw its weight behind fair maps that give everyone equal representation—before partisan gerrymandering strips the right to vote from millions. [**The Supreme Court needs to hear from us right now. Tell them to side with our right to vote and guarantee fairly drawn congressional maps!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xlBV8K-h1SPh5Rb04hGqQo1cI6CCijVNPWNR_oUIpHxtl5I1KzJiC9-XHF5yNZzXlVuZ3LzgM2prbiT7Gzsq3PWdMZ3_d4QT3VBSF3qX4he14p5SkMch2wL07cR0PRwRNAiwllHiBBSE6NRvfRIEoEW7O1UT5sGVDwuVKePFy1Q2ZzLEd5RwIAbxLfNJIUMF0fXqASJPQJuAL7JhmNH_c-0QyPMQp6UaFnJF9CiLDTjSdp4lTyq37nteouaWfCYyjE_LDbbS3bzYP7VO48cdsMoWLFEFg7YHXFNo6OgQ7jZvS1XtheTGexvxZVMQHLb7G70Hrx8HxzMpmQE6VXUXoqEEe8IhVtEB84LAQ2t6iRF2mCn68hJBT0AgDcYSZqbo/4je/Kkngvx7wTlGSdaS936_W6A/h2/h001.w1w5C8Vj4YznkewxcQaVCCVfOkTDdninoVKUDYYpfzg) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xlBV8K-h1SPh5Rb04hGqQo1cI6CCijVNPWNR_oUIpHxtl5I1KzJiC9-XHF5yNZzXlVuZ3LzgM2prbiT7Gzsq3PWdMZ3_d4QT3VBSF3qX4he14p5SkMch2wL07cR0PRwRNAiwllHiBBSE6NRvfRIEoEW7O1UT5sGVDwuVKePFy1feA4OFTeX7J3Pn1NLB6p04Cz-5X524XeHGeSelSXakci4OldXcaMvcLvhF722JDy8wYCNRy2fF5ir6pMn9mOtURfHiHOuWQXIuIR4mNwlcEXTZWdsWYpOZiwY0duXhKlvLoeHjBWmZgGe_1Dp3L6VGZdS3s-ENaVfq0VYFHBqs4GQ2AjQriFm0LaNVbkbPscYjgfeb4f9W8o3SNj-xTUbI/4je/Kkngvx7wTlGSdaS936_W6A/h3/h001.zPpx1hhB9qAAhFTL9AJcgXHfj1lP9jTuIFWh0Fr24LI) Louisiana’s gerrymandered maps are set to go before the Supreme Court this fall. The case gives the MAGA justices the opportunity to essentially gut the decades-old _Voting Rights Act_. **If they do, Louisiana could lose both of its majority-Black congressional districts.** Mississippi’s state Supreme Court just did the opposite—they ruled the state’s gerrymandered maps violated the _Voting Rights Act_ and protected its citizen’s right to vote. **That’s what we need the Supreme Court to be doing: defending our democracy and standing up to this hyperpartisan power grab.** The Supreme Court is supposed to be there to protect the rights of Americans. But the MAGA justices have shown us they can’t be trusted to side with the people. [**That’s why they need to hear from us loud and clear. We value our voting rights, and we won’t stand by while red states try to rig the maps. It’s not good enough for blue state governors to combat this with their own redistricting. Tell the Supreme Court to step up and side with the people!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xlBV8K-h1SPh5Rb04hGqQo1cI6CCijVNPWNR_oUIpHxtl5I1KzJiC9-XHF5yNZzXlVuZ3LzgM2prbiT7Gzsq3PWdMZ3_d4QT3VBSF3qX4he14p5SkMch2wL07cR0PRwRNAiwllHiBBSE6NRvfRIEoEW7O1UT5sGVDwuVKePFy1c5uL5QN4q9sdef7O2mIfOMMx1minffUUJUg446XAnc-3SjueusosdqxPYr9yemlVpenJfTQIRM6bOgLbJTO2sYrk7_Gl868XWrSKyyE1ftqU2Yd8vg6NHJYLwGVov_3961n5TeT5hr6afAzdYB7OM4kQw6rzOwZJchQjxhdqA_cWNQVdul4qhZk2tQGX4TySirwLKwiob0PcDCisDAkZzI/4je/Kkngvx7wTlGSdaS936_W6A/h4/h001.v80ZI2dqGVF9issDkxWN7lLTw-ln68Tx3BrMr6U0IHM) Thank you for fighting for voting rights, Morgan Stahr

clean_body: States across the country are embroiled in redistricting fights. The fight is fundamental to our democracy. | | Peter, Texas and Louisiana’s gerrymandering could rig the maps and flip several districts for Republicans. And Trump says more red states are coming. Now, blue state governors in California, Maryland, and more are stepping up to fight back. But that’s not good enough. Thank you for standing up to gerrymandering, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy \-- PREVIOUS EMAIL -- Peter, **Texas just officially voted to rig the game and increase Trump’s chances of holding the majority in the U.S. House of Representatives. The state will move forward with a redrawn map that could flip as many as five House seats for Republicans. Now, Trump says Florida and Indiana may join Texas in redistricting for Republicans. In response, Democratic Governor Gavin Newsom is launching a California redistricting campaign. Maryland, Illinois, and New York have all indicated they could join the fight as well. This nationwide fight over redistricting is fundamental to our democracy. We need the Supreme Court to throw its weight behind fair maps that give everyone equal representation—before partisan gerrymandering strips the right to vote from millions. Louisiana’s gerrymandered maps are set to go before the Supreme Court this fall. The case gives the MAGA justices the opportunity to essentially gut the decades-old Voting Rights Act. If they do, Louisiana could lose both of its majority-Black congressional districts. Mississippi’s state Supreme Court just did the opposite—they ruled the state’s gerrymandered maps violated the Voting Rights Act and protected its citizen’s right to vote. That’s what we need the Supreme Court to be doing: defending our democracy and standing up to this hyperpartisan power grab. The Supreme Court is supposed to be there to protect the rights of Americans. But the MAGA justices have shown us they can’t be trusted to side with the people. Thank you for fighting for voting rights, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy ** Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . subject: Tell California’s leaders to invest in redwood forests
body:

---
| |
---
Photo by Max Forster
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
We have a unique opportunity to ensure that California’s Greenhouse Gas Reduction Fund (GGRF) continues to support the restoration of redwood forests, the reduction of wildfire intensity, and the expansion of equitable public access to nature. Funded by California’s cap-and-trade program, the GGRF helps pay for a wide range of projects that reduce greenhouse gas emissions and improve the health of our communities, parks, and other public lands. These dollars flow through state agencies to fund forest restoration, stewardship, and resilience across the redwood range to address rising drought and wildfire risks. Right now, Governor Gavin Newsom and the State Legislature are deciding how billions of GGRF dollars will be spent in the next year. This decision could have far-reaching impacts on whether our vital redwood forests can be protected effectively. California’s budget must prioritize nature-based strategies like forest restoration, extreme wildfire reduction, and equitable access to public lands to benefit people and forests alike. **Send a message today telling California’s leaders to invest GGRF funds into redwood forest health and resilience.**
---

name: Joe Kerr
subject: We moved CA-40. Now let’s win it.
body:
Last year, I took on MAGA Republican Young Kim. With over 10,000 grassroots donors at my side, our campaign delivered the 5th largest leftward swing of any congressional district in the country.| | |

| | Hi Peter Willis,

Last year, I took on MAGA Republican Young Kim. With over 10,000 grassroots donors at my side, our campaign delivered the 5th largest leftward swing of any congressional district in the country.

We proved that CA-40 isn’t just competitive. It’s now nationally recognized as one of the best pickup opportunities in America. That only happened because of the movement we built together.

California’s congressional maps may shift, but here’s the truth: I am the only candidate in this race with the proven strength and experience to win, no matter how the lines are drawn. name: Team Cooper for NC
subject: The GOP wants to take away your rights and your health care, raise costs on Americans with wild tariffs, and make your life worse.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Join us in the fight. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114106347/565968683/823540626?refcode=ea.b694fe50-7483-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.b694fe50-7483-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjk0ZmU1MC03NDgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9UVPpAhnUMfRXUM3PJSF8ZcV4u5GZDNMTw3HOFFFkPk=&emci=4c6f1849-7483-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=b694fe50-7483-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)
At the end of the day, every election comes down to this, Peter: Who will make our lives _better_? Here’s what _better_ looks like to us: 🩺 Better, less expensive health care
🏘️ More affordable housing
♻️ Clean energy investment
🗳️ Protections for voting rights, including vote-by-mail
♀️ Restoration of abortion rights
🏳️🌈 Protecting LGBTQ+ rights **Pretty much everything that the GOP stands against.** Peter, if this is the kind of future you want to see for our nation, this campaign is for you — and we need your help to send Roy Cooper to the U.S. Senate to fight for it. **[Make a grassroots donation to power our campaign before our August end-of-month deadline to let us know you’re in the fight >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114106348/565968684/-1743631236?refcode=ea.b694fe50-7483-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.b694fe50-7483-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjk0ZmU1MC03NDgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9UVPpAhnUMfRXUM3PJSF8ZcV4u5GZDNMTw3HOFFFkPk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114106349/565968685/-1743631236?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.b694fe50-7483-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.b694fe50-7483-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjk0ZmU1MC03NDgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9UVPpAhnUMfRXUM3PJSF8ZcV4u5GZDNMTw3HOFFFkPk=)

clean_body: Join us in the fight. | At the end of the day, every election comes down to this, Peter: Who will make our lives better? Here’s what better looks like to us: 🩺 Better, less expensive health care 🏘️ More affordable housing ♻️ Clean energy investment 🗳️ Protections for voting rights, including vote-by-mail ♀️ Restoration of abortion rights 🏳️🌈 Protecting LGBTQ+ rights Pretty much everything that the GOP stands against. Peter, if this is the kind of future you want to see for our nation, this campaign is for you — and we need your help to send Roy Cooper to the U.S. Senate to fight for it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thanks for your help, Team Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. subject: Judicial Watch: Court Raises New Questions About Fani Willis’ Trump Anti-Collusion Records Scandal
body:
Judicial Watch announced that a Georgia state court ordered Georgia
District Attorney Fani Willis to provide new information and
potentially conduct a new search for Trump-related records because her
recent affidavit to the court made no reference to whether any
searches of the devices of former Fulton County Special Prosecutor
Nathan Wade or those of Chief Investigator Michael L. Hill, who was
involved gathering evidence and coordinating investigative efforts,
and likely met with the January 6 Committee.

name: Team Lizzie
subject: Why this moment matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
All through August, Lizzie has been talking to the press about what’s at stake and why this moment matters.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250827?refcode=lpfe250827 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250827?refcode=lpfe250827]
President Trump thinks he’s “entitled” to five more GOP seats in the House of Representatives, and in an act of submission and cowardice, Texas Republicans passed a racially gerrymandered map that could hand them five more congressional seats before a single vote is cast in 2026.
This isn’t representation. It’s voter suppression. And we must continue to fight back in all the ways that we can.
Make a contribution right now to help. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250827?refcode=lpfe250827]
Your donation today will power our movement to:
* Organize and mobilize volunteers in TX07 and across the state
* Defend Democratic seats and the right to fair representation
* Build momentum for 2026 and beyond
Let’s keep fighting—for our democracy and for the future we believe in.
Thank you for all of your support,
Team Lizzie

subject: We reviewed your response — and it raised a few eyebrows.

body:
We noticed your answer to Question 8 on our Voter Verification Questionnaire ... and we have to ask:
_Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/sBonHbYW3WLcFutWYIobAfPbEUDxl8sxc4aJVOQF5v44zFI2Yp9Sot4BBCWp8un8HrfWOdm5n-IlrrESY9_MiIe8JvQxUEl4HikBmo9ucgYNX08rwor2uwPaamp8JmXdO1cazWwWJLoUeY5rnyYgT2LswKXvIVu_PDTIscts_Uffhp4AIYeHFLoi/NJoFiX48hdRm0S5fmd5tqbcR5veQRtrs/12)_

Peter,

We noticed your answer to Question 8 on our Voter Verification Questionnaire ... and we have to ask:

| | Dear Fellow Republican, **This is our moment. Congress of Counties is where Republicans from every corner of Indiana come together, county leaders, precinct workers, and first-time volunteers alike, to build the team that will deliver victory in 2026 and beyond.** For two action-packed days, you’ll get hands-on training, hear from conservative leaders from across our state, and walk away with practical tools you can put to work right away in your community. But Congress of Counties isn’t just about training—it’s about teamwork. You’ll meet fellow Hoosier Republicans who share your passion, trade ideas, and leave fired up and ready to win! Governor Braun and I know that the strength of our party comes from the grassroots—from Republicans like you who show up, get involved, and make a difference. That’s why we need you there. Please see the attached Save the Date for more information, or click the following link for our Congress of Counties webpage: [https://indiana.gop/about-the-event/](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/xE_4nQUSkyUeFUlZSrZsUl-FmTsJV7_PLJYYHZ_AaHcuznDa27n6Lq09e9-Pofzg97t2Quvou60AmaZpGQS6Ze7WC9da9vnNLr9qGJNpVU6Qm1lx_2qCIESZ1QN7wf6ecg3q4pwhcGwyEy-DF5NGsTieeG9Z4SHL37YRqLPOF2YST5b1muCTEJnlW3ceEXw3_JB8v-hwLisC268khRuLwcoTVkKsVxzvnmNWO75hHIR8z40oXo9gZWLTZFmsDxxn5CJYqcF-bgutQBMKH-nEQYEnUYxIKMsq63Hl9JapowpNq6Pz6tXQ7fpi5MxRD9Wlzg4ZNKz1WM0AbnMHukuB86UgjHFKl391ITqeYqp75LU-U_uigGPjzd6fba2Tzgh_0ieTWOM/2xRzRH7bjP5eWxl69G_VTQPAm7FVwaWK/12). **I invite you to register today and be part of the energy, the strategy, and the vision that will carry our party forward.** Early Bird registration ends **November 1, 2025** , so don't miss out, register today! If you have any questions, please reach out to our team at [rsvp@indiana.gop](mailto:rsvp@indiana.gop "mailto:rsvp@indiana.gop"). Yours in service,
---
**Lana Keesling**
---
---
Chairwoman, Indiana Republican Party

Join us.](https://substack.com/redirect/eca7eb45-acb5-4819-b495-792da3ac50ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** 👇
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/eca7eb45-acb5-4819-b495-792da3ac50ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
This one was heavy. **Don Lemo** n and I went live as news broke of the Catholic school shooting in Minnesota. What followed was raw, emotional, and unfiltered--two dads and two citizens talking about grief, guns, and a government that refuses to act. This isn't just another episode--it's a moment that demands honesty. Watch it. Share it. Sit with it.
* **00:01:00** -- Don and I react in real time to reports of the school shooting: three dead, 17 injured. The weight of what's happening hits hard.
* **00:02:20** -- I share the trauma of watching my 6-year-old son practice an active shooter drill and the heartbreak of explaining to him why it exists.
* **00:05:08** -- Don recounts covering Newtown and the unbearable grief of watching parents bury their children--his most searing memory as a journalist.
* **00:08:04** -- We draw the line between grief and trauma, and I explain why America is permanently scarring kids by refusing to act on gun safety.
* **00:22:30** -- I play the clip of my viral showdown with Jesse Watters on Fox, where I remind him that Chicago has rejected Trump three times by 80%--and call out the hypocrisy of ignoring red states' crises.

This episode is about truth. About pain. About the fight we have to wage for our kids. If you've ever felt numb about school shootings, this is the conversation to break through the noise.
**[If this conversation moved you--or made you think differently--become a paid subscriber today. Support the work. Help fuel this fight. We need every voice, and especially yours.](https://substack.com/redirect/eca7eb45-acb5-4819-b495-792da3ac50ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

Something is happening in Iowa — and it’s BIG.

Last night, Democrat Catelin Drey flipped a long-held Republican State Senate seat in a stunning 20-point victory. **This is the second special election Democrats have won in Iowa this year.**

These wins aren’t happening by accident. They’re happening because Democrats like Christina are building campaigns that actually connect with people. We’re listening to concerns about jobs, healthcare, schools, and freedoms. Iowans are standing up and saying they deserve better than politicians like Mariannette Miller-Meeks.

And we have even more good news! **Fresh polling from _Public Policy Polling_ reveals Republicans across the state are underwater and Christina is already leading Miller-Meeks by four points.**
