# **[Mayor Pushes Back On Trump Plan](http://trk.libertyledger.)**

name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: This isn’t just bad policy, it’s dangerous policy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2026, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114108207/565975033/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20250827_FR_ReconciliationTax_0_6MD_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQ2MzQwYy03YTgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qwi1i7AJvroKifTtockElhl9nmJmTTdRzkMO7k2nzjs=&emci=9548f405-7a83-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9546340c-7a83-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

The Admin’s reconciliation tax law is a direct attack on working families across California’s 19th Congressional District. Let me be clear: this bill doesn't just hand tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy. It kicks people off health care and puts lives at risk.

**More than _150,000 people_ in our district rely on Medicaid.** This bill undermines that coverage, guts the Affordable Care Act, and threatens to push rural hospitals to the brink of closure. That means longer ER wait times, fewer clinic appointments, and working parents forced to choose between medicine and rent.

This isn't a theory, we are already hearing from local physicians about patients skipping care and _clinics seeing higher no-show rates,_ not because people are lazy, but because **they’re afraid they’ve lost their coverage.**

They want you to believe this bill is “paid for.” But the truth is, it adds over $3.8 trillion to our national debt, and does it on the backs of working families and our children.

[If you're with me in fighting back against this cruel legislation, and standing up for health care access for every family in CA-19, please chip in $10 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114108208/565975034/1759435971?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20250827_FR_ReconciliationTax_0_6MD_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQ2MzQwYy03YTgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qwi1i7AJvroKifTtockElhl9nmJmTTdRzkMO7k2nzjs=) | [DEFEND HEALTHCARE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114108209/565975035/1759435971?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20250827_FR_ReconciliationTax_0_6MD_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQ2MzQwYy03YTgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qwi1i7AJvroKifTtockElhl9nmJmTTdRzkMO7k2nzjs=)

| | Democrats in the General Assembly refuse to face the truth about crime in Virginia. They have stood by criminals, leaving our communities less safe. While families worry about violence, fentanyl, and gangs, Democrats offer excuses. Republicans offer solutions. The numbers don’t lie. In 2023, Virginia recorded over 20,800 violent crimes, with the rate increasing again. That’s thousands of Virginians robbed, assaulted, or worse. Too often, repeat offenders are back on the street within days because of reckless plea deals and a revolving-door justice system. Our families deserve better. We need tougher sentencing, more police on our streets, and a justice system that puts victims first instead of criminals.
---
| | | |
---
| | And while violent crime climbs, the fentanyl crisis is wreaking havoc on communities. Fentanyl is now the LEADING KILLER of Virginians aged 18 to 45. It pours in along I-95 and I-81, trafficked by cartels and drug networks that know Virginia is vulnerable. The solution is clear: crack down on dealers, expand K-9 interdiction units, and hold traffickers accountable when their poison kills Virginians. Democrats call it a “health issue.” We call it what it is. A deadly crime wave that demands immediate action. Virginia is also seeing a resurgence of gang violence and organized retail theft. MS-13 has reemerged in Northern Virginia, and criminal rings are hitting small businesses with coordinated retail theft. Instead of cracking down, Soros-backed Commonwealth Attorneys pretend this is just shoplifting or worse, they don’t prosecute it at all. They couldn’t be more wrong. We know these are criminal enterprises that are destroying neighborhoods, costing families jobs, and driving businesses out of our communities.
---
| | | |
---
| | Meanwhile, Virginia’s police force is stretched thinner than ever. Since 2020, THOUSANDS of officers have left the service. Democrats demonize the badge while our response times grow longer and our streets become less safe. Attorney General Jason Miyares has called this what it is: a “criminal-first, victim-last” approach. We will restore qualified immunity, invest in officers, and make Virginia a place where police are supported rather than attacked. And let’s not forget juvenile crime. In Northern Virginia and Hampton Roads, carjackings, assaults, and shootings by juveniles are on the rise. Yet violent youth offenders face little more than diversion programs and a slap on the wrist. That must end. Rehabilitation has its place, but ACCOUNTABILITY must come first. We will put school resource officers back in schools, crack down on violent juvenile crime, and stop gangs from recruiting our kids.
---
| | | |
---
| | On every one of these issues, Attorney General Jason Miyares has shown what conservative leadership looks like. Since taking office, he has made PUBLIC SAFETY his NUMBER ONE PRIORITY. His Operation Ceasefire initiative in thirteen of Virginia’s most violent cities has saved lives. In Hopewell, the program drove a 60% drop in the murder rate. That’s not theory, that’s results. And sheriffs across Virginia know that. Seventy-eight sheriffs have endorsed Miyares because they trust him to stand with law enforcement and against criminals. Miyares also took on the corrupt Virginia Parole Board, exposing how violent offenders were being quietly released in violation of victims’ rights. While Democrats covered for the board, Miyares told the truth and demanded accountability. He has fought human trafficking, secured indictments against gang leaders and traffickers, and expanded services for victims of crime. In 2023 alone, his prosecutors helped secure hundreds of convictions against some of the most dangerous criminals in Virginia.
---
| | | |
---
| | The contrast could not be clearer. Democrats want softer sentences, weaker policing, and more criminals on the streets. Republicans want safer neighborhoods, tougher laws, and victims put first. Jason Miyares has proven what conservative leadership can accomplish. Imagine what we could achieve if Democrats in the House and Senate stopped standing in the way. Virginia doesn’t need excuses; we need action. We don’t need weak-on-crime Democrats—we need common-sense conservatives. And with your help, that’s exactly what we’re going to deliver.
---
| | | |
---

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 8/27/2025
body:
Colorado election results may violate 1946 Secret Ballots Amendment
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Polis insists the [state isn’t a sanctuary](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), though laws under his watch curb cooperation with federal immigration enforcement. At the Capitol, Democrats passed [business tax hikes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to close a $750 million deficit, sparking GOP warnings of economic fallout and TABOR lawsuits. Meanwhile, the Lee Fire near Meeker has burned 138,000+ acres, now the [state’s fourth-largest](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and a new report finds fire departments [short 1,100 firefighters and $25 million in gear](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
On campus, DU is [scaling back DEI programs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to comply with federal directives. Still, there’s good news: [youth suicides fell 20%](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) last year, the lowest since 2007, and [Colorado leads in cutting alcohol use](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—even as cannabis and cocaine consumption remain high.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** Colorado, Oregon, and Washington are warned they’re following [California’s path of progressive overreach](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—policies critics say slow growth, raise costs, and drive residents away. Meanwhile, Trump’s sudden [pause on immigrant trucker visas](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) drew support from Wyoming officials citing safety after a deadly Florida crash, though immigrant advocates argue the policy punishes the wrong people.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Colorado gun owners are rallying with[ “Shots for Freedom,”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) both celebrating culture and fighting new restrictions with lawsuits and ballot plans. In Littleton, residents forced [Polis-style density mandates](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to the ballot, proving grassroots power still matters. And Pastor John Waters’ wait for a liver transplant underscores the [national donor crisis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—where heartbreak meets hope through community support.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, August 27, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Colorado election results may violate 1946 Secret Ballots Amendment](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MIKE O'DONNELL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_The Colorado Constitution guarantees the right for citizens to vote in secret. Article VII, Section 8 states that all elections by the people shall be by ballot, and no ballots shall be marked in any way that would allow the ballot to be identified as the ballot of a particular person. And in 1946, Colorado voters approved the Secret Ballots Amendment that explicitly provided for secret ballots._
_However, if a voter voluntarily shares how he or she voted, they may do so. Colorado Revised Statute §1-13-712 says that any voter who makes available an image of the voter’s own ballot through electronic means, after it is prepared for voting, is deemed to have consented to the transmittal of that image. So if someone who is addicted to social media takes a ballot “selfie” and posts that somewhere, they are allowed to do so (despite it being an incredibly silly thing to do)._
_But irrespective, unless self-disclosed, Colorado citizens enjoy a fundamental right to vote in secret, and this right is further protected by statutes and regulations that govern the state’s election process. Sadly, the current Colorado Secretary of State doesn’t appear to be familiar with this fundamental right. Or perhaps she disagrees with it, as she does with so many other laws, and simply ignores it?_
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Shots for Freedom: Colorado gun owners rally to push back against new restrictions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY HUEY LAUGESEN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Colorado State Shooting Association is hosting the “Shots for Freedom” weekend in Colorado Springs, combining firearm culture, raffles, and speakers to raise funds for legal and electoral battles against new gun restrictions.
* Recent laws include magazine bans, waiting periods, a 6.5% excise tax on firearms and ammo, and a new permit-to-purchase system—policies gun rights advocates call unconstitutional and are challenging in court.
* CSSA and national partners are also preparing for a major 2026 ground campaign to unseat anti-gun lawmakers, warning that Colorado is now a testing ground for restrictions likely to spread nationwide.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Democrats Push Business Tax Increases To Fill State Budget Gap](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CBS COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado lawmakers passed four bills raising taxes on businesses to help close a $750 million budget shortfall, generating about $330 million annually.
* Democrats argue businesses should bear the cost to protect vulnerable Coloradans, while Republicans warn the increases will hurt the economy and likely face TABOR legal challenges.
* Additional measures include selling $200 million in tax credits to offset health insurance costs and reallocating funds—such as $10 million from a state bridge project and $264,000 from the wolf reintroduction program—to aid uninsured residents.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[The culture war at home: How modern trends leave kids vulnerable](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JOHN DIGIROLAMO | COMMENTARY | AUGUST 25** _Modern culture directly affects our society. This is not your parent’s Yoplait yogurt. The current culture’s influence is stronger than ever and is constantly evolving. Ask a typical high school student what they want to be when they grow up, and you won’t hear answers of doctor, lawyer or accountant. They dream of being an influencer. But they’ve already been influenced themselves._
__

**[Faith over fear: How Christians can stand strong when the world unravels](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | AUGUST 24** _Long, long ago...God brought order to chaos—and He’s still doing it today. How? Through our acts of faith. While chaos bullies its way into our lives uninvited, faith rolls out the welcome mat for God’s power to bring order, peace, and purpose (Luke 24:49)._
__

**[Four candidates launch common-sense campaign for Douglas County school board](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | AUGUST 22** _In Douglas County, a new slate calling itself Common Sense DCSD is stepping into the school board race. The group — Matt Smith, Keaton Gambill, Dede Kramer and Steve Vail — says the district’s future depends on keeping academics and safety at the forefront. They argue that balanced leadership has helped produce high test scores, a strong graduation rate and standout career training programs, and they want to carry that momentum forward._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Subscribe to JamesPod at jamespod.com
On this episode of _JamesPod,_ host **James Abrenio** sits down with **Matt Royer** -- former President of the Virginia Young Democrats, former Campaign Manager, and writer of the political Substack _By the Ballot_ -- for an unflinching look at the challenges facing Democrats after the 2024 election.
Royer explains why Democrats are struggling with younger voters, pointing to a **2.4 million net loss of registered Democrats** since 2020 compared to a 2 million increase for Republicans. He argues that the party too often communicates in overly academic or "weak" language, failing to give voters clear, relatable reasons to support them. Instead of manufacturing new "Democratic Joe Rogans," Royer suggests engaging existing platforms with built-in progressive audiences.
The conversation explores:
* **Media & Messaging**: How the loss of media dominance since the Reagan-era Fairness Doctrine continues to haunt Democrats, and why authentic, conversational messaging beats focus-grouped soundbites.
* **Core Issues** : Housing, clean water, healthcare, education, and wages as unifying themes that can transcend identity divisions if communicated effectively.
* **Generational Tensions** : Millennials and Gen Z now make up the largest share of the Democratic base (34-35%), yet younger leaders like David Hogg, Malcolm Kenyatta, and Zohran Mandani often face resistance despite electoral legitimacy.
* **Case Study: North Carolina** : At just 25, Anderson Clayton built coalitions in rural North Carolina that delivered statewide Democratic wins through authentic local messaging rather than celebrity endorsements.
* **Consulting & Trust**: The "Speaking with American Men" project and the prevalence of scam PACs illustrate how political consulting often enriches insiders rather than candidates, eroding voter trust.
* **Young Men & Masculinity**: A candid discussion about toxic online influences like Andrew Tate and the need for positive male role models who frame success as service to community, not dominance.
* **Culture Wars & Distractions**: With fewer than 10 trans girls in Virginia sports over four years, Royer stresses resisting Republican framings while focusing on education, safety, and teacher pay.
* **Virginia Politics** : From Spanberger vs. Sears to September's elections, Royer highlights how Democrats must navigate a media environment tilted toward MAGA narratives.

The episode closes with a call to action: embrace intergenerational leadership, elevate authentic local voices, and give voters reasons to vote **for** Democrats -- not just against Republicans.
###### _**What is By the Ballot?**_
###### _By the Ballot is a free SubStack that features unapologetic dispatches from the New South 's next generation of Democrats. Commentary on stances, tactics, and news on the Left. We don't claim to know everything or always be right, we just want to be a part of the conversation._
###### _While there 's many different ways to power and the Right wants to take over our country by hook or by crook, we want to help Democrats help Americans by making a government for the people by the ballot._
###### _Make sure to follow us on socials to stay up to date on our work_!
###### _Twitter- https://x.com/by_the_ballot_
###### _Instagram- https://www.instagram.com/bytheballot_
###### _BlueSky - https://bsky.app/profile/bytheballot.bsky.social_
###### Contact us at substackbytheballot@gmail.com

name: David Hogg
subject: Full transparency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Somewhere out there, there’s a young person who’s in the process of deciding whether to run for office. That’s why we’re in this fight.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250827-1&t=1&akid=2584%2E587540%2EDbsu39)
Peter,
Recently, Leaders We Deserve announced a $20 million effort to primary out-of-touch, ineffective incumbent House Democrats to replace them with generational young leaders. **[If you can, I’m asking you to chip in $5 to power this urgent work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250827_1_transparent?refcode=em20250827-2584&amount=5&refcode2=2584_587540_Dbsu39&akid=2584%2E587540%2EDbsu39)**
I want to be transparent about why we made this announcement when we did – and why your support today will determine whether or not we can put young people on the ballot in 2026.
Right now, there are too many politicians occupying safe blue seats who aren’t putting up enough of a fight against Donald Trump. They’re failing to meet the moment, and it’s leaving more and more voters disillusioned about what Democrats even stand for.
**But as you read this, there are young, inspiring, and brave leaders out there who are in the process of deciding whether to run for office.** If we can demonstrate that there’s a loud, powerful, and well-funded movement who’s ready to support their campaigns with everything we’ve got, then maybe – _just maybe_ – they’ll decide to get into the arena and lead our party into the future. But if they decide their campaigns are over before they even begin, there won’t be any Gen Z leaders for us to vote for come Election Day in 2026.
**That’s why our work needs to happen now, Peter.** Next spring or next fall will be too little, too late. It’s why Leaders We Deserve just made our big announcement about supporting young progressives who decide to challenge asleep-at-the-wheel House Democrats in safe seats. And it’s why we’re counting on you to support this work today:
**[Will you donate $5 to elect the next generation of young leaders who will rebuild our party? What we do right now will determine whether Democrats are in a position to win back the House in 2026.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250827_1_transparent?refcode=em20250827-2584&amount=5&refcode2=2584_587540_Dbsu39&akid=2584%2E587540%2EDbsu39)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250827_1_transparent?amount=5&refcode=em20250827-2584&refcode2=2584_587540_Dbsu39&akid=2584%2E587540%2EDbsu39)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250827-1&t=2&refcode2=2584_587540_Dbsu39&akid=2584%2E587540%2EDbsu39)**

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Trump is escalating his plans to deploy the National Guard in cities across the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
This is dystopian and dangerous.
#
**This is important:**
Earlier this month, Donald Trump took control of the local police in D.C. and deployed the National Guard. Now, he’s escalating his plans to do the same in other major cities across our country.
**We’re watching in real time the politicization of our military to consolidate power and intimidate political opponents. It’s dystopian and dangerous.**
Trump’s plans will undermine public safety and erode trust. And as Delawareans know all too well from the year-long occupation of Wilmington in the late 1960s, the painful scars can last for generations.
**I won’t sit back as Donald Trump abuses his power.**
That’s why I joined as an original co-sponsor of the _SUN Act_ , legislation that ensures accountability and transparency anytime the National Guard is deployed in our streets. It’s why I’m continuing to speak out and sound the alarm. And it’s why I’m doing everything I can to help take back the House next year and deliver a real check on this president.
[**If you’re with me in saying _hell no_ to dictatorship in America, chip in $5 to help me keep up the fight. **](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250827-1?refcode=em20250827-2291&amount=5&refcode2=2291_21716_6O0gQU&akid=2291%2E21716%2E6O0gQU)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250827-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250827-2291&refcode2=2291_21716_6O0gQU&akid=2291%2E21716%2E6O0gQU)**
In solidarity,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250827-1&t=1&refcode2=2291_21716_6O0gQU&akid=2291%2E21716%2E6O0gQU)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2291%2E21716%2E6O0gQU)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2291%2E21716%2E6O0gQU)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2291%2E21716%2E6O0gQU)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m getting back in the fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
When I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94121?refcode=em20250827-9336&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9336%2E614464%2E57eJt9)
Peter,
I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers.
**That’s why I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.**
**[Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between State Democrats Committee and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94121?refcode=em20250827-9336&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9336%2E614464%2E57eJt9)**
I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._
Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
**Peter, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:**
**[Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $25 or $10 now, split between State Democrats Committee and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94121?refcode=em20250827-9336&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9336%2E614464%2E57eJt9)**
I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=4&akid=9336%2E614464%2E57eJt9).

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Annunciation Church
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
How many more children will have to live this nightmare?
#

Friends,
Earlier this morning, our country suffered an all-too-common tragedy when a gunman opened fire at Annunciation Church in Minneapolis, home to a pre-K-8 school.
Students were packed into the pews for mass when the gunman — who was armed with a rifle, a shotgun, and a pistol — fired deliberately at the church. Current reports are that two children were killed and approximately 20 others were injured.
The first week of school is supposed to be filled with joy and making new friends. Instead, innocent kids were forced to hide for their lives from bullets and left traumatized. And now, some families are left with an empty seat at their dinner table forever.
I am heartbroken and furious. How many more children will have to live this nightmare before our elected leaders do something?
Gun violence is a crisis in our country, and we must do more than offer just thoughts and prayers. These children were literally shot in a church while praying — at the hands of weapons designed to kill as many people as possible.
We owe it to all the victims and survivors to demand change, end this crisis, and build a future where we can all be safe. That is my mission, and the mission of GIFFORDS. We will keep working until it becomes a reality.
Please keep Minnesota and the Minneapolis community in your thoughts.
Thank you,
Gabby Giffords

**Please, take a second to read this...**
Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives — making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
**If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.**
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/63973?c0=giffords-em-aug25.orWe61&refcode=em250827-1-b&t=1&akid=10824%2E3935704%2EolfdzU)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=10824%2E3935704%2EolfdzU) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Mohan Seshadri
subject: Meet our 2025 Endorsed Candidates!
body:
https://www.apipennsylvania.org/ [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/]
Hi Peter
This past week, our API PA members voted on endorsements for the upcoming November election.
Since we were founded in 2020, we have run the biggest Asian American voter contact program in each major election. As the political home for Asian Americans in Pennsylvania, we take our endorsements very seriously. Our members voted to endorse and support these candidates in this election because of how they have shown up for our communities in the past.
Each of our candidates is committed to leading with integrity, and using their office to protect and serve all Pennsylvanians — Asian American communities included. They will commit to upholding the constitution. They will use local resources to serve our communities, instead of funding federal attempts to scapegoat, deport, and target our neighbors. Our endorsed candidates have a bold vision for Pennsylvania’s future at the local level — one that ensures that we are able to thrive.
We’re excited to introduce you to our endorsed candidates — all fighters and champions for our communities in Pennsylvania.
* Stella Tsai, Commonwealth Court of Pennsylvania
* Sarbani Hazra, Mayor of Chalfont
* Joe Khan, Bucks County District Attorney
* Danny Ceisler, Bucks County Sheriff
* Eileen Ming, Township Supervisor for the Bethel Township Board of Supervisors
* Christine Coyne, School Board Director in North Penn School District
* Ed Tokmajian, Bensalem Municipal Council
As a reminder, we have already announced endorsements for:
* Larry Krasner for Philadelphia District Attorney
* Sherrie Cohen for Philadelphia Municipal Court Judge
* Cindy Lam for Manheim Township School Board of Directors
* Nalini Krishnankutty for State College Borough Council
* Gopal Balachandran for State College Borough Council
* Taiba Sultana for Easton City Council
* Nadeem Qayyam for Northampton County Commissioner
* Uday Palled for Franklin Park Borough Council
* Sangeetha Patel for Chester Heights Borough Council
We are beyond excited to support this group of candidates in the upcoming election. As we prepare to win, we are asking for your support.
DONATE HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/api-pa-votes-1]
Your donations help elect candidates who will fight for our communities at every level of government!
In Solidarity,
Mohan Seshadri
Executive Director of Asian Pacific Islander Political Alliance

API PA
PO Box 22611
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States
https://www.facebook.com/apipennsylvania/ [https://www.facebook.com/apipennsylvania/] https://x.com/apipennsylvania [https://x.com/apipennsylvania] https://www.instagram.com/apipennsylvania/# [https://www.instagram.com/apipennsylvania/#] https://bsky.app/profile/apipennsylvania.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/apipennsylvania.bsky.social] https://www.tiktok.com/@apipennsylvania [https://www.tiktok.com/@apipennsylvania]

Hi, it's Shawn Harris, the Democrat running to unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene. I wish I were writing to you about jobs, infrastructure, or improving our schools. But instead, I'm writing to you about this: **Marjorie Taylor Greene is now urging Donald Trump to pardon George Santos** -- the disgraced former congressman who pleaded guilty to wire fraud and aggravated identity theft.
---
| [ ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/WgS1yq27NURrs6sNUSrHCA~~/AAPPABA~/4JIl0fnaLGxqBGd0FYRPHD24CClkAbeqmELowUpbi-QJPOCR1wl3v3_WxGi0uCSSmr6G1KaKZTBxk2oLwcQIBRZxKtbZ29-qyTNaa-c2rsFxLx5dYsJPDCg6qbD1vMWauIlxP_9BT_CJDh86-fmZQhsg7DBDL9pWAfltCBvIwWRlslRf2fWkY4IGFolnZFXZo6e6IWyH243tdXmHGZDrGw-gf3HTdqSzOxHs65d3ho0ILqJstNKr-3ygeYVh2aVTDUzjG2ZLI-Xjm4dFhhIJ5pqfNjBFT2h8r0bkG1ZBTDJ4iQ5zW9BuF5whJRyP9AAM)
---
Seven years in prison for defrauding the public, lying about his entire background, and fabricating his campaign finances... and Greene's response? _She says his sentence is "far beyond what is warranted" and praises him for his "willingness and dedication."_ This is the kind of political culture we're living with in Georgia's 14th District -- one where loyalty to Trump is valued more than honesty, integrity, or the law. It's embarrassing. It's dangerous. _And it has to end._ **I 'm running for Congress because our district deserves a representative who will tell the truth, respect the law, and actually work for the people** -- not defend corrupt politicians just because they're part of the same political clique. This race is winnable, but Greene has a massive fundraising machine behind her. If we want to win, we have to outwork and out-raise her every day between now and November 2026. [**Can I count on you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help me defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore common sense to Congress?**](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/WgS1yq27NURrs6sNUSrHCA~~/AAPPABA~/4JIl0fnaLGxqBGd0FYRPHD24CClkAbeqmELowUpbi-QJPOCR1wl3v3_WxGi0uCSSmr6G1KaKZTBxk2oLwcQIBRZxKtbZ29-qyTNaa-c2rsFxLx5dYsJPDCg6qbD1vMWauIlxP_9BT_CJDh86-fmZQhsg7DBDL9pWAfltCBvIwWRlslRf2fWkY4IGFolnZFXZo6e6IWyH243tdXmHGZDrGw-gf3HTdqSzOxHs65d3ho0ILqJstNKr-3ygeYVh2aVTDUzjG2ZLI-Xjm4dFhhIJ5pqfNjBFT2h8r0bkG1ZBTDJ4iQ5zW9BuF5whJRyP9AAM)

clean_body: | | Hi, it's Shawn Harris, the Democrat running to unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene. I wish I were writing to you about jobs, infrastructure, or improving our schools. But instead, I'm writing to you about this: Marjorie Taylor Greene is now urging Donald Trump to pardon George Santos -- the disgraced former congressman who pleaded guilty to wire fraud and aggravated identity theft. | Seven years in prison for defrauding the public, lying about his entire background, and fabricating his campaign finances... and Greene's response? She says his sentence is "far beyond what is warranted" and praises him for his "willingness and dedication." This is the kind of political culture we're living with in Georgia's 14th District -- one where loyalty to Trump is valued more than honesty, integrity, or the law. It's embarrassing. It's dangerous. And it has to end. I 'm running for Congress because our district deserves a representative who will tell the truth, respect the law, and actually work for the people -- not defend corrupt politicians just because they're part of the same political clique. This race is winnable, but Greene has a massive fundraising machine behind her. If we want to win, we have to outwork and out-raise her every day between now and November 2026. ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ I'm a fifth-generation farmer and a veteran. I believe in hard work, service, and telling the truth. Marjorie Taylor Greene believes in conspiracy theories, chaos, and cable news clips. Let's give GA-14 the serious, steady leadership it deserves. Thanks for your support, Shawn Harris | | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA

name: Katherine Clark, Democratic Whip
subject: Massive obstacle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hi there,

My name is Katherine Clark, and I’m the House Democratic Whip. The Voter Protection Project asked me to reach out to you today because we need your support — and we’ve got to make moves now.

As Whip, I rally Democrats in Congress as a united front to _deliver_ much-needed progress on the issues that matter most and _against_ policy that would tank our economy, strip critical resources away from families, and put a billionaire-first agenda over working people. And with Donald Trump even admitting on his own Truth Social that Democrats “stick together like glue,” _I’d say we’re doing a pretty good job of keeping our team unified._

But we have a massive obstacle to making actual progress for working families in our way: **Trump and the extreme Republican party.**

I’m horrified by the Republicans who refused to grow a spine, stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda, and passed a budget bill that will strip health care away from sick kids and rip food away from hungry families, all so billionaires can become even richer.

Make no mistake — Republicans are to blame. And while they think the American people will just “get over it”, we won’t let voters forget who is responsible.

**The only way we can fight back is by flipping the House blue next year and electing Democrats who will stand up to Trump once and for all.**

But we need resources now so the Voter Protection Project and I can remind voters in every battleground district across the country that Republicans voted for this cruel and callous bill. _If we do that, Trump’s got no chance —**and he knows it.**_

[If you can, friend, can you chip in whatever works for you to help the Voter Protection Project and I take on this extremist party and put a Democratic majority — that works for people — back in the House?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93354?t=6&akid=21009%2E878179%2Ev82Xrs) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Katherine Clark and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93355?t=7&akid=21009%2E878179%2Ev82Xrs)

Thank you,

Katherine Clark
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21009%2E878179%2Ev82Xrs). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21009%2E878179%2Ev82Xrs).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21009%2E878179%2Ev82Xrs) to request fewer emails. clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | I wrote this for you specifically , Peter! Governor Glenn Youngkin, AG Jason Miyares, and I pulled off an incredible victory in 2021. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like YOU , Peter! I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we COULD NOT have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth. I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a serious cash advantage. Liberal groups are cutting her checks for half a MILLION dollars and Hollywood Leftists are injecting her campaign coffers with unheard-of sums of money. Listen Peter, I don 't have liberal groups and Hollywood Democrats propping up my campaign. I 'm 100% relying on support from grassroots patriots like YOU! We can't let a far-Left Democrat like Abigail Spanberger turn our country into a socialist dystopia - we must defend everything we've worked so hard to build! I can't tell you how much I appreciate having you on my team. Together, we will defend our home and ensure our country remains a bastion of conservatism and a land of opportunity! Thank you again and may God bless you and your family, Winsome Earle-Sears Lt. Governor of Virginia | | | | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. name: Tobias Read
subject: Catastrophic
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250827em-msnbc-FR [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250827em-msnbc-FR]
Hi, it's Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I just published a major op-ed in MSNBC because I feel a responsibility to speak out as Oregon’s top elections official.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250827em-msnbc-FR [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250827em-msnbc-FR]
President Trump says he may try to end vote-by-mail with an executive order before the midterms. Meanwhile, some Republicans in Congress are pushing legislation to make it harder for Americans to vote.
This would be catastrophic . In Oregon, we’ve proven for more than 25 years that vote-by-mail works. It’s secure, accurate, and accessible — and Oregonians of all political backgrounds overwhelmingly support it. Fraud is essentially nonexistent, participation is among the highest in the country, and our paper ballots provide a fully auditable trail.
However, rolling it back would mean tearing apart our entire election system and wasting taxpayer money we don’t have — money that should be allocated to schools, roads, and public safety, rather than fixing a system that isn’t broken.
I’ve pledged that Oregon will stand up to any unconstitutional attempt to take away our right to vote by mail. But to fight back, I need your support.
Will you chip in today to help defend Oregon’s vote-by-mail system and protect our democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250827em-msnbc-FR]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250827em-msnbc-FR]
Every dollar helps us build the legal, outreach, and organizing infrastructure to resist these attacks — and keep Oregon a leader in secure, accessible elections.
Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
Tobias Read
P.S. You can read my op-ed here [https://www.msnbc.com/opinion/msnbc-opinion/trump-vote-mail-executive-order-oregon-rcna226337] , and please share it with your friends and networks >>
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250827em-msnbc-FR]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: Rachel Petri, Team Pappas
subject: I’ve been pretty stressed lately
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Your support can make all the difference (and lower my blood pressure).
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2061%2E582294%2EVvc8Zy)
It’s Rachel, Chris’s Campaign Manager.
As you can see, I’ve been pretty stressed lately. 👇
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250827_1_rachel?refcode=em20250827-2061&amount=5&refcode2=2061_582294_Vvc8Zy&akid=2061%2E582294%2EVvc8Zy)
These days I’m running purely on caffeine and panic! ☕😅
Why? Because last month, another Trump-aligned Republican jumped into the race. His issue with Scott Brown? _That he isn’t loyal enough to Trump._
While they fight over who is Trump’s favorite, Chris could face an avalanche of dark money to flip New Hampshire red and send a MAGA extremist to the U.S. Senate.
Chris needs your support to keep fighting for a commonsense, pro-democracy agenda.

# [Breaking: Millions of Americans now blocked from Covid vaccine because of junk science from Trump, RFK](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8adae59c-8ff1-4994-bd2c-7e5901c19983/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Millions of Americans will now be blocked from Covid vaccines, because of junk science championed by RFK Jr, Trump, and morons across America. Trump's FDA just [limited access](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd8bbe7d-9c86-4f15-90af-540205754466/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to the next round to those over 65, and younger people with pre-existing conditions, leaving a huge number of Americans who want protection without any luck, and without insurance coverage even if they can get doses. It's a profoundly stupid decision that flies in the face of scientists across the globe, and that will lead to an unnecessary wave of sickness of death. [**Add your name, and demand that the FDA reverse this terrible decision.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T22e8f04d-d8c6-4106-ac43-b30cf846179d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Laura Gillen
subject: Trump is desperate to avoid a repeat of 2018
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
This is one of the most important seats. It’s the only toss-up district in New York, and if we lose it, it makes taking back the House that much harder.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114111383/565985252/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-08-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2M2OTZhMy04NTgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ayUX9ypkGBDiPqKhasocwm6Nucjg8RSEFPVBTPS7asg=)
---
| Peter,

Trump hasn’t forgotten 2018. That year, Democrats took back the House, allowing them to block his agenda and hold him accountable. **He knows what’s possible when voters push back and he’s terrified it could happen again.**

That’s why he’s building a record-breaking war chest and why Republicans are rigging maps and pouring millions into flipping key seats.

This is one of the most important seats. It’s the only toss-up district in New York, and if we lose it, it makes taking back the House that much harder.

[_**Every dollar we raise helps us respond to ads, reach voters and defend this seat. clean_body: This is one of the most important seats. It’s the only toss-up district in New York, and if we lose it, it makes taking back the House that much harder. | = | Peter, Trump hasn’t forgotten 2018. That year, Democrats took back the House, allowing them to block his agenda and hold him accountable. He knows what’s possible when voters push back and he’s terrified it could happen again. That’s why he’s building a record-breaking war chest and why Republicans are rigging maps and pouring millions into flipping key seats. This is one of the most important seats. It’s the only toss-up district in New York, and if we lose it, it makes taking back the House that much harder. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Laura * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Gillen for NY PO Box 774 Rockville Centre, NY 11571 United States | = If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above.

name: Kevin Mullin
subject: The Golden State’s Project to Save Democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOLDEN STATE DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
We have no choice but to fight back. I hope you’ll join me.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kevinmullinforcongress/big-news-i-was-just-appointed-to-the-house-energy-commerce-committee-9133466?e=292fde286a)
---
| | | | [|
---](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=6219cae1c7&e=292fde286a)
| | Dear Peter,This year has been one of the most challenging times in our nation's history. Over the last eight months, the Trump administration has caused unrelenting chaos and confusion - charting an uncertain and terrifying course for the future of American democracy.As disorienting as Trump’s second term has been, I haven't lost sight of what matters most. I’m still inspired by the hopes and aspirations of our community. I got into politics because I was inspired by the belief that our government can, and must, always strive to better serve its people.
---
[|
---](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=72749524d1&e=292fde286a)
| [CLICK HERE TO JOIN ME](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=0bbd7332e0&e=292fde286a)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | When I first ran for Congress, I promised I would fight for our future, and I meant it. But last week, the Texas Legislature moved to take our future into their hands. They caved to Donald Trump’s mid-decade redistricting demands, effectively cutting five Democratic House seats out of Texas’ Congressional Delegation.If the President of the United States can command Republican state legislatures to entirely disenfranchise their state’s democratic voters, our democracy runs the risk of becoming an authoritarian regime under a one party rule.That’s why I was proud to see the California Legislature respond by supporting Governor Newsom’s Election Rigging Response Act. Because California must stand up to authoritarianism.
---
| [CLICK HERE TO FIGHT BACK](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=828ebe9d63&e=292fde286a)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | I still believe that the core of democracy is our ability to use the tools that we're given to strengthen the will of everyday people. In a moment like this, when Donald Trump is attempting to weaken the fabric of our democracy, it’s absolutely critical we use any tool we have to protect our democracy. When a democratically elected leader prioritizes themself over the will of the people, we must chart a corrective course and explore modern solutions to our modern problems. That's part of the genius of America. That's what inspired me, and so many like me to serve.I started the **Golden State Democracy PAC** so that California can continue to be a leader in the fight to protect, strengthen, and rebuild our democracy. That fight has never been more important than right now.
---
| [SUPPORT THE GOLDEN STATE DEMOCRACY PAC HERE](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=ebbae40a47&e=292fde286a)
---
| | We must do everything in our power to stop Donald Trump, win back the House in 2026, and win back the White House in 2028. Only from there, can we rebuild a healthy American democratic project, and strive toward a more perfect union.But that work starts today. If you can, please consider supporting my efforts to help California protect American democracy.**Will you join the ranks of California’s democracy warriors and support the Golden State Democracy PAC today?** Sincerely,Rep. Kevin MullinCongressman, CA-15
---
| [SUPPORT THE GOLDEN STATE DEMOCRACY PAC HERE](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=4bf6fed5e0&e=292fde286a)

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Back to school
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Banned Books |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114111424/565985440/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWU1NTk1ZS04NjgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=46mg89KrpTj9wzwmfC1rgP6vHbikc2aw79opHRiRH1k=&emci=95bdec5c-a482-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3ee5595e-8683-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7878003)
Friend –

It’s back-to-school season—a time that should be filled with excitement about new teachers, new friends, and new opportunities to learn. For some kids, there are nerves too—nerves about fitting in, about tougher classes, or maybe even about starting at a new school.

**But here in America, there’s another, much darker anxiety weighing on families: the threat of gun violence in schools.** Instead of working to protect our kids from that very real danger, Republicans have decided that the true menace in our classrooms is... books. | [RESIST THE B.S.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114111425/565985441/-1621363908?refcode=E14892-20250825-GroceryPrices-SB-Economy&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWU1NTk1ZS04NjgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=46mg89KrpTj9wzwmfC1rgP6vHbikc2aw79opHRiRH1k=)
---
**That’s right—while kids practice active shooter drills, Republicans are spending their energy making sure students never get their hands on books about friendship, identity, or even fantasy adventures.**

It’s absurd, and it’s dangerous. Our kids don’t need politicians telling them what stories they’re allowed to read. They need leaders who are serious about keeping them safe from gun violence.

clean_body: Banned Books | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. Friend – It’s back-to-school season—a time that should be filled with excitement about new teachers, new friends, and new opportunities to learn. For some kids, there are nerves too—nerves about fitting in, about tougher classes, or maybe even about starting at a new school. But here in America, there’s another, much darker anxiety weighing on families: the threat of gun violence in schools. Instead of working to protect our kids from that very real danger, Republicans have decided that the true menace in our classrooms is... books. | = That’s right—while kids practice active shooter drills, Republicans are spending their energy making sure students never get their hands on books about friendship, identity, or even fantasy adventures. It’s absurd, and it’s dangerous. Our kids don’t need politicians telling them what stories they’re allowed to read. They need leaders who are serious about keeping them safe from gun violence. | | This summer, we launched New Jersey's very first state-specific Democracy Summer program, **and it was a huge success!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114111573/565985937/-1197072038?refcode=2025-08-27-demsummer&recurring=&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=108dcab8-8683-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDhkY2FiOC04NjgzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EQiF4sr4dtwdxdcrtsl6mEsEWeI8iA5Jdc1fwRoRY74=) Because of your support, our 8 fellows got hands-on experience in every part of a grassroots campaign. They helped with finance projects, recruited volunteers, and knocked on hundreds of doors. They also heard directly from statewide leaders in workshops and connected with campaigns and organizations across New Jersey. Here are just some of the projects our fellows worked on:
* Recruited volunteers for statewide elections
* Attended rallies and visibility events
* Organized a rally and canvass launch in Rahway
* Attended candidate meet-and-greets hosted by ONE NJ7
* Made phone calls for competitive state assembly races

This program was only possible because of the contributions you made earlier this summer. You invested in the next generation of leaders and organizers who will carry our democracy forward, and they delivered. I'm so grateful for your partnership in this work, and I look forward to continuing working to expand youth outreach nationwide and support the next generation of leaders. Together, we're building the kind of grassroots power it will take to win in New Jersey and beyond. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

name: Ted Cruz
subject: I want you to remember this moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Every day you wait is another day they pull ahead. And if we lose, history won’t care about excuses — only results. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=414a1f54e90e4b23b97cbb7fe71b793c&_e=Rti-ejRwxupMDQrjFGJBKXZB0N4PHYfYsJPtjTSD-XTIgAfwLfo7biiFU5rTwtc-Y5l9HotDKzOqZZVkkYXp_cCqZUqsf90uRiQyTFYrmcphMY1iP6xhXKKplh4beKNexcC1WoKGQpIm0fT-z8u1IE3MnliV-wuYtBaYDj8eBJW0X0SSu1AuogoUrVgijEEPO8MjgrcLE5VR9m3y-DIr6UlrtUUPGnnBRVnewWKYwWwUjeZqK_ArCr7c4crxXKBZwyQIChnnsf_h_KgfB7K5nWpeqGwrOOTy-0d2TrFEd5fKJ8G3kNt_MYkvlVD5W7w7_HPV0eeVJfgljUtkXXwfxQKMWAhAWZpD_0tsvT19WxIIjk7_UXpmg1Hjerwi0p_0RVfwyaXrjrA3W1zXvHqttq1XneBoISo_f126WUaLTVOOdXahd7kIfnbjDdditQVdrilq-bOmoYgn72pTT-mss47ccN9ZmfcKwc4J1Jhb6qipXK7JtGSXYc4zia2mOuG1TVY0Lj7bCOVs2Y0yYzK88KbGen8hM1U6cfYTt3n9V6BfmbxEZnPq4G_Bo5E4ZcQltfceqwN-4Ro6Pq3LBbJpmuaCQmXKJ6zCMsT6-1D6grQZYy1Ixn6OVLADELikYpI3KUxsGdTErftr_CCwK6uiggZ1rraU0NcVOVnOfIBYGx43BGCXCDPd5VXVEdrzzu2GeHo4O4fPtQXmE_bplDh-fz37mbpK_jAqfYOezNfacKiwdhDkWYES-ecl4PXG-LQ5_dyW2E3uBTB4f5-MPGinKcgcFeivUiuaRaX5N4r_csgLGLoHr9jkCXz8rMZ-XVw_uCDYfrGmrxFLiDRgTO0gvhCiziWG1vxhdC0WJNtHY8M%3D)

---
Peter,

On August 12th, I sent you an email asking for your help to fuel our fight against the far left, which continues to raise mountains of cash.

My ask—$9. I asked you and 111,000 other conservatives for help, and in the end, we came up short.

I’m not going to sugarcoat it: **we are losing this fight** — and it’s not because the Left is stronger, it’s because too many conservatives are still sitting on the sidelines._**I worry that because we finally have the White House, the US Senate and the House all at the same time and are getting things accomplished, grassroots Republicans are content with our recent wins. We shouldn’t be as there is so much more we have to do to fix America. **_

Democrats pulled in 7.5 million more donations than Republicans in the first half of 2025. That’s not a small gap — that’s a warning siren.

If you haven’t given this year, I have to ask you: _**what will you say to yourself if we lose the Senate because you didn’t act when you could have?**_

You’ll know the truth — that while the Left poured in cash to buy their wins, too many of us watched from the sidelines.

If you’ve ever said you stand for liberty, the Constitution, and America’s future — this is the moment to prove it. Not later. Not “when things get worse.” By then, it will be too late.
**
Because we failed to reach our fundraising goal on August 12th, our average gift this month has now fallen to just $7.**

clean_body: Every day you wait is another day they pull ahead. And if we lose, history won’t care about excuses — only results. | Peter, On August 12th, I sent you an email asking for your help to fuel our fight against the far left, which continues to raise mountains of cash. My ask—$9. I asked you and 111,000 other conservatives for help, and in the end, we came up short. I’m not going to sugarcoat it: we are losing this fight — and it’s not because the Left is stronger, it’s because too many conservatives are still sitting on the sidelines.I worry that because we finally have the White House, the US Senate and the House all at the same time and are getting things accomplished, grassroots Republicans are content with our recent wins. We shouldn’t be as there is so much more we have to do to fix America. Democrats pulled in 7.5 million more donations than Republicans in the first half of 2025. That’s not a small gap — that’s a warning siren. If you haven’t given this year, I have to ask you: what will you say to yourself if we lose the Senate because you didn’t act when you could have? You’ll know the truth — that while the Left poured in cash to buy their wins, too many of us watched from the sidelines. If you’ve ever said you stand for liberty, the Constitution, and America’s future — this is the moment to prove it. Not later. Not “when things get worse.” By then, it will be too late. Because we failed to reach our fundraising goal on August 12th, our average gift this month has now fallen to just $7. If we can’t match their enthusiasm soon, we are choosing to let them have it all. Every day you wait is another day they pull ahead. And if we lose, history won’t care about excuses — only results. I’m asking you directly: don’t be one of the conservatives who stayed quiet and then wondered how it all slipped away. For liberty, Ted Cruz P.S. Trump won more than 77 million votes last fall. If even 10% of those voters gave today, we'd erase the Democrats' advantage instantly. Please — be one of them. ] | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265

Together. = | | = Thank you in advance for chipping in, Team Fight Like Hell Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5825d3bd-b8a2-4f65-9487-ccb00510f96e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Why we need you
subject: We don’t back politicians. We back people.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/107746/images/Engageyalltransparentlogo.png]
Friend, it's Gay Valimont.
Congress is still on recess until September 3rd. This is supposed to be the time when lawmakers come home, hold town halls, and listen to their constituents.
But Republicans are doing everything they can to avoid real conversations. Many are skipping in-person events entirely. Others who do show up are clinging to a memo of talking points, parroting the same lines about Trump’s so-called “One Big Beautiful Bill” while their voters demand answers about health care cuts, tax hikes on working families, and giveaways to the wealthy.
This is not representation. No matter your party, you deserve a member of Congress who will look you in the eye, hear your concerns, and answer your questions honestly.
Engage Y’all is investing in leaders who do just that. We back candidates who are not afraid of tough conversations and who put people before politics. This is how we build trust. This is how we win.
Fuel the Ground Game
To keep supporting candidates who do the hard work, we need your help. Donate now to Engage Y’all and power leaders who fight for their communities.
Donate $10 to the Fight Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eyall-kl-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eyall-kl-email?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10] Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eyall-kl-email?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25] Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eyall-kl-email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50] Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eyall-kl-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eyall-kl-email?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
Thanks for being in this with us,
— Gay Valimont & the Engage Y’all Team

The momentum is on Debra’s side as she received 40 percent of the vote and beat the nearest Republican by 22 percent — but her Republican opponents won’t give up easily, and she needs our help to cross the finish line in just 27 days. Did you hear this latest update on the critical redistricting saga?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25-redistricting?refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25-redistricting?refcode=&amount=] CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]Last week, the Texas House approved the new gerrymandered maps that Donald Trump ordered them to scribble together overnight. The goal of this map is to eliminate 5+ Democratic seats and stack the deck to make it impossible for Democrats to retake the U.S. House Majority.
But in response, Gov. Gavin Newsom signed legislation calling for a November ballot measure on the Election Rigging Response Act — a law that ensures any Democratic seats that Republicans eliminate in Texas can be neutralized here in California.
Proposition 50 is officially going to be on the ballot this November, so, it’s GAME ON. That means that we need to be ready to win this ballot measure starting now .
Passing Prop 50 in November isn’t going to be an easy task. Early voting will start in just a matter of weeks. That means we have weeks to get the word out about a new election, convince undecided voters to vote YES, and save our chances of flipping the U.S. House.
Will you rush a donation to our Rapid Response Redistricting Fund right now? The timing couldn’t be more urgent. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]

name: Voter Action Project
subject: More than any other time in the last 60 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
There’s a simple, harsh reality, Team: Americans’ right to vote is in more danger today than at any time since the Voting Rights Act was passed in 1965.
➜ We're watching a wave of racial gerrymandering that deliberately silences Black communities and voter intimidation that puts the safety of voters of color at risk.
➜ Opponents of voting rights in Congress are pushing hard to pass the SAVE Act – a bill designed to intimidate and exclude untold millions of women and voters of color.
➜ Cuts to early and mail-in voting disproportionately disenfranchise people of color , and economic barriers like voter ID laws disproportionately target Black voters.
The Voting Rights Act is the cornerstone of racial voter equality but it’s nearly been destroyed through attacks in the courts. A U.S. Supreme Court focused on limiting voting is trying to knock it out entirely. We have to step up and act now before we turn into another failed democracy.
Team, We refuse to back down, but we need your help to power this fight. Will you chip in with $25 or whatever you can today? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=082725_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=082725_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=082725_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=082725_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=082725_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=082725_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=082725_2&amount=35]
Listen, defenders of voting rights like the late John Lewis gave blood, sweat, and tears to codify the right to vote for Black Americans.
But now, voter suppression architects are trying to repeal the Voting Rights Act and send America back to a time when the right to vote belonged to only the privileged few.
We refuse to let them turn back the clock. We believe that everyone deserves our fundamental right to have our voice heard in our elections. Whether someone has recently moved, changed their legal name, just turned 18, recently gained citizenship, or face social and economic barriers to voting, we're going to do everything we can to make sure their vote counts. Everywhere.
Team, if you're with us, please pitch in $25 or whatever you can today to protect our fundamental right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=082725_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082725_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082725_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=wSzk2t091kQWQlufGZrR5mJhsqaK5ZebjikeUiUCrOujXZUXwmCk8UBVBHH4Bt2mKDfM8aoCeWRmUFsoi%2BkJqUeAAx9%2BT8YiVyZ%2Fk2hpnqqbUnaLmDP3wLUHj4OimzlF2Qe15VXoMlzrskKle%2BNm%2BOC6ME5IWlCkq6Mi1Npa52ctF1jSb%2BVG8nW3cvQStDeSs5woHbeye6uZTWBbClDUSZNRDpOlcPQcnDWf0y0mM%2BGoItyggncZLrgq%2Fak%2FClIuc4MwixErDgNBp58kCULSUM2%2Bu9CkRKKD3kTKuG%2B3meKJ5fVwU0khqvP5mNex0gMqTWmx4ASuGZL%2BR3aUlyMO1qGJmvHdStHodofuQ70nzYTdnb5aYAYxnedbKAOBMTF5U0OcEBqFM%2FliHGSakWsoHuYWsSObIySmU8cdNDnuchQ%3D .

| Summer in West Michigan always reminds me why I got into this work. Whether it’s at the lakeshore or in our local neighborhood, I’m constantly reminded of the hardworking people who make this place so special.

As we get ready for the next phase of this campaign, I want to hear from you. Your voice matters. I’ve always been committed to listening to the people of this district, and now more than ever, it’s important to make sure we’re focused on the issues that matter most to you.

That’s why I’ve put together a short survey to gather your thoughts on the most important issues for West Michigan families.

That’s why I’ve put together a short survey to gather your thoughts on the most important issues for West Michigan families. | Thank you! – Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . subject: Walks like a dictator, talks like a dictator, acts like a dictator….
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
If you feel like us, like things are out of control , you’re not alone. But the truth is, nobody’s going to come along and save us. If we want to stop Trump it has to start with us.
#
“A dictator on day one.” Remember that?
They told us we were crazy, but it’s beyond any doubt now.
Twice this week he insinuated that he was a dictator. He’s taking control of private businesses. Attacking universities. Persecuting his political opponents. Firing decorated Military leaders.
He literally just said, at the White House, on tape, that he can do whatever he wants because he’s the president.
If he walks like a dictator, talks like a dictator, acts like a dictator, he’s probably a dictator. Right?
If you feel like us, like things are out of control , you’re not alone. But truth is, nobody’s going to come along and save us. If we want to stop Trump it has to start with us.
We’ve got to make noise, raise hell, and take the fight to Trump. VoteVets is doing that work — from local elected offices, to state legislatures, to Congress, to the court room, and out on the street.
We aren’t rolling over for this, and we’re damn sure not giving up.
[**If you’re still in the fight and you want to make a donation that will matter, we need your help. Make a donation to VoteVets and we’re going to put it to work in the most perilous political environment in history — the one we’re in right now.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.hEpWPc&refcode=em250827-1-90&t=1&akid=34564%2E3013755%2E-_aeyK)

The team at VoteVets

clean_body: | | | ****A judge orders the closure of the gator gulag, but MAGA is fighting to keep their barbaric prison swamp open. A federal judge just slammed the brakes on “Alligator Alcatraz”--barring new detainees and ordering it shut down within 60 days! A hard-won victory! For now... Trump and MAGA are already appealing–ignoring environmental damage, trampling a nearby Tribal nation’s sovereignty, and defending an unAmerican prison camp built on cruelty. This fight is just beginning, and we aren’t letting up until this disgrace is GONE FOR GOOD! Cedar Key Progress has posted a billboard in Florida, funded by donors like you, with a simple message: “Alligator Alcatraz is an American disgrace.” We need your help to support future billboard campaigns targeting MAGA Republicans. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Trump and his regime are plotting MORE immigrant detention centers – targeting large tribal populations across the country. That’s the playbook of this hellish administration–bulldoze historically marginalized groups and force their brutal schemes upon them. We’re fighting back! We are exposing Trump’s skullduggery AND we are working to IMPEACH him!** Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future.
