name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Two Weeks Out—RSVP for D.C.!
body:
RSVP for the petition delivery—only U.S. citizens vote.
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/01000198edafb25f-6881f087-da93-46fb-a252-e224e316d067-000000/W75khT2kuPmKoL_GOOpZhBCh5K4sV0Qb_NrszwS8mVI=420)**In** **two weeks—on Wednesday, September 10th—we gather in** **Washington, D.C.** to rally for the SAVE Act and hand-deliver petition signatures to Congress. If you can be there, now is the time to act:[ _**RSVP and make your travel plans.**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fevents.teapartypatriots.org%2Fevent%2Focv-bus-tour-washington-dc%2F/1/01000198edafb25f-6881f087-da93-46fb-a252-e224e316d067-000000/Yh3_7JbSm1uWi2JgXZTio0O-X0ERu85joSeAYiZSt3E=420) Think about how the Left is hoping that you don’t show up. They are hoping that patriots say, “Oh, other people will go; I don’t need to go.” They want you to decide this is unimportant because _they know precisely how critical the SAVE Act is to securing honest elections where_** _only U.S. citizens vote in U.S. elections._**
Don’t wait until it becomes too difficult to travel to D.C. **Make your plans now and make your stand for ONLY CITIZEN VOTING with your fellow American patriots on September 10th!****D.C. Rally & Petition Delivery
When:** Wed., Sept. 10th, **Noon
Where:** U.S. Capitol — Upper Senate Park

name: Randy Villegas
subject: Health care shouldn’t depend on your wallet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress
body:
|
# [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114116411/566002155/1981932150?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNhMGU0OTgtOTk4My1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vyyRkzVjz6ohp10BOELp2k9pEzg5xwpYH5fe_KkUtQk=)
Two out of every three bankruptcies in this country are tied to medical debt. Every single year, **more than 66,000 people die because they don’t have health insurance.** Not because we couldn’t treat them. Not because we couldn’t save them. But because of a system that denied them care. That’s unacceptable. And the answer to how we fight back is simple: **we need to fight unapologetically for Medicare for All.** Here in the Central Valley, too many families are forced to choose between paying the bills and going to the doctor. As the son of immigrants who relied on Medicaid growing up, I know exactly how broken our system is, and I know we deserve better. The truth is, Medicare for All would actually save us money. A recent study by the Healthy California Commission found that single-payer care could save the state up to **$213 billion over ten years** – an 8% overall savings. The question isn’t “can we afford it?” The real question is: **how can we afford not to?** **[If you believe health care is a human right, help us build a people-powered campaign that will fight for Medicare for All and flip CA-22.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114116413/566002156/1981932150?refcode=em-8.27.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNhMGU0OTgtOTk4My1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vyyRkzVjz6ohp10BOELp2k9pEzg5xwpYH5fe_KkUtQk=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114116414/566002158/1981932150?refcode=em-8.27.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNhMGU0OTgtOTk4My1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vyyRkzVjz6ohp10BOELp2k9pEzg5xwpYH5fe_KkUtQk=)

clean_body: | = Two out of every three bankruptcies in this country are tied to medical debt. Every single year, more than 66,000 people die because they don’t have health insurance. Not because we couldn’t treat them. Not because we couldn’t save them. But because of a system that denied them care. That’s unacceptable. And the answer to how we fight back is simple: we need to fight unapologetically for Medicare for All. Here in the Central Valley, too many families are forced to choose between paying the bills and going to the doctor. As the son of immigrants who relied on Medicaid growing up, I know exactly how broken our system is, and I know we deserve better. The truth is, Medicare for All would actually save us money. A recent study by the Healthy California Commission found that single-payer care could save the state up to $213 billion over ten years – an 8% overall savings. The question isn’t “can we afford it?” The real question is: how can we afford not to? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = This is a corporate-free campaign. No corporate PAC money period. We’re funded by teachers, farmworkers, students, and neighbors who know the status quo is failing families in the Valley and across the country. = | = Thank you, Randy Villegas | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40075%2E3422442%2EWuTrHQ)
Three polls in a row show Katie Porter with a wide double-digit lead among Democrats in the California governor’s race, Peter.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250827_1_ak?refcode=em20250827-40075&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40075_3422442_WuTrHQ&akid=40075%2E3422442%2EWuTrHQ)
These recent polls found _Katie’s lead is more than double_ that of the next most competitive Democrat. And they show a similar trend: **Katie’s support is growing faster than anyone else.**
**The takeaway is clear: Katie Porter is the Democratic frontrunner.** But here’s the catch: the only other candidates close to Katie in the polls are both Republicans. That means we can’t afford to get complacent. If Democrats don’t consolidate support, _we risk being shut out of the general election altogether._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250827_1_ak?refcode=em20250827-40075&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40075_3422442_WuTrHQ&akid=40075%2E3422442%2EWuTrHQ)
We have to make sure she has the resources to grow her lead and carry this campaign to victory on Election Day.
**[Will you pitch in $5 or more today to help elect Katie Porter as California’s next governor?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250827_1_ak?refcode=em20250827-40075&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40075_3422442_WuTrHQ&akid=40075%2E3422442%2EWuTrHQ)**

We wouldn’t be in this position without Porter Supporters like you, Peter.
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250827-40075&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40075_3422442_WuTrHQ&akid=40075%2E3422442%2EWuTrHQ)**

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Folks... God help us if we're not successful here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Ballots will drop in a few weeks...

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
Hi there. It's Gavin Newsom. I'm reaching out to respectfully ask you to make a $35 contribution to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California.

I want to stress the importance of this ask: ballots drop in just a few weeks and our opponents have already started paid advertising because one man with a history of giving to extremist causes and candidates contributed $10 million. We will put your donation right to work getting on the air with our own ads. This is critical.

Folks... God help us if we're not successful here. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House -- talking to more and more Republican states; they're going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges and the free press... We have to act.

[**Will you please make a contribution to my ballot measure committee today? This is moving fast. We will put your donation right to work.**](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4476?refcode=em250827-2&t=1&akid=2502%2E4767699%2EgOCEsc) Gavin Newsom |

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Famine, a ground invasion, and more journalists killed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The crisis in Gaza has only gotten worse this past week.

First, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu confirmed his plans for a
ground invasion of Gaza City.

The Israeli military plans to fully occupy the city by October but the
first stage has already begun, with tanks rolling in and bombs dropping in
the al-Zaytoun neighborhood. Families are once again being forced to
evacuate their homes with nowhere safe to go, while Israeli forces expel
all medical workers and destroy the city’s remaining health care
infrastructure.

Then, a United Nations panel confirmed what we long knew was coming:
famine is underway in Gaza.

The Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO), UNICEF,
the United Nations World Food Programme (WFP), and the World Health
Organization (WHO) are all calling for a ceasefire and a full-scale,
unimpeded humanitarian response to allow food to flow freely into Gaza
before half a million people starve to death. More Palestinians die of
starvation as the IDF kills desperate aid-seekers with each day’s passing.

And on Monday, Israeli forces conducted a double-tap drone strike on
Nasser Hospital, killing at least 20 people, including five more
journalists.

Disturbing video shows rescue workers and reporters being struck by a
missile with zero warning while assessing the damage and trying to save
lives just minutes after the first strike. It was one of the deadliest
attacks on Palestinian journalists since Israel began this genocide almost
two years ago.

There is no justification for ANY of this. And yet, the majority of
Congress continues to sit on its hands and refuse to hold Israel
accountable by withholding new weapons transfers or military aid.

Justice Democrats are among the few American leaders in power speaking out
and taking action to end this genocide and ethnic cleansing.

As long as the Netanyahu administration continues its efforts to occupy
and wipe out all of Gaza, we must keep pressuring U.S. leaders to act.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250827?refcode=em20250827-36964&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36964_1203867_g6s3aB&akid=36964%2E1203867%2Eg6s3aB ]Contribute $5

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250827-36964-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36964_1203867_g6s3aB&akid=36964%2E1203867%2Eg6s3aB

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36964%2E1203867%2Eg6s3aB

Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Consequences
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07132025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07132025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Last week, the U.S. Supreme Court handed Donald Trump a win that halted nearly $800 million in NIH research grants -- funding that supports Alzheimer’s studies, public health research, and other life-saving work.
Four justices sided with Trump entirely. Four stood against him. And one conservative justice split the difference, leaving critical life-saving projects in limbo.
This razor-thin 5-4 ruling is a reminder of what’s at stake when extremists get control of the courts. Trump has made it his mission to weaponize the judiciary to push his dangerous agenda, and the consequences hit everyday people hardest.
That’s why this November, Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court elections are absolutely pivotal. If we lose this court, Trump and his allies will have free rein to challenge voting rights, dismantle fair maps, and push their attacks on public education, workers, and basic freedoms.
We can’t let that happen. GOTV PAC is organizing to turn out every voter we can because if we win in Pennsylvania, we protect the integrity of our elections and stop Trump’s extremist agenda from spreading further.
But we can’t do it without grassroots support.
Can you chip in $15, $25, or whatever you can today to help us defend the PA Supreme Court this November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08272025&amount=25]

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Greg Casar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Progressives aren't going anywhere.
#
The congressional redistricting process in Texas has been outrageous — and **it has serious consequences for the future of our democracy**.
Texas Republicans have rammed through a new map that gives them _five more_ House seats, just weeks after Texas Democrats took extraordinary action — leaving the state for two weeks — to try and block the Trump-backed scheme.
This is what we’re up against. **It’s not just gerrymandering, it’s strategic disenfranchisement.**
Earlier this week, progressive champion and Chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus **Greg Casar announced he's officially running for re-election in his newly reconfigured Texas congressional district**.
[Will you split a $5 contribution — $2.50 for each team — between Alexandria and Greg's campaigns today? We must stand together and show the MAGA movement: progressives aren't going anywhere.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250827-casar.k2oIWj&refcode=em20250827-9631-P_FND_SPL_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9631%2E2526796%2EyHKN6K)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250827-casar.k2oIWj&refcode=em20250827-9631-P_FND_SPL_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9631%2E2526796%2EyHKN6K)**
Now that Republicans have gotten away with this in Texas, they are setting a dangerous precedent: that **congressional maps are no longer tied to population or fairness — but to unchecked power.**
If we don’t fight back now, we risk seeing this movement dismantled one map, one district, one vote at a time.
Alexandria and Greg are in this fight because they both know what’s at stake. They are holding the progressive line in Congress and building a movement that defends the power of your vote.
[Will you split a $5 contribution between our teams today so that we can keep this fight strong through November and beyond?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250827-casar.k2oIWj&refcode=em20250827-9631-P_FND_SPL_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9631%2E2526796%2EyHKN6K)

In solidarity,
Team AOC

clean_body: Progressives aren't going anywhere. The congressional redistricting process in Texas has been outrageous — and it has serious consequences for the future of our democracy. Texas Republicans have rammed through a new map that gives them five more House seats, just weeks after Texas Democrats took extraordinary action — leaving the state for two weeks — to try and block the Trump-backed scheme. This is what we’re up against. It’s not just gerrymandering, it’s strategic disenfranchisement. Earlier this week, progressive champion and Chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus Greg Casar announced he's officially running for re-election in his newly reconfigured Texas congressional district. Now that Republicans have gotten away with this in Texas, they are setting a dangerous precedent: that congressional maps are no longer tied to population or fairness — but to unchecked power. If we don’t fight back now, we risk seeing this movement dismantled one map, one district, one vote at a time. Alexandria and Greg are in this fight because they both know what’s at stake. They are holding the progressive line in Congress and building a movement that defends the power of your vote. Whether or not you can contribute today, thank you for standing with us in this fight. In solidarity, Team AOC | ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Local Democracy Project
subject: Unleash the power of art to save democracy!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
Peter, When the darkness of authoritarianism tries to cast a shadow on our lives, we reach for brushes, paint, and unyielding courage. Throughout history, art has been a powerful form of resistance - an expressive weapon against oppression. From the political murals of the Mexican Revolution to the protest songs of the Civil Rights Movement, artists have always stood at the forefront of social change. In this spirit, we confront the rise of authoritarianism under Trump with beautiful and inspiring expressions. In collaboration with renowned political artist and Army veteran Essam Attia, we are transforming a prominent wall in the bustling heart of D.C. into a living testament to civic resistance -a monument celebrating the power of the people in our democracy. This project transcends simple decoration; it is a clarion call. It echoes the wisdom of our foremothers and forefathers, reminding us that democracy thrives only when we actively defend what we cherish. We’re bringing that truth to life in a space where it cannot be ignored. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvHQt2jsHMPkLo3mII2nqxTqW3y3dOiba4_63CV9nrMVTANjqPB8CJkyygTWjXGGUKkrwc4_QyoVf1bUv-L3tgUHT0mo51twi9BfyfrdryM10wuSfUgMMUN-nxhnHRZ7p6dh7KPVFYEzlUdtwJYEQUqkrBs5vGMJXZO62plji_Kewr1D27YYreYchN3kASenEqu9U-lEhRs--FDhuuujALgar5BMih6zvaBOI_y8WV-yY09SWWaHkVbDOjmRPOIn5OVB-RGM-Jk2n-ZxjMdlRrbrGATejl9auEMfQAjeWzCxKFuc0WbNZNUpQX6GqeSSse2z5DSBCUwcTc6nT6Fkck1AAiG6ztdaBixNbul1bqtQA/4je/ShHaiRw1SiW9V8c0Q5VAeQ/h0/h001.Vt5ZC1m8IbtQzwS2BOdavJvasN3XHSV3NRzx0V1p4_0)_Existing Mural (left) Essam Attia’s conceptual mock-up (right)_ __
* **The location:** LeDroit Park Historic District, at the vibrant intersection of U St. and Florida Ave NW.
* **The focal point:** FDR’s timeless assertion, “The ultimate rulers of our democracy... are the voters of this country.”
* **The mission:** to ignite conversations, encourage civic participation, and cultivate a grassroots movement in the public square, standing firm against fascism and safeguarding our democracy!

We are currently raising funds for materials, labor, lifts, sealing, and permits - everything necessary to bring this large-scale public artwork to life and ensure its lasting impact. **Supported by the Local Democracy Project, this installation merges civic action with creative defiance. It’s art that refuses to be silenced. Art that votes. Art that serves as a reminder that power resides with the people - and the people must show up.** [**As a defender of democracy, your support is crucial. Donate today to help us transform a wall into a rallying cry and a neighborhood into a hub of activism.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvHQt2jsHMPkLo3mII2nqxTqW3y3dOiba4_63CV9nrMVTmWDGL1EWuFHFjeJfB5hbLPvU6gT66aQNzt_gtONuiGJ8-kdeUkoSGLqmpE51GFOSVjDhODSPM52DxFEKDECyHn0fTesDMXNwCYW8bygdld0la4Rl0iVLR0oVaw9t8tceOsbuIZ5BgoCmbvBMrZckfrRF01wa_0SGqDZOh6MqcvkqeVtg-R8Pa99OZfQVUWuLtxupFAXROyuiJpFTNINyVe3NAPuPEYkF5M9ppC8qTopXqeR1LXB_OKH25LTZiJNnebu9HZGTY2_8KuBZHBfTTs8yA_7NbZqk55DqjWdZpL9mwzpkHRXy5DL6lhZb6y_A/4je/ShHaiRw1SiW9V8c0Q5VAeQ/h1/h001.jKXrf8ZdtmAkpuk2yl48JGQy_GUhCvMPA01wUkyQ-V0) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

That’s the amount of money Jason’s campaign for Congress accepts from corporate PACs.

Jason has always refused to accept a cent of corporate PAC money. Jason is only interested in answering to everyday people like you — never billionaires or special interests.

But the truth is that Washington is broken. Too many politicians, in both parties, are cozy in the pockets of special interests that spend millions of dollars to get them elected.

Meanwhile, American families are left paying the price.

Jason is fighting to bring accountability to Washington and end the corrupting influence of special interest money. That’s why our campaign relies on folks like you giving what you can, when you can.

clean_body: Jason Crow For Colorado [] $0.00, friend. That’s the amount of money Jason’s campaign for Congress accepts from corporate PACs. Jason has always refused to accept a cent of corporate PAC money. Jason is only interested in answering to everyday people like you — never billionaires or special interests. But the truth is that Washington is broken. Too many politicians, in both parties, are cozy in the pockets of special interests that spend millions of dollars to get them elected. Meanwhile, American families are left paying the price. Jason is fighting to bring accountability to Washington and end the corrupting influence of special interest money. That’s why our campaign relies on folks like you giving what you can, when you can. But that means he relies on your support all the more to reach our fundraising goal and power our work. Can Jason count on your support before our deadline expires at the end of August? name: Wes Moore
subject: I don’t listen to chicken hawks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I heard Donald Trump is going after me for telling the truth, so here it is again
I heard Donald Trump is going after me for telling the truth, so here it is again: Deploying the National Guard in D.C. lacks seriousness and is deeply dangerous.
**Peter, I don’t listen to criticism from chicken hawks.**
People who talk tough but have never worn a uniform besides Brooks Brothers suits should not use our service members for political games.
As the commander-in-chief of the Maryland National Guard, I know what they are trained on. I know what it means to ask someone to put their life at risk, and what that means you are asking of their families. This political ploy isn’t it.
If the White House wants to get serious about public safety, they should talk to us. We’ve achieved some of the most impressive drops in violent crime in the country and Baltimore is the safest it's been in 50 years.
**[This stunt by the Trump administration is BS, and it has to stop – if you’re with me, please split a contribution between my campaign and Heartland Patriots.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94208?refcode=em20250827-9337&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9337%2E614464%2E_E8UEF)**
Elevate,
Wes Moore

Team — North Carolina is a swing state, and we can be sure that Republicans will go all out to defeat us. But I know how to win North Carolina. _Whether it was Attorney General or Governor, I’ve done it over and over in the most competitive years._

It takes the dedication to connect with folks in every community, the commitment to fight for the rights that people hold dear, and the courage to stand up in the face of threats to the progress we’ve made.

**I served as Governor for eight years. I know that North Carolinians don’t want to go backward. And based on the enthusiasm we’re seeing for our campaign from people across our country, that sentiment is true for Americans everywhere.**

As a U.S. Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, clean air and drinking water, and more. I will work to make health care _more_ affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy.

And I’ll never stop listening to what _the people_ need from me and meeting them where they are.

I believe that this is how you win a swing state, folks. And I _know_ that — with you on our team — we can succeed here in North Carolina. [**I’m asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester because _right now_ is when we can build the momentum to win. name: Team Hick
subject: is there anything we can say?
